name: All On The Line Election Watch
subject: The elections we’re watching closely
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Elections matter, and our work to win them starts now.
|
---

Peter,
Right now, All On The Line is gearing up to educate voters on a crucial slate of elections in 2025 and 2026, where fair maps could be on the line:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113695780/564620927/174172392?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_PriStateRdx_email_20250820-AOTL-Tier1-PriStateRdx_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250820-AOTL-Tier1-PriStateRdx_&utm_campaign=PriStateRdx&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ4N2YwY2M3LTIxN2UtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDIzZSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Bjh3d54oxHjJ7-uN55mUC_-yeT182qwMEfBDonGz_9Y=)
---
**Each and every one of these elections is critical to the ongoing fight for democracy, Peter.**
[**Anti-democracy forces know how much these elections matter. In states like Florida and Texas, we’ve seen their game plan when they win power in a state — change the rules and manipulate the maps to take more and more power.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113695783/564620930/174172392?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_PriStateRdx_email_20250820-AOTL-Tier1-PriStateRdx_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250820-AOTL-Tier1-PriStateRdx_&utm_campaign=PriStateRdx&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ4N2YwY2M3LTIxN2UtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDIzZSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Bjh3d54oxHjJ7-uN55mUC_-yeT182qwMEfBDonGz_9Y=)
[**The work to win these elections is happening now — and there’s much to do,**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113695788/564620937/174172392?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_PriStateRdx_email_20250820-AOTL-Tier1-PriStateRdx_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250820-AOTL-Tier1-PriStateRdx_&utm_campaign=PriStateRdx&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ4N2YwY2M3LTIxN2UtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDIzZSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Bjh3d54oxHjJ7-uN55mUC_-yeT182qwMEfBDonGz_9Y=) from energizing voters to make their voices heard, to pushing back against attempts to manipulate congressional maps, to educating voters about what’s on their ballots. We need to make sure voters know what’s at stake in elections like these.
But it won’t be easy. [**We expect them to invest heavily in these same state-level races, because whoever wins gets to steer what happens next in the fight for democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113695795/564620953/174172392?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_PriStateRdx_email_20250820-AOTL-Tier1-PriStateRdx_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250820-AOTL-Tier1-PriStateRdx_&utm_campaign=PriStateRdx&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ4N2YwY2M3LTIxN2UtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDIzZSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Bjh3d54oxHjJ7-uN55mUC_-yeT182qwMEfBDonGz_9Y=) We must continue to fight for fair maps and fair representation — and these upcoming state-level races are a moment for each of us to double down on our commitment to defend our democracy.
**[**Will you make a donation today to help mobilize and educate voters about critical elections and make sure we leave nothing to chance?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113695797/564620967/174172392?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_PriRedux_email_20250802-AOTL-Tier1-PriRedux_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250802-AOTL-Tier1-PriRedux_&utm_campaign=PriRedux&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ4N2YwY2M3LTIxN2UtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDIzZSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Bjh3d54oxHjJ7-uN55mUC_-yeT182qwMEfBDonGz_9Y=)**

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: The attacks have continued
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
The lies and attacks on vote-by-mail have only increased in the last 48 hours, Team. Trump's statement has brought all the usual anti-voting, anti-democracy suspects out of the woodwork to ramp up the falsehoods we've heard for years.
But we've also seen defenders of voting rights standing up for our fundamental right to vote. We've just got to make sure our grassroots power can match their dark money millions and suppressive media empire.
RUSH $25 or more right now to fuel our work in the states, in Congress, and in the courts to defend mail-in voting and make every vote count in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=082025_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
ABC: Trump says he will lead 'movement' to end mail-in voting [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=082025_2&amount=25]
Our time in the barrel has come, Team .
President Donald Trump said just hours ago that he will lead a "movement" to get rid of mail-in ballots and voting machines , falsely claiming that they lead to voter fraud.
Word for lying word: " I am going to lead a movement to get rid of MAIL-IN BALLOTS, and also, while we're at it, Highly 'Inaccurate,' Very Expensive, and Seriously Controversial VOTING MACHINES, which cost Ten Times more than accurate and sophisticated Watermark Paper, which is faster, and leaves NO DOUBT, at the end of the evening, as to who WON, and who LOST, the Election. "
How is Trump going to do this? He's signing an executive order ahead of next year's critical midterms. Is this just another attempt to distract from a failing economy, rising prices, and his role in the Epstein scandal? Probably, yes. Are we going to fight him tooth and nail? You betcha.
We're going to work in the states to defend our access to cast ballots, as they run elections. We're going to petition members of Congress to stop harmful bills that might attempt to back up this executive order. And we're going to do everything we can to support the efforts to stop this in court.
We'll be blunt: We still need your help to protect our fundamental right to vote. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to defend vote by mail across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=082025_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=082025_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=082025_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=082025_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=082025_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=082025_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=082025_2&amount=35]
Trump has long lied about mail-in voting. He's claimed mail-in voting contributed to his 2020 election loss, though no widespread fraud has been found. In fact, the one case of mail-in ballot fraud in Pennsylvania after the 2020 election was a man who was prosecuted for returning his dead mother's ballot for Trump .
We all know just how safe and secure mail-in voting is. It's use dates back to the Civil War. The use of mail-in voting has become very common across the country and study after study has shown that fraud in mail-ballot voting is rare. There are also several safeguards in place nationwide to protect against fraud, including signature requirements and barcodes to track envelopes sent by officials. States have spent tens of millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing.
Being blunt: There is no good-faith reason to limit vote-by-mail access. There is no good-faith reason to end the use of mail-in voting, or do the other things in this forthcoming executive order or his previous one attacking vote-by-mail. Just like the wave of redistricting efforts in Texas, Florida, and beyond -- this is a partisan voter suppression exercise meant to codify MAGA's power in perpetuity and end our democracy.
Opponents of voting rights will go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and stay in power. Help us fight back with $25 or whatever you can to protect mail-in voting and stop their suppressive policies >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=082025_2&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=082025_2&amount=20]

clean_body: The lies and attacks on vote-by-mail have only increased in the last 48 hours, Team. Trump's statement has brought all the usual anti-voting, anti-democracy suspects out of the woodwork to ramp up the falsehoods we've heard for years. But we've also seen defenders of voting rights standing up for our fundamental right to vote. We've just got to make sure our grassroots power can match their dark money millions and suppressive media empire. RUSH $25 or more right now to fuel our work in the states, in Congress, and in the courts to defend mail-in voting and make every vote count in our elections >> [] Voter Action Project [] ABC: Trump says he will lead 'movement' to end mail-in voting [] Our time in the barrel has come, Team . President Donald Trump said just hours ago that he will lead a "movement" to get rid of mail-in ballots and voting machines , falsely claiming that they lead to voter fraud. Word for lying word: " I am going to lead a movement to get rid of MAIL-IN BALLOTS, and also, while we're at it, Highly 'Inaccurate,' Very Expensive, and Seriously Controversial VOTING MACHINES, which cost Ten Times more than accurate and sophisticated Watermark Paper, which is faster, and leaves NO DOUBT, at the end of the evening, as to who WON, and who LOST, the Election. " How is Trump going to do this? He's signing an executive order ahead of next year's critical midterms. Is this just another attempt to distract from a failing economy, rising prices, and his role in the Epstein scandal? Probably, yes. Are we going to fight him tooth and nail? You betcha. We're going to work in the states to defend our access to cast ballots, as they run elections. We're going to petition members of Congress to stop harmful bills that might attempt to back up this executive order. And we're going to do everything we can to support the efforts to stop this in court. We'll be blunt: We still need your help to protect our fundamental right to vote. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to defend vote by mail across the country >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Trump has long lied about mail-in voting. He's claimed mail-in voting contributed to his 2020 election loss, though no widespread fraud has been found. In fact, the one case of mail-in ballot fraud in Pennsylvania after the 2020 election was a man who was prosecuted for returning his dead mother's ballot for Trump . We all know just how safe and secure mail-in voting is. It's use dates back to the Civil War. The use of mail-in voting has become very common across the country and study after study has shown that fraud in mail-ballot voting is rare. There are also several safeguards in place nationwide to protect against fraud, including signature requirements and barcodes to track envelopes sent by officials. States have spent tens of millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. Being blunt: There is no good-faith reason to limit vote-by-mail access. There is no good-faith reason to end the use of mail-in voting, or do the other things in this forthcoming executive order or his previous one attacking vote-by-mail. Just like the wave of redistricting efforts in Texas, Florida, and beyond -- this is a partisan voter suppression exercise meant to codify MAGA's power in perpetuity and end our democracy. Opponents of voting rights will go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and stay in power. Help us fight back with $25 or whatever you can to protect mail-in voting and stop their suppressive policies >> [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. Donald Trump and his Rubber Stamp Republicans are completely unhinged.
They’re running wild with a plot to rig the midterm elections by seizing Democratic seats in Texas.
But Democrats are fighting back by launching a powerful campaign to aggressively pursue fairer maps from coast to coast and ensure our victory.
**Our best hope for blocking Trump’s worst impulses is to take back the House majority.**
[_It will be an immense and expensive undertaking. Unlike our opponents, we’re not backed by billionaires. It will take every one of us stepping up to match their massive warchest. I’m calling for a historic fundraising day – 5,000 donations before midnight – to raise the resources we need to fight back, rush funds where they’re needed most and tear down Trump’s authoritarian schemes. Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats.

Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113696543/564632823/1662333048?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2EyYmQ0ZC0yNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yseGjx4wy8B_VHqqLY-JCuvuqPqCt3POD2VI0IsR6Z0=)** We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. **[We don’t want to lose you completely, so if you only want to receive our most important emails, please click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113696544/564632825/-175097923?source=footer&refcode=20250820_em_fr_rr1_jeffries_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2EyYmQ0ZC0yNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yseGjx4wy8B_VHqqLY-JCuvuqPqCt3POD2VI0IsR6Z0=&emci=3167c9c7-207e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=d7a2bd4d-247e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=21290350)** **[We hate to see you go, but if you want to unsubscribe, we understand. Gretchen Whitmer. I just wrapped up a conversation in Grand Blanc with Rep. Kristen McDonald Rivet and a room full of concerned Michigan families – many of them worried about how they’re going to make ends meet with prices still climbing. Kristen gets it – because she’s lived it. She’s a mom of six and a lifelong advocate for Michigan kids. From Head Start to the Michigan Dept. of Education, she’s spent her entire career fighting to make life better for working families. **Kristen brings the kind of real-world experience that’s missing in D.C.** She listens. She does the work. And she fights for the people who too often get left behind. That’s exactly why national Republicans have made her a top target – and why it’s so important that we have her back. Kristen’s seat could decide control of the House. And the GOP is already spending big to flip it – because they’d rather have someone who will rubber-stamp their agenda than someone who actually understands what Michigan families are going through. [**Every dollar makes a difference in this must-win race. Hey folks,
Katie Phang is BACK with me on _Endless Urgency_ , and this one is a must-watch. We dig into the Epstein file cover-up, the growing MAGA panic, and the high-stakes SCOTUS case that could upend same-sex marriage. Katie's legal insights are fire--and we don't hold back. Don't miss this.
* **[00:01:41]** DOJ delays the Epstein file release--Katie breaks down who's really calling the shots and why the stalling is pure gaslighting.
* **[00:07:52]** Where did the MAGA influencers go? We unpack the silence--and what it reveals about the unraveling Trump machine.
* **[00:13:06]** Katie names the name no one else is talking about: Alex Acosta. His role in Epstein's sweetheart deal and why his subpoena is a political no-go.
* **[00:27:08]** Is the Supreme Court coming for gay marriage? We talk through the Kim Davis case and what Clarence Thomas's signals could mean.
* **[00:33:36]** Power, corruption, and Democratic strategy--Katie and I get real about how we _must_ govern differently when we take back control.

**[We need a strong, Democratic community that's informed, unflinching, and ready to hold power accountable. That's what we're building here. name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: We must take a stand
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250820-1485-foote&t=1001&akid=1485%2E342411%2EbdF0Zj ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

A federal appeals court recently ruled that the Trump administration can
legally suspend or cancel billions of dollars in foreign aid — even though
Congress had already approved the funds.^1

About $10 billion in global health aid and lifesaving prevention and
treatment programs is at stake.^2

Let’s be clear: this isn’t just about foreign policy. It’s about unchecked
executive power overriding the will of the people — undermining the very
foundation of our democracy.

This is just the latest example of how the Trump administration is willing
to gut critical programs that save lives, support global stability, and
reflect our most basic democratic values.

We cannot stay silent while this administration continues to rule through
authoritarian actions. We must take a stand.

The Squad Victory Fund is fighting to build a democracy that works for
everyone — by supporting bold, progressive leaders, protecting critical
aid, and holding the Trump administration accountable for its relentless
abuse of power. But we need your help to do it.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250820-movement.8tMPpm&refcode=em20250820-1485&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1485%2E342411%2EbdF0Zj ]Will you chip in $3 today to help us fight back? Every
dollar goes toward backing our progressive leaders, fighting for change,
and pushing back against dangerous power grabs like this.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250820-movement.8tMPpm&refcode=em20250820-1485&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1485%2E342411%2EbdF0Zj ]Contribute ››

Thank you,

Squad Victory HQ

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

subject: Boil 'em, mash 'em, stick 'em in a stew
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Can't spell potato without Washington [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113696878/564651636/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjgzZDU0Yy0yYTdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gtdw-58HoX-YXb8t69_sUZ-qIRedJQfjLb_NSo6fG-w=&emci=327634a9-027e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=5f83d54c-2a7e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=15820338)
---
Yesterday was National Potato Day, Peter!

And here in Washington, we know a thing or two about potatoes.

**Our state grows over 23 percent of all potatoes in the U.S., making us the second-largest producer in the country.** From French fries to baked potatoes, _chances are you’ve enjoyed Washington-grown spuds!_

Potato farming isn't easy work. Rising costs, supply chain challenges, extreme weather, and trade barriers all make it harder for our farmers to thrive. That’s why Kim has been working around the clock in Congress to make sure Washington agriculture— _including our potato farmers_ —gets the support it needs.

Earlier this year, Kim introduced a bipartisan bill to boost programs that open up new markets around the world for Washington-grown products. These programs already help our apples, cherries, and wheat reach more customers, and they’ll help potatoes too! More exports mean more opportunities for our farmers and a stronger local economy.

[**To celebrate National Potato Day, let’s recommit to fighting for the farmers who feed us. If you believe in supporting local farmers and want to help Kim continue her work to improve Washington's agriculture, chip in $5, or anything you can today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113696879/564651637/-1487867385?refcode=em25_250820_natpot_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250820_natpot_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=5f83d54c-2a7e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjgzZDU0Yy0yYTdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gtdw-58HoX-YXb8t69_sUZ-qIRedJQfjLb_NSo6fG-w=) clean_body: Can't spell potato without Washington Yesterday was National Potato Day, Peter! And here in Washington, we know a thing or two about potatoes. Our state grows over 23 percent of all potatoes in the U.S., making us the second-largest producer in the country. From French fries to baked potatoes, chances are you’ve enjoyed Washington-grown spuds! Potato farming isn't easy work. Rising costs, supply chain challenges, extreme weather, and trade barriers all make it harder for our farmers to thrive. That’s why Kim has been working around the clock in Congress to make sure Washington agriculture— including our potato farmers —gets the support it needs. Earlier this year, Kim introduced a bipartisan bill to boost programs that open up new markets around the world for Washington-grown products. These programs already help our apples, cherries, and wheat reach more customers, and they’ll help potatoes too! More exports mean more opportunities for our farmers and a stronger local economy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. The Texas House just passed Trump's maps

$3.
That is the donation Gavin Newsom is asking you to make to help him pass the Election Rigging Response Act.
If you already understand how important it is that California nullify what Republicans are doing in Texas, please use this link to donate today:
[**https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/california-redistricting**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250820-3&refcode2=2482_4767699_PR78Qj&akid=2482%2E4767699%2EPR78Qj)
Otherwise, here's the big news:
**A short while ago, Texas House Republicans passed their new congressional maps. After months of threats and theatrics, it’s happening. Donald Trump asked them to find five seats that he was "entitled to" and they're doing it.**
The good news is, tomorrow California's legislature will vote to put our new, bluer maps on the ballot this November.
It will be a tough campaign. It will be expensive. We are talking about at least five House seats in the next three elections decided in one race.
Ballots will drop here in California in a few weeks. So with Texas Republicans acting today, we are asking you to do the same.
[**Please use this link to contribute $3 to Gavin Newsom's ballot measure committee to help us pass the Election Rigging Response Act. We are looking for a HUGE number of donations today in response to Republicans passing their maps in Texas.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250820-3&refcode2=2482_4767699_PR78Qj&akid=2482%2E4767699%2EPR78Qj)

**CLIFF 'S NOTE: **Sorry for the delay in sending today. As I explained in my earlier piece, we have a kid headed to college, so life's a bit nuts around here.
* * *
### _**Corporate media rigs our system. With Soundcheck Fund grants for independent media, we un-rig it. But we NEED YOUR SUPPORT with Paid Subscriptions to do it**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.OXo3O8eQB_KFUaFh98GZkLCt9KxqiZ1V9Fr03Wh01Uc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=171513895)
* * *
**Today we have David 's video for you above**--it's brilliant. Watch it! It covers Trump's faculties (_" we have an ocean separating us, a thing called, an ocean"_), which are headed in the polar opposite direction as his pants. David also shares Trump's nuanced views on slavery.
It seems much like in Charlottesville, _there are good people on both sides_.
**Another programing note: We are going to send out my column tomorrow** , as there won't be an "Amped Up." Again, kid going to college. But tonight, we have a transcript of our recent interview with former congressional candidate and friend, Dr. Geoffrey Grammer.
Geoff's a former colonel in the U.S. Army, and a decorated psychiatrist who's treated soldiers at Walter Reed. He talked to us about the frightening psychology of the new ICE recruits of Trump's. Following are some crucial and concerning parts of the transcript:
* * *
### TRANSCRIPT
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e0b9b1c4-d805-450c-9f59-0163bf56fd5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Dr. Grammer:** We haven't had anything like this in my lifetime and in historical memory in this country. ICE is just one aspect of what is becoming emblematic of our lives in America. I cannot think of a time in history that dehumanizing entire populations resulted in anything good, right?
That is a path to descent, to suffering and pain.
Within ICE, what we've seen is this sadistic cruelty. There are ways that you can detain people, and law enforcement practices and drills it. And they have rules and oversight if it's not followed.
[Wearing masks and sunglasses and baseball caps with no name badges](https://substack.com/redirect/1861d5f9-66ae-4921-9e4f-ac805d88f05f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), no badge numbers, jumping out of an unmarked vehicle, [throwing some to the ground because of their skin color ](https://substack.com/redirect/94c6d766-d9f6-4fdf-98f2-26f6b39233d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)or because of their accent--and no other evidence but that--and throwing them in the van and taking them to God knows where--this is not normal.
What I wrote about in the piece [in Salon] is we are all witnessing these horrific videos of cruelty, kids crying in the background. I don't know if you all saw recently, but there was one where they literally pulled a guy out of his car with his kid in the back seat, broke the window.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.OXo3O8eQB_KFUaFh98GZkLCt9KxqiZ1V9Fr03Wh01Uc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=171513895)
We make decisions for a lot of reasons, but mainly two major ways: either to alleviate anxiety or to receive reward, **and the next generation of ICE agents are going to be drawn to the role** , almost certainly not to alleviate anxiety.
**But[the reward they're looking for, is to participate in the sadistic cruelty](https://substack.com/redirect/a4d5439c-74ae-4bc9-8350-487667c33bd9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that is on TV now.**
Historically, law enforcement attracts people who want to help their communities, want to help their country, whether we agree with some of the stuff that happens or not. Those are honorable initiatives for many of them, not all, but many.
**But now someone who joins, that's not the recruiting video anymore. You get to participate[in the dominance of other people](https://substack.com/redirect/71bc0e36-4855-4cd2-8992-906082b4dc9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in a cruel way, [and someone says, "I want to do that."](https://substack.com/redirect/27df1404-16c5-4cfe-b160-abf7f4497cf5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ What is that person going to be like?](https://substack.com/redirect/27df1404-16c5-4cfe-b160-abf7f4497cf5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Are they going to uphold the laws of the Constitution? Are they going to uphold the directives of an autocrat?
Someone who enjoys that is very deviant from the typical person, right?
And when push comes to shove, **if Donald Trump one day wants to flip that switch and move ICE from detaining people they think need to be detained into[his own private security force to suppress dissent](https://substack.com/redirect/08aa61a4-2bda-4451-94c9-356b98aeee5c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), these are people more likely to follow Trump than the Constitution.** '
That is something we should all be afraid of, whether you're a citizen, a legal immigrant or an undocumented immigrant.
This is why I think we need checks and balances. At any given point in time, 1-2% of the population is going to have antisocial or criminal-like tendencies. That's just population-based stuff.
When we start to create organizations with unchecked power where we self-select people with that personality style it becomes self-reinforcing.
You can listen to more of Dr. Grammer's important--and harrowing--analysis [here](https://substack.com/@geoffreygrammermd).
* * *

| | Friend, mark your calendar. **August 29th isn’t just another day in Salem – it’s the day Oregonians rise up.** Tina Kotek is calling a special session to **RAM THROUGH** her gas tax scam, and if she wins, it opens the floodgates to endless new taxes.
This is more than a rally. It’s a **TAX REVOLT.** **Next Friday, we’ll pack the Capitol steps with a wall of Oregonians – one voice so loud that even Kotek can’t ignore it:** **NO. NEW. TAXES.** _This is our line in the sand._ Our moment to show Oregon and the nation that hardworking families will **NOT** be squeezed dry to bankroll the Left’s radical agenda. * **TOP NEWS**

**" Texas House approves GOP congressional map after two-week delay from Democrats' walkout," **Texas Tribune's**Kayla Guo** and**Alejandro Serrano** \-- "The Republican-led Texas House on Wednesday approved a new congressional map crafted to hand five additional U.S. House seats to the GOP over fierce opposition from Democrats, who cast the plan as a racially discriminatory attempt by President **Donald Trump** to stack the deck in next year's midterm election.

The House adopted the map, 88 to 52, along party lines. A Senate panel advanced a similar map Sunday, and the full chamber was expected to send the new lines to Gov. **Greg Abbott 's **desk later this week.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/93ef0860-f2d8-4886-9c76-40e966c77c2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Republican lawmakers are pursuing the unusual mid-decade redistricting plan, which has set off a national map-drawing war, amid pressure from Trump to protect the GOP's slim majority in Congress. The effort comes just four years after the Legislature last overhauled the state's congressional map following the 2020 Census.

Democrats in the Texas House staged a two-week walkout over the plan in a bid to stall the map's passage and rally a national response among blue states, where lawmakers could launch their own retaliatory redistricting efforts. The roughly two dozen Texas Democrats who returned to Austin on Monday said they were starting the next phase of their fight: putting the screws on their Republican colleagues and establishing a record that could be used in a legal challenge to the map.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/93ef0860-f2d8-4886-9c76-40e966c77c2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Republicans have said the new districts were drawn purely to maximize their partisan advantage, arguing that the GOP's margins of victory in 2024 supported new lines that entrenched their hold on power. They have also framed the effort as a response to Democratic gerrymandering elsewhere.

Rep. **Todd Hunter** , R-Corpus Christi and the map's sponsor, emphasized in laying out [House Bill 4](https://substack.com/redirect/acbfc6d0-1433-4940-afd2-50ca39b76843?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that Republicans were legally permitted to pursue redistricting in the middle of the decade and to maximize partisan gain.

"Redistricting can be done at any point in time," he said. "The underlying goal of this plan is straightforward: improve Republican political performance."

To create up to five Republican pickup opportunities, the map dismantles Democratic strongholds around Austin, Dallas and Houston and makes Democrat-held seats in South Texas redder -- all without seriously jeopardizing any of the 25 districts Republicans already control. The proposed map also would [push a handful of Democratic](https://substack.com/redirect/8edff3b5-bece-42ce-8b23-576fcd76d5dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) members of Congress into seats already represented by other Democrats, setting up possible [primary battles](https://substack.com/redirect/15955a4f-d228-4559-8772-af7eec1eca37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) between long-serving members of the Texas delegation and younger newcomers.

The U.S. Supreme Court ruled in 2019 that states can draw electoral maps on partisan grounds. But under Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act, the map cannot diminish the voting power of people of color." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/912ee881-061c-4656-ade6-059fa1bc57fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**" El Paso judge blocks Ken Paxton from taking legal action against Beto O'Rourke's political group," **Texas Tribune's**Alejandro Serrano** \-- "An El Paso judge this week temporarily stopped Attorney General**Ken Paxton** from prosecuting former U.S. Rep.**Beto O 'Rourke's **political group, Powered by People, after Paxton moved to block the organization from financially supporting Texas Democrats who left the state.

Judge**Annabell Perez** of the 41st Judicial District Court issued [a temporary restraining order](https://substack.com/redirect/f7ef4be8-c886-45b6-8b74-d4856154fb87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Tuesday barring Paxton from prosecuting O'Rourke's nonprofit or otherwise initiating or filing legal proceedings aimed at revoking Powered by People's charter.

The group has been fundraising for Texas Democrats who decamped to Illinois and other states in protest of a proposed GOP congressional map that would net Republicans up to five more seats in the U.S. House.

Powered by People [already donated $1 million to the Democrats](https://substack.com/redirect/d89d2e73-6154-401f-b741-7bb7294d2007?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), whose two-week absence denied the Texas House the minimum number of present members needed to conduct business. Many of those Democrats have since returned to the state, and Gov. **Greg Abbott** called a subsequent overtime legislative session after the first one ended last week.

Paxton previously [secured a temporary injunction](https://substack.com/redirect/b68484c6-f312-4aae-a7dc-cca19da1c403?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) blocking O'Rourke from fundraising for the Democrats or spending money to cover their expenses. He then [sought to jail O'Rourke](https://substack.com/redirect/9f34e848-0b44-4669-b250-16219c978492?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), arguing that the El Paso Democrat had violated the court order, which O'Rourke's attorneys have disputed.

O'Rourke responded by filing his own lawsuit alleging that Paxton was engaging in a "fishing expedition, constitutional rights be damned," by targeting Powered by People.

The group was a top funder covering the costs of Democrats' travel out of the state. The absconding members were on the hook for lodging, meals, travel and the $500-per-day fines accrued each day of the session they missed." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/e620b22c-c683-4c19-9940-f2c70e305fef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

TOP NEWS " Texas House approves GOP congressional map after two-week delay from Democrats' walkout," Texas Tribune'sKayla Guo andAlejandro Serrano \-- "The Republican-led Texas House on Wednesday approved a new congressional map crafted to hand five additional U.S. House seats to the GOP over fierce opposition from Democrats, who cast the plan as a racially discriminatory attempt by President Donald Trump to stack the deck in next year's midterm election. The House adopted the map, 88 to 52, along party lines. A Senate panel advanced a similar map Sunday, and the full chamber was expected to send the new lines to Gov. Greg Abbott 's desk later this week. Republican lawmakers are pursuing the unusual mid-decade redistricting plan, which has set off a national map-drawing war, amid pressure from Trump to protect the GOP's slim majority in Congress. The effort comes just four years after the Legislature last overhauled the state's congressional map following the 2020 Census. Democrats in the Texas House staged a two-week walkout over the plan in a bid to stall the map's passage and rally a national response among blue states, where lawmakers could launch their own retaliatory redistricting efforts. The roughly two dozen Texas Democrats who returned to Austin on Monday said they were starting the next phase of their fight: putting the screws on their Republican colleagues and establishing a record that could be used in a legal challenge to the map. Republicans have said the new districts were drawn purely to maximize their partisan advantage, arguing that the GOP's margins of victory in 2024 supported new lines that entrenched their hold on power. They have also framed the effort as a response to Democratic gerrymandering elsewhere. Rep. Todd Hunter , R-Corpus Christi and the map's sponsor, emphasized in laying out that Republicans were legally permitted to pursue redistricting in the middle of the decade and to maximize partisan gain. "Redistricting can be done at any point in time," he said. "The underlying goal of this plan is straightforward: improve Republican political performance." To create up to five Republican pickup opportunities, the map dismantles Democratic strongholds around Austin, Dallas and Houston and makes Democrat-held seats in South Texas redder -- all without seriously jeopardizing any of the 25 districts Republicans already control. The proposed map also would members of Congress into seats already represented by other Democrats, setting up possible between long-serving members of the Texas delegation and younger newcomers. The U.S. Supreme Court ruled in 2019 that states can draw electoral maps on partisan grounds. But under Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act, the map cannot diminish the voting power of people of color." " El Paso judge blocks Ken Paxton from taking legal action against Beto O'Rourke's political group," Texas Tribune'sAlejandro Serrano \-- "An El Paso judge this week temporarily stopped Attorney GeneralKen Paxton from prosecuting former U.S. Rep.Beto O 'Rourke's political group, Powered by People, after Paxton moved to block the organization from financially supporting Texas Democrats who left the state. JudgeAnnabell Perez of the 41st Judicial District Court issued Tuesday barring Paxton from prosecuting O'Rourke's nonprofit or otherwise initiating or filing legal proceedings aimed at revoking Powered by People's charter. The group has been fundraising for Texas Democrats who decamped to Illinois and other states in protest of a proposed GOP congressional map that would net Republicans up to five more seats in the U.S. House. Powered by People , whose two-week absence denied the Texas House the minimum number of present members needed to conduct business. Many of those Democrats have since returned to the state, and Gov. Greg Abbott called a subsequent overtime legislative session after the first one ended last week. Paxton previously blocking O'Rourke from fundraising for the Democrats or spending money to cover their expenses. He then , arguing that the El Paso Democrat had violated the court order, which O'Rourke's attorneys have disputed. O'Rourke responded by filing his own lawsuit alleging that Paxton was engaging in a "fishing expedition, constitutional rights be damned," by targeting Powered by People. The group was a top funder covering the costs of Democrats' travel out of the state. The absconding members were on the hook for lodging, meals, travel and the $500-per-day fines accrued each day of the session they missed." name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmh7ac1argdi5c4r2ssdjuo6e6s51st2514b3vrg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm0ob1chh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc9ruvbq4ajb0c239jg594407pldqc7937l3vk00_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm0ob1chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z28n3728unjie6euam2uba0te4gnfa0pbo78up8g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm0ob1chh2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4e49l78lfdtesp1lnflrm9fpli0g6dbrvge2sv8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm0ob1chh2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7kgaujo6it4m90ahgmb85hd60j5ajhv2d2spba8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm0ob1cdh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf4qb2upmo46lt2hs0uf8j3qjrp1ihf6qh0u20m8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm0ob1cdh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu6pbtq6g4df7ujetcp2nvvl5a77egf8ok2c5abg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm0ob1cdh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3qb2q53ga5hu6o2bl725r9472snst6750c6bok8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm0ob1cdh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zat5hh5o3ttk8g0mbabgodlgidkvblsdghhivvug_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm0ob1cdh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpbked7t2jl3m675sqarmtp0b0qu0oklbci8jm88_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm0ob1cdh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z21dsnaa836uvk1rrr03fogm9cust7udqlbm5p50_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm0ob1cdh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbp39tj97fcatdu9km6n52fsov5b616g0306kj2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm0ob1cdh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

name: Thomas Massie
subject: Friend, I only reach out like this when I must
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Thomas Massie for CongressPO BOX 72821 NEWPORT, KY 41072
body:
I wish I were reaching out today with better news.

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7gp8udf1oj3euds8sstqiegvg6d1cga0nm153qg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm8pj4clh2bs)
---
Friend – I wish I were reaching out today with better news. _I know you don’t hear from me often, so please know that when I make a plea like this, it really is necessary._ The super PAC that pledged to spend their entire war chest to defeat me just spent _**$1 MILLION**_ on a MEGA ad buy to crush my re-election campaign. The neocon establishment has put a bounty on my head because I won’t support foreign wars and won’t vote to continue letting our national debt SPIRAL out of control. _I wish I could be more optimistic, but this is just the beginning of what is a declaration of_** _ALL-OUT WAR_** _on me and those who support me... _ _**_[And if I don’t pick up my fundraising efforts immediately, I'll be severely outmanned and outgunned. Because of this, what was just another end-of-quarter deadline has now become the biggest, most crucial deadline I’ve ever faced.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zd8jmuuopigr1khr5kdh2113n11e0qfqkfmvrvqo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm8pj4clh2bs)_**_ Look, my least favorite part of my job is asking generous folks like you to sacrifice your hard-earned cash. That’s why I do it so rarely.** ** _**[I wouldn’t be asking for your help right now if it weren’t absolutely vital.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zp4rm7k68tpgt3nnmg89dqfe4rcki41vt02o3710_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm8pj4clh2bs)**_ **But this isn’t an enemy I can take lightly. This is the most powerful political apparatus in America, sitting on a massive $500 MILLION war chest.** Their smear campaign says I sided with a foreign country. Friend, the truth is, I sided with you. I didn't pledge my allegiance to my party or any of the Swamp creatures in D.C. I pledged to protect the Constitution at all costs and to keep my promises to the American people. **_They can’t stomach my presence in Washington because I'm a constant reminder of the promises they are BREAKING!_** They’re prepared to flood my race with immense sums of out-of-state cash to drag my name through the mud until they’ve BANISHED me from Washington for good. [_**So can I count on your support to help me stand strong against the full force of the neocon establishment?**_](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvcumb2q3ai525mq0q7o4i8p8lkeg3oc2sgs2m7o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm8pj4clh2bs) **Friend, I keep my promises. You have my word that I will NEVER back down. ** Sincerely, Thomas Massie

clean_body: I wish I were reaching out today with better news. | | | Friend – I wish I were reaching out today with better news. I know you don’t hear from me often, so please know that when I make a plea like this, it really is necessary. The super PAC that pledged to spend their entire war chest to defeat me just spent $1 MILLION on a MEGA ad buy to crush my re-election campaign. The neocon establishment has put a bounty on my head because I won’t support foreign wars and won’t vote to continue letting our national debt SPIRAL out of control. I wish I could be more optimistic, but this is just the beginning of what is a declaration of ALL-OUT WAR on me and those who support me... Look, my least favorite part of my job is asking generous folks like you to sacrifice your hard-earned cash. That’s why I do it so rarely. But this isn’t an enemy I can take lightly. This is the most powerful political apparatus in America, sitting on a massive $500 MILLION war chest. Their smear campaign says I sided with a foreign country. Friend, the truth is, I sided with you. I didn't pledge my allegiance to my party or any of the Swamp creatures in D.C. I pledged to protect the Constitution at all costs and to keep my promises to the American people. They can’t stomach my presence in Washington because I'm a constant reminder of the promises they are BREAKING! They’re prepared to flood my race with immense sums of out-of-state cash to drag my name through the mud until they’ve BANISHED me from Washington for good. Friend, I keep my promises. You have my word that I will NEVER back down. Sincerely, Thomas Massie | | | Paid for by Thomas Massie for CongressPO BOX 72821 NEWPORT, KY 41072 | Pop Acta Media | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztug1g5lcqk7uh7gohbn569t4jiqtb2e3htlva8g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm8pj4clh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z18vvifq6ou9qarhecn94kjs1lr07ibcctd8mf4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm8pj4clh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfo6sh2ovasa0k4omkbvgkr341a5vu1gve54a4o0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm8pj4clh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4m96lemuu7pelkg53frqa6299u091ba1arp5n3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm8pj4clh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zadbqola9gfdklo8vsiog4lukb0mrc7gvamnpk18_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm8pj4clh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z386ik47clv7u28gpq7sk1l278o9bcrk8snjqrc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm8pj4clh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhc1pstq4dc5e5ibhcjnpcn3cmrbql4r8qnl1m30_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm8pj4clh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1tbnifeocf4dub815ls9m90vp9suaem28ea2tvo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm8pj4clh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqronbfqihncsgmrf4451oe0q88dohma3t2douro_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm8pj4clh2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2im8il931vvr3kb1qcpa3nejv01vf6lnmfd5oq0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm8pj2cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbioem5jqordptqihj6vh8c9lnlir2ojte2j5pd0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm8pj2cph2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq4bp3l70he8lgvg3g78r6l3vlipeg648tojhei8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm8pj2cph2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7vmpnq9d7cgc5gsbms00th3iq4h55uu9nmv40b0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm8pj2cph2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---

body:

name: Thomas Massie
subject: Friend, I only reach out like this when I must
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Thomas Massie for CongressPO BOX 72821 NEWPORT, KY 41072
body:
I wish I were reaching out today with better news.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z28ig69uo03cpv3lakc59fr8qnd5mc2sfhj1lk1g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm2o31chh2bs)
---
Friend – I wish I were reaching out today with better news. _I know you don’t hear from me often, so please know that when I make a plea like this, it really is necessary._ The super PAC that pledged to spend their entire war chest to defeat me just spent _**$1 MILLION**_ on a MEGA ad buy to crush my re-election campaign. The neocon establishment has put a bounty on my head because I won’t support foreign wars and won’t vote to continue letting our national debt SPIRAL out of control. _I wish I could be more optimistic, but this is just the beginning of what is a declaration of_** _ALL-OUT WAR_** _on me and those who support me... _ _**_[And if I don’t pick up my fundraising efforts immediately, I'll be severely outmanned and outgunned. Because of this, what was just another end-of-quarter deadline has now become the biggest, most crucial deadline I’ve ever faced.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvfd8n1862h87bocq3dmg6noapqdeb3649t2goug_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm2o31chh2bs)_**_ Look, my least favorite part of my job is asking generous folks like you to sacrifice your hard-earned cash. That’s why I do it so rarely.** ** _**[I wouldn’t be asking for your help right now if it weren’t absolutely vital.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znccfsme879t4tbus93dcktdgg3ri0gvn3rvvnp8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm2o31chh2bs)**_ **But this isn’t an enemy I can take lightly. This is the most powerful political apparatus in America, sitting on a massive $500 MILLION war chest.** Their smear campaign says I sided with a foreign country. Friend, the truth is, I sided with you. I didn't pledge my allegiance to my party or any of the Swamp creatures in D.C. I pledged to protect the Constitution at all costs and to keep my promises to the American people. **_They can’t stomach my presence in Washington because I'm a constant reminder of the promises they are BREAKING!_** They’re prepared to flood my race with immense sums of out-of-state cash to drag my name through the mud until they’ve BANISHED me from Washington for good. [_**So can I count on your support to help me stand strong against the full force of the neocon establishment?**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5d7mpj5gvlro05gfu0nie4h5dgd6hnl36a85lq0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5ctjm2o31chh2bs) **Friend, I keep my promises. You have my word that I will NEVER back down. ** Sincerely, Thomas Massie
---

# Thursday, August 21, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1959, President Dwight D. Eisenhower signed a proclamation making Hawaii the 50th state and ordered a new American flag with 50 stars arranged in staggered rows. This flag was officially adopted on July 4, 1960. [See the proclamation signed here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uwyAUAODT4C0WPH47MLSqvKVLpXZE2DxiImwiwIly-6q9Qi_wDd_32Z19ymm_fPgNbY_F7fhoGXvH6nbfS1uq3-aM7Yq9HQ3D4mtzQEGeqDkBc8Gn_HRiCDYiAvIBLdNSak0NZcNqkc-MsRdU1DMtJBi5SKWFkkFFiFQMyf5q1ABjlCpBRyN5BKa1MZzBvCgiKIbUSx2vJe19xZif5Y51XMo2ZLv2fmuEvxKYCEzPcvRjnJHA9HX7VG_z487ZhfApou9HRcLf2-orhqHacHuknFNTmgh62XzKf2T_18Pdwk8AAAD__w-Vb98). In today’s _Throwback Thursday_ , we highlight Taylor Swift’s new album, which will also be [released on cassette](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OqzAQxfGnMR2RPXzYFC5uQ5fbbokMjBNnBxx5JkF5-xX7Clsf6Sed_9d1uoZEab_9Dxt6iXna8WBCESzTHiTzUsI2E_IDhV-M6xIKT6Chq7WrwUxrSPSZ2mr1ERGwqdAb23XWaqdNdfemd2BiD3EYhujcOs_9gq0FaCAaO-gq-VPTDozRum_1xXVNBGOtc42BeelVq3FNksvlkdMud4z0yW8slyVvFfm7yJNV80_BqGA02nbfOVPczlnBKOFDudR8pChc73jUgebXVi-B-bypYKyKX59HIkrcW9Xq2xYS_erypyRvDz8BAAD__3NFdKc), a nod to the growing trend among young people embracing music in a tactile, non-digital way. Did you ever have a cassette collection, and would you want to bring it back? Reply to let us know. Later today, we will email you on behalf of our partner, [Brad's Deals](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGu2yAQRb8G7xzBEMBZsKgUefe67RJNYOLwBNgP8LPy95WrSv2Abmeuju49vz7cB8YUy_ITM9n-XF2hoyXqnaor2NfmK-ZHovZJve2NgsfaHHBQI59GEC5gTG93HYJ9EgHJgawwShnDJy6Gl-X-dgNNmoJGhAfxm9RqQqW4MQZBD9GeND6BEJzrK79MSj5BGDNNUsDDa3blFGJf6-VzjaW_6Jne6zfVi1_zkOyr960x-YPBzGA-juPyqBhaIEztjDCY0X8xmBOWEMvC5Lz37Nq6V09M3v8Bx9CRgT6_mULcM5P3ENuW8P337DFvGJfC5H2hQhXTiP7rNCH0eM5goL2Lgcm74DdQQ7VhO2JKsWnDrnzJGNOf3v2_ZH9b-B0AAP__cuuSQQ), with a free and personalized way to discover the best prices on top brands like Nike, Hoka, Amazon, and more, curated daily by real-life deal experts. We have a pre-IPO investment opportunity for _The Flyover_ readers today from [Immersed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLEO2yAQQL8Gb7bgMIaFoVKULV07IgLn-CKwLcCJ8veV06o_0PXe093p_bq5m6dE6-Onz2jbvLkV3zVha1jc6ttWQ_H5nrA-sdWjYgy-VAccVM9ND8JFT-njxi7aGRFQdmiFVkprbrjoFqs8CM9nY2SQ93GeQMHIZZQw6gmmIDqy5zZuQAjOp5EPRskZhNbGSAH3MLGRY6S2leG50doWnNNne2EZwpa7ZJfW9srkDwZXBldaX1jbQDljqRhP5wTyerTs6naUgExeMHtKDKZzmDHSkZm87J5iv_vSVix1of0vDz7vnh7r1_gHheG9VNL9iSCVkqC1UUZ3xcb9TSlRnTQb-eM89X21_Vffl4XfAQAA__-G3o1o), which specializes in extended reality technology.
