## Russian Drones Trigger NATO Jet Scramble
Russia launched 93 drones and two ballistic missiles into Ukraine near NATO's border late Tuesday, striking near the Danube River and prompting [NATO to scramble two German fighter jets](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGK3DAQxvGnkTst0theqVERCIYUlzalGUvj9Vxk6ZDmbtm3Dw7kCVIP_Jnf9-ttfUPOXB4_8aQge10LPXsmEWprQak9Njy3TP2dpH92ShFbX8HArI3XYNeEnF_rNKSwEwGNAwXr5tk5440djgAOER3uMW4Gp81PcfbzPEXwxt53dAOHq2Y8WGvMfTI3P487WOe8Hy1s8a4mQ4mlttt75SIH7flVv6jdYj2HHA6Rj67GbwoWBQtu8RLcHvU6K1h-FKFWULgWzAqWC6WRW2y4i_7HSxpPTvrKFn4cottn74xFp1YL6S6Nf1NXsHSp7aXGhZMav1uYvDF-hKGF9PHknLnfnZrM40TOf_-T_xr1K8CfAAAA___qo4zi) from a base in Romania. Romania, a NATO member, confirmed its [airspace wasn’t breached](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAQBuCnsTesA2ObDgxdsqVrR-tijpgUQ3SQuHn7yh36Al3vpF__93-e5zOGGNL1Azey1ec50V4i1Uo8J6y5LIzbJVK5US2PQm5BLrMCNQgwQsnZYYivWbfOeiJFfUtWTsMwTWBAtqtVfhhkLxEMgpRv3ulRAwzkek2gJt0Ge6SBUVICjBo6M_ReyWkyppfqsoyNBnKhZu5uOaS6ko-v_CTulry10a613kvTvzfq1KjTvu-dz9-H4vgfl8zRNep0aMQfR-zI94iJiuBHKQHFGmoRiZAF5w1TwCQumR2xeHwxhkQtW3ffQ4yhjFOj4bphiL8l6r-We1r1EwAA__8OZIRu), but nearby Ukrainian port facilities in Izmail were hit, injuring at least one and sparking fires. The barrage, one of August’s largest, came just days after peace talks between Trump, Zelensky, and European leaders. Ukrainian President [Zelensky called for tougher sanctions](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL8GMpDdYOwJHFxCNpdeiBq7PXhk8MjuGzR_v2Kl_YLNSirpqV79uy93jCkej7-4k-WQl4POmoiZynIg5-oK7mui-iSu_yt5h6UuIEB1wnQgF48xfZax9TYQAQ0tWamV0loYIdvN-tt6C2YIE6EbJQZS0ms3qtUpWoFUG-1FEwakFGIaRW_UEEBqbcwgYXVTMwrykXPpnzkevFFIn_ym0ru8t8luzK_aDH8amBuYz_PsP7jlfLUNzJdOAzMWji7RFS-rDmNxBQN3P36-wz367uIe8bFxJ7QahISb6TfeU1usf50xpVgn3YzisWNM3wP4V6-9LXwFAAD__8eTgjQ) and stronger security guarantees as Russian attacks continue.
## Erin Spurs Evacuations, Beach Closures
Hurricane Erin was a [Category 2 storm on Wednesday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkb2K5DAQhJ9GzjToZ2xrAwdzHE6OPQ4u2NBo5LbdiywN3T1j9u0P3yts0sHXRUFVfbxP7xEzlvV33GGQpU4FDs4gAjSVKJUTxf2egT9B-Mkwp0g8OeNabYJ2dpoj5q_p2szDAuDANzDYvm373gRjm20I_s06l8wdOn9tg02tWwC6PvjUwvLmGxxONxOctcZ0V3MJrV-c7fsQvHX31KmrgRml0uWzYpENlvxVX0CXVPcmD5vIg5W_KTcqNx7Hcdm5nD_lRij6ySeFKBuQcqPUB0slhBNvTyJMsYAGwqKFcF2BWJ-KXccMJKyx6KKTfiGtWDDqyJrrDhoii071vHeIaQPWvD1FuTGSvt3srz8fcFN-rAln5X_-OEuGg_8CPRoa5seBOSN3vbqadY-Y_8eRb23wGty_AAAA__-UlZ2F), churning off the East Coast with 105 mph winds and triggering evacuations in North Carolina’s Outer Banks. Though not expected to make landfall, the storm forced beach closures from the Carolinas to New York due to 15-foot waves, flooding, and life-threatening rip currents. [Watch a video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuqzAUxvGnMVvQ8TFgZ_BwdVu2dOjSERlzHBwZHOGT0Lx9RV-h6_dJv-H_dRkuLqa4Xj_cQpZDHlbaSyJm2obVcS5-c8uYqNyIy6PQ5N1WBgRsT2BOKIfJxfQammqygQhJVWSlblutwYCsZhta5yfQRP6M6KEbFYS2obMK5Bx4WUV7aGBQSoCugdq0KqDU2hglcfSdaICmyHmrbzmuPFNIr_ykrfZ5qZKdme9FqH8Ce4H9vu_1Kz_4MdLxH4tjPwvVP4V6u7__72_f4ycVU212uu8xpVg6LRq4Li6mX5L_1OFp8ScAAP__fqZxhQ). [A state of emergency](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OwyAUhE-DO6LH8w-koNjGXbbd0sLmEZPFEAFO5NuvnCtsN9JoPs3Mz226GR98vH-bjXR1aYr0LoFqpTxFU1NZstnmQOVBteyF7GJymRCw56A4iskaH46pa6x2REhtQ1rIvpcSFIhm1VYoad187XoYaHC0zGDc1UgC0bu-mxuvTxooFAJg6OCi-tahkFKpVuC8DKwDsr6mfHkkH-tKLhzpRfmypK0Jeq31WVj7xXBkOMbjmUo9LYbjCWY4gvpohuNe-LmP4bjuOfvFROKUfeRl3WvhNr0jn8ksKxXuctq4Cyl7a3hNZ5AfKf8yHJus7fPtQ_BlkKyD-2Z8-NSp__rwpfEvAAD__3U_hYY) was declared in North Carolina, while Virginia is under a tropical storm watch, and storm alerts stretched as far north as Delaware. Forecasters warned that Erin could shift in size and strength and become a Category 3 hurricane as it tracks between the U.S. East Coast and Bermuda. [Follow live updates here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFvwyAUBOBfgzdb8LANGRgqVd7Spao6Whge8YuwiYAkyr-v3LFr50-60933eT5birRfPuyGpoY07_gsEWvFPO-2puKy3ZaI5Yq13At6Z3OZgcPQct2CmL2l-Jr7xpuACCgbNEINg1Jcc9GsRssBtB4cV8tJKi6E53zsTwHDAA4DNmSONK5BiEN4pwcZQCiltRSwuJH1HD3VlLtror2uGOIrPTB3Lm1NNGutt8LkG4OJwWQXdyzoLulgBtPXJ4Mp0gPb-83bioXBtN5zJmd3bDHT3v5RJifyTL4L6DWHUckmG397UoxURsV6ftksxd_2-q_LHgZ-AgAA___tGH3e).
## Chart: What’s the Magic Number to Retire?
Americans say they’ll need about [$1.1 million on average to retire](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuOgzAQAL_GdEb28jApXFxDl2uvRBuzwEa2QbYDyt-fcr9w_WhGmp_7dEf2HNdvDGTLsk-RruypFEpTxLJnlzA8POUnlfzKNDtMeQIFnVSDBD3NyP49tdVsFyKgpiKrTdcZowalq80C9A202vW6xf6GMM-DUUob1M64Xt8qth-bGkBrpfpW1UPXLKCNGYZGw8P1olU0c9lT_dw5lo0W_95PSrXbQ-XtVsqRRfMlYBQwXtdVn5xf6B0eXNBzLh9QwJgPASOFQ2mZqHCiQLHIjCfHNctE6DaOqywbyYArOxlf4UFJwFglOx8Xe8-5N6JVa0D2f_nyr2enhd8AAAD__4zNgSM), but most expect to save only a quarter of that before leaving the workforce. Folks in the Midwest have the lowest target at $860,000, while those in the West aim highest at $1.2 million. Generation X faces the steepest gap, expecting to save just $250,000 against a $1.2 million retirement goal. About half of workers want to be automatically enrolled in retirement plans through their jobs, and a third say they wouldn’t have started saving at all without one. clean_body: Russia launched 93 drones and two ballistic missiles into Ukraine near NATO's border late Tuesday, striking near the Danube River and prompting from a base in Romania. | | | | | | Thursday, August 21, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1959, President Dwight D. Eisenhower signed a proclamation making Hawaii the 50th state and ordered a new American flag with 50 stars arranged in staggered rows. This flag was officially adopted on July 4, 1960. . In today’s Throwback Thursday , we highlight Taylor Swift’s new album, which will also be , a nod to the growing trend among young people embracing music in a tactile, non-digital way. Did you ever have a cassette collection, and would you want to bring it back? Reply to let us know. Later today, we will email you on behalf of our partner, , with a free and personalized way to discover the best prices on top brands like Nike, Hoka, Amazon, and more, curated daily by real-life deal experts. We have a pre-IPO investment opportunity for The Flyover readers today from , which specializes in extended reality technology. | Russian Drones Trigger NATO Jet Scramble Russia launched 93 drones and two ballistic missiles into Ukraine near NATO's border late Tuesday, striking near the Danube River and prompting from a base in Romania. Romania, a NATO member, confirmed its , but nearby Ukrainian port facilities in Izmail were hit, injuring at least one and sparking fires. The barrage, one of August’s largest, came just days after peace talks between Trump, Zelensky, and European leaders. Ukrainian President and stronger security guarantees as Russian attacks continue. Erin Spurs Evacuations, Beach Closures Hurricane Erin was a , churning off the East Coast with 105 mph winds and triggering evacuations in North Carolina’s Outer Banks. Though not expected to make landfall, the storm forced beach closures from the Carolinas to New York due to 15-foot waves, flooding, and life-threatening rip currents. . was declared in North Carolina, while Virginia is under a tropical storm watch, and storm alerts stretched as far north as Delaware. Forecasters warned that Erin could shift in size and strength and become a Category 3 hurricane as it tracks between the U.S. East Coast and Bermuda. . Chart: What’s the Magic Number to Retire? Americans say they’ll need about , but most expect to save only a quarter of that before leaving the workforce. Folks in the Midwest have the lowest target at $860,000, while those in the West aim highest at $1.2 million. Generation X faces the steepest gap, expecting to save just $250,000 against a $1.2 million retirement goal. About half of workers want to be automatically enrolled in retirement plans through their jobs, and a third say they wouldn’t have started saving at all without one. . During the hours-long debate, Democrats unsuccessfully attempted to amend the bill and accused Republicans of trying to suppress black and Hispanic representation.

## Texas House Passes Redistricting Plan
The Texas House [passed a congressional redistricting plan](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAQhuGrwR0RjME4BcVp3OW0W1pjMzFIYJBh83P3K2cvYeuRXs3zfd3mG4YY9u0_JrLtdc_zTs8aqTU6Zp-_KxWslepOz4SllnfYN4wzCNBcjBzk7DDE96w6ZxfhrrIjK43WxigpdOdtL8YBzECjAedg6fGKgx4dKViEXtW9C_aMiRGklEL218uiV2UANWkjcekNU4JcaPm4NE-NXljv8Z0fdFzWnLpofWulsv4fg4nB1Dz5EON5YzD5nOgEMZhWTAXDtjOYtBqk1CP_xPhHyX-ZfMuFJywMpu6wrjxDjKEO5w9bwvDJdu1vQz0s_AQAAP__zxN9Cw) Wednesday that has the potential to add five GOP seats to the state's congressional delegation. During the hours-long debate, Democrats unsuccessfully attempted to amend the bill and accused Republicans of trying to suppress black and Hispanic representation. State Rep. Nicole Collier (D-Fort Worth) was joined by several of her colleagues who spent the night in the chamber to protest state troopers' supervision of quorum-breaking members. DPS [closed the Capitol grounds](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGupSAURb8GO27gIIIFxTR2b9opzRGOSgbFCFff_fuJ7xem3snK2uvP1_iFMcV9-Y0bufo953GnuySqlc5xze9CB5ZCZad7w6Mcn7gvmEYQoLmwHOQYMKbP2DbBTSL0siEnjdbGtFLoZnU9adGGqRe2sz54K-1sZ6WoB9JghWiie2DCgpRSSNW_Ju1bA6hJG4mTMqwVFGLN56uuVOkby5w--aLz5fPWJLfWehSmfjEYGAz3fb_-Xm96RgYDnjX6RAyG5xeDIWWPicHwA-Iej1hz4mXNucZ94XU9CSunC_0ba8w7gwG6nkNvtFQz8Ymk5a2BjlvygSs_GVIzttZgc7pw3DGlWLrHetkwph_J-n9pLwf_AgAA__8tfIyu) Tuesday evening after a threat to law enforcement, forcing a planned protest to relocate. State Rep. ## Ten Commandments Law Blocked
A federal judge has [temporarily blocked](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAURL8Gd1iATSAFxWvc5bVbWhhubDZgvHATx3-_cn5huxmNdHQ0X7fxZkMM6_zfJjD4vudxhb1GQIQyLvlZYbO1Ql1hT3ar2xHW2cZRMCEp01Tw0dsQj7FvvJmYv_IGDFdSKtVzJpvFdLpXnVZOX_TEpHB3KRUXk1T2oifLXRPMCWNacM4Z767tJF2vhJUgFbdTp0jPwAfMpcUFEN623uORX1Bal1MTzYK4VdL9I2IgYtj3vX3s-D5HIoaTTcTA9CcTMXw__QwUIW252BLiQaeY3aPSD5kirNTllOzqE6xYaYGfZyhwFso5rW7JOVIfKpbgsBIxNMX4bQ8xhno5ZedkQ_y44d8efRnxGwAA__98M4vG) a new state law requiring public schools to display a copy of the Ten Commandments in every classroom. The order applies to 11 school districts. The lawsuit was brought by 16 parents represented by the ACLU, Americans United for the Separation of Church and State, and the Freedom from Religion Foundation. It claims the law [violates the First Amendment](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2SgyAUx0-jHQ6giBQU26TLtls6IE9l9gmMkJDcfsdcYfv_5-_nPt-NRx-2b3OALq81zgFqRigFznmPjwzJ5Aw5QD1Myuntw2Zw5pQLQifC2eyMx_c8tE5b6hRrQTMphJQDo6Ld9boo4dZ-dNM6KStHpYyV48SVkI6CVa3XVxidOGOMsl51ViyD5EaAkMzYXjYDBedLPLuyQ4GXySu-4xPObolHi3ovJeWm_2r4reG3Wmt3XagAv5eg4bePhxQIZInHYYI7IJRM8rLHiMR6RPJIzhQg1lsEssVEOGNjL6f21C5Vj-jzeA3ZDuPx01v-R-up-V8AAAD__4nAgIg) because it allegedly favors Christianity and contradicts some students' religious beliefs. U.S. District Judge Fred Biery of San Antonio [agreed](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGurCAURb9GOwygCFNQvMZuXvtKc4QzQh6CkTPjzN_feO8n3G4XOysr6999vkNMMa9_YUNL70eZM541IREecyjPijvUijXjucFe90_MK6RZcqkYN0yK2UNMn3lovV24v4kWrdBKaT0IrtpgnYHxMY6m741XbgTOcRmMlrAsWhg-tNFeMG6kEIKL_tYtyg1agkKlBSy9bgaOPlI5OgpI-Ib6SJ_ywqNzZWuTDUR7bfo_jZwaOZ3n2bnyPCjFSph_Xo2cfHH_kRo5aT7epDDymqaRUwYKkNmLQYKtsIBxDVRZzB53zB4zsepCKYn5WOmI7oK0h_X7GVOKdbwE1w1i-vah31V8WfkVAAD__5VQh4s), saying the law "crosses the line from exposure to coercion." He also cited a federal injunction on a similar law in Louisiana, which that state's attorney general is expected to appeal. The state defended the display of the Ten Commandments as a recognition of its role in shaping the nation's laws, calling the document a "passive display on the wall" that "doesn’t restrict anything." Attorney General Ken Paxton vowed to [appeal the ruling](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHOozAQhU8DnZE94JAULrahy7ZborFnAO8ajLATJ7dfwRX-cubTe_r0_jzHJ_rgt_k3rmzyZ4rjxiUFzpmPcYmvxDumxGnjsuKe9q_fZgwjSNBC3gWokdCH79jVZKykh6rZqF7rvu-U1PVimFmTBEtksdVStzeg1jk9PazrJEHtzVkm76CUkqp9NFa7rgfUrHuFtu2rTjL5HI8mL5z5g2kK3_jmo3FxrYNZct5T1f6qYKhgKKU0zp6-6eQVDFekguF8XecmXFxX3GjlLSdxcYHWxpxFwCJsiO4fk5iY-MAg_r5o5gqG-jC0Fx-CT7fTal7Rh0si_2y6t4H_AQAA___SwIY2).
## Austin Forms Homelessness Task Force
The city of Austin is collaborating with more than a dozen local organizations and agencies to launch the Downtown Homelessness Task Force, which aims to [facilitate housing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQhZ8GOiPPgPkpKNLQ3bQp0diMF-saG2HvevftIxLlCdLOfDr6zvn1tX6R8y48ftLBc37buAYuyXPOfK17fCY-KSVOgctBZzo_LjzIryhRCTkKhHUj5z9rV2-zltsENc8wKDUMHUhV7zPISct-lKA32fWgtObR9NaSHshKotrNd5gcEQAktFOjlekGJMVqANLtUHWSN5fj1eSdM78pWf-JL74aE4_az3vOZ6raHxUuFS6llOb79eT7WeFCV3bGc4XL3avCxUdDvsJljwd7TveJnim7IDKlb2HjZVhssYQcSxD_qPCXxH4SqFogBiUAmURnUImJOxAj6d6MurXW6Pqat7M4713qb__HQc7_0c3_N_Jrxt8BAAD__9d0kUA) for an estimated 6,500 people who live on the city's streets. The initiative builds on the city's daily outreach efforts to engage those without permanent housing by helping them [identify living arrangements](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHO4yAUhE-DOywgEOKCYht32XZL6xmeYxQMlh8Jye1X3mIv8HcjjTT65vtzn-4QU8yP37Chq5-lTBkbJawVj2ktL8IdiJAytg122r8xPyBNSijDxY0rOQWI6TvpLrhZhEF26KQ1xlothelWZ6W4AVpzNcswGK0NehG0t2KZF2OV7aI7x8RNSSmFvAz9bLy2CgwaK2G-WKYFhljL0dcVK36AlvQtbzx6X7YuubXWndjlF1MjU2NrrX9-IJ8lU-P5hqkxFQ-JqRFeVGP-H3iCV_YrEs_YeCgt19IyX8uGCYkyEvEK9ORLOTwyNXaHC3uLKUW6nmCPDWL6x1F_Zu_t1N8AAAD__0rghoY) when they encounter law enforcement, healthcare providers, or temporary shelters. "_It's taking a holistic look at all the elements of the system and saying, how do we address all the elements of the systems together_ ,” [said city staffer David Gray](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL8GMiPb4DETOLiEbC69EDW4gdYZG9Ge8czfr9j9hE1LpdKr9-8xPoACxfUv7Ojye0ljxMIBc8Zz3NKT8QBm5Ihlh4OPD8UVwqilNkL2QqvRA4XP2NXeTdLfVY1OWWOs7ZQ09eZaCdPNmzt2OIPt-7nHqZc3sEvX4aSnmtw1JnutlJKqvTeTmTurwaCxCqbWVp1ETzmdTd4w4xt4CZ_0wrOZ014Ht-V8cNX-qfRQ6aGU0izpbeHJmeJVqfRwfar08JOJAM84b8giA_8XSzpnFEA7egHen8hMcRVb2jEgs5hPYmLhU4k5lVifzh-FQiC-XWjrDhS-SfLv_L2c_goAAP__-NaJYg). The city's latest budget allocates $75 million for homeless services. By the end of the year, the task force will [propose a plan](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSrCAURL8GMyxAGTUgeInZvHRD6wrXkRkES67j-Pdb7n7Cxqer63R_3Yc7-ODj4z8saOgzpSHikQMS4TbMac-4Qs6YIx4LrHk9fXxAGJRQmouWKzk48OEc6sKZUbhOFmhko3XT1FLoYjatkx26m626Fru2chpuoIQd22nqQDpbeHOViVZJKYWsunLUtm4UaNSNhLFqWC3QeUpbSTMSfiBP4Uxv3EqbliKYmWjNrPrHVM9UfxxHeU3YwPn0CuPzSjHVw57Jx5AshAsz1VtPJ08T_yXcAXCIMe3RIp_TggFz5s_kI3GC_OJT2iwy1RebcevhQ_D5dsk9FvDhx4X-9uDbqO8AAAD__wzgias) and implementation timeline.

The Texas Senate is expected to pass the redistricting plan in the coming days. Democrats have promised to challenge it in court. Ten Commandments Law Blocked A federal judge has a new state law requiring public schools to display a copy of the Ten Commandments in every classroom. The order applies to 11 school districts. The lawsuit was brought by 16 parents represented by the ACLU, Americans United for the Separation of Church and State, and the Freedom from Religion Foundation. It claims the law because it allegedly favors Christianity and contradicts some students' religious beliefs. U.S. District Judge Fred Biery of San Antonio , saying the law "crosses the line from exposure to coercion." He also cited a federal injunction on a similar law in Louisiana, which that state's attorney general is expected to appeal. The state defended the display of the Ten Commandments as a recognition of its role in shaping the nation's laws, calling the document a "passive display on the wall" that "doesn’t restrict anything." Austin Forms Homelessness Task Force The city of Austin is collaborating with more than a dozen local organizations and agencies to launch the Downtown Homelessness Task Force, which aims to for an estimated 6,500 people who live on the city's streets. The initiative builds on the city's daily outreach efforts to engage those without permanent housing by helping them when they encounter law enforcement, healthcare providers, or temporary shelters. "It's taking a holistic look at all the elements of the system and saying, how do we address all the elements of the systems together ,” . The city's latest budget allocates $75 million for homeless services. subject: As Texas Prepares to Vote on Redistricting Plan, Maine Attorney General Aaron Frey Laments Process
body:

** As Texas Prepares to Vote on Redistricting Plan, Maine Attorney General Aaron Frey Laments Process (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=3dad5d0717&e=f093fa355c)

By Libby Palanza on Aug 21, 2025 06:49 am
Debate in the Texas House of Representatives kicked off Wednesday on the Republican-backed redistricting plan as Democratic lawmakers returned to the state after a fifteen-day protest that prevented the chamber from reaching a quorum. Throughout August, national attention has centered on Texas’ plan to reconfigure its congressional districts. Some populous Democrat-led states like California and [...]

name: Nancy Mace for Governor
subject: Nancy Mace to Speak at Moms for Liberty Chapter Meeting in Myrtle Beach
body:
Nancy Mace will deliver remarks at the Moms for Liberty, Horry County Chapter Meeting on Thursday, August 21, 2025, in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace/nancy-mace-to-speak-at-moms-for-liberty-chapter-meeting-in-myrtle-beach?e=ddc57b5ede)
---
| |
---
| |
**NANCY MACE TO SPEAK AT MOMS FOR LIBERTY EVENT IN MYRTLE BEACH**

_Standing with Parents. Fighting for Our Kids._ **Nancy Mace** will deliver remarks at the **Moms for Liberty – Horry County Chapter Meeting** on **Thursday, August 21, 2025,** in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina. The event will focus on protecting parental rights, ensuring transparency in education, and giving families a stronger voice in their children’s future.
---
|
---
| **EVENT DETAILS** **Location:** Forward Church, 4011 Belle Terre Blvd, Myrtle Beach, SC 29579
**Date:** Thursday, August 21, 2025
**Time:** Doors open at 3:30 PM | Program begins at 4:00 PM
---
| [RSVP](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=3b65848699&e=ddc57b5ede "RSVP")
---
| Nancy Mace has been a strong voice for South Carolina parents and fought against the Radical Left’s agenda on our kids. She recently signed the **Moms for Liberty Parental Rights Pledge** , reaffirming her commitment to parents across South Carolina.
---
| [Take the Pledge](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=52c5279462&e=ddc57b5ede "Take the Pledge")
---
| “I signed the Moms for Liberty Parental Rights Pledge, putting my ink on paper, and my word on the line,” **said Congresswoman Nancy Mace.** “South Carolina’s children need a patriot who will champion transparency in education and protect them from inappropriate content in the classroom. I don’t back down when it comes to our kids. South Carolina’s families have a fighter they can count on.”

---
| [Donate](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=665c050a9f&e=ddc57b5ede "Donate")
---
| **TEAM MACE**
campaign@nancymace.org
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2025 Nancy Mace for Governor, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Nancy Mace for Governor295 Seven Farms Dr Ste C-186Daniel Island, SC 29492-8001
[Add us to your address book](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/vcard?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=b0fea72a45)

You can [update your preferences](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=b0fea72a45&e=ddc57b5ede&c=9c1fd2e9fd) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=b0fea72a45&t=b&e=ddc57b5ede&c=9c1fd2e9fd).

body:
Since his Presidency ended, Obama has mostly stayed out of politics. When he calls for a partisan political response like redrawing California’s Congressional maps, you know that it’s serious.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tOVD4su93Y6NFz2Z8lncoeK8Q490c-AFNz1RpmG11thqMOXlVu4bJR0PFhjU3OuD-WoNQ0qGKMqL0gFBkqEYPmDmOlK3eleViPMNGj-5jlcx-M-n2QsneYeU1I-BLMSDhlTiNNJcrISIDhj-4qc8vgZLpHnpf5ccE0QtET_Rx69C25OAS3JJL0rea0h65xqiZNCU73MkrVgLiE7zAsEbQH3LsNYf8oNC&c=1vvXoqB2vB5XTIcso3yxL08Y70lrNWmnLWSB_xOXNTsKInVgoalL5A==&ch=9Fb-_9o1ADMniAmM6gmStVtfUEqlxKC1O8b00f-GYVAG8MeS0Ncd1g==)
---
| Peter,
Last night, the Texas' Republican legislature passed gerrymandered maps that silence the voices of millions of Texas Democratic voters--erasing five Democratic seats in the U.S. House.
Why? Because they know Donald Trump is one of the most unpopular Presidents in history, and they have to rig the maps to win next year's mid-term elections.
In response, President Obama has endorsed Gov. Newsom's plan to redistrict the Congressional maps in California because in Obama's own words, we cannot let MAGA "rig the game."
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tOVD4su93Y6NFz2Z8lncoeK8Q490c-AFNz1RpmG11thqMOXlVu4bJR0PFhjU3OuD-WoNQ0qGKMqL0gFBkqEYPmDmOlK3eleViPMNGj-5jlcx-M-n2QsneYeU1I-BLMSDhlTiNNJcrISIDhj-4qc8vgZLpHnpf5ccE0QtET_Rx69C25OAS3JJL0rea0h65xqiZNCU73MkrVgLiE7zAsEbQNOcrD63Jo-7&c=1vvXoqB2vB5XTIcso3yxL08Y70lrNWmnLWSB_xOXNTsKInVgoalL5A==&ch=9Fb-_9o1ADMniAmM6gmStVtfUEqlxKC1O8b00f-GYVAG8MeS0Ncd1g==)

| | | | Since his Presidency ended, President Obama has mostly stayed out of politics. When he calls for a partisan political response like redrawing California's Congressional maps, you know that it's a grave situation.
In the critical swing state of Pennsylvania, MAGA is hard at work trying to steal the PA Supreme Court in a sleepy judicial retention race that National Democrats aren't paying attention to. If we don't stop them, they will succeed and Pennsylvania will go so far right it will become unrecognizable, and so will our country. Here's what's at stake:
x Gerrymandered maps that will guarantee GOP control of Congress for the foreseeable future.
x Voter suppression that flips PA red permanently delivering a third term for Trump. x A woman's right to choose - gone.
[We're answering President Obama's call to action and we need your help. Unless Democrats from across the country can come together we are going to lose PA. name: DemsGive
subject: Safe streets and thriving communities for all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Streets
body:
Congresswoman Ilhan Omar lifts up a campaign to put people before highways.
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K369R9RPHW9S8V850T8MDQYT_0)
---
| | | | Hey Peter, I want to share something important with you today from Congresswoman Ilhan Omar. She is working to lift up a local organization in Minneapolis that shows what it means to repair past harms and build safe, thriving communities. Please take a moment to read her message below and if you are able, consider supporting the effort she highlights. More soon, Andy DemsGive.org
---
|
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, We deserve safe streets and thriving communities where people can easily get around—not just by car, but by walking, biking, rolling, and transit. I hope you’ll join me in supporting a bold, community-led vision in Near North Minneapolis that prioritizes reparative justice and racial equity. **If that’s all you need to hear, please make a contribution to Our Streets as they work on an amazing project to create safe streets for all. Otherwise, please continue reading!**
---
| | [ Support the Vision! ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K369R9RPHW9S8V850T8MDQYT_1)
---
| | | | Right now, Our Streets—a local transportation justice organization—is working with Near North residents to bring back 6th Avenue North and reclaim highway land that has polluted and divided the neighborhood for generations. Once called the “Beale Street of Minneapolis,” this area was a thriving Black and Jewish community until it was destroyed in 1939 to make way for Olson Highway—a highway to nowhere, built through the heart of a vibrant neighborhood. Olson Highway sees less traffic than narrower roadways like Broadway Avenue. Yet its intersections are the most dangerous in Minneapolis. That’s why Our Streets is leading the Bring Back 6th campaign: to remove the highway, restore the historic street grid, reconnect communities, and build a safer, more equitable future. And they have the unanimous support of the Minneapolis City Council.
---
| |
---
| But here’s the challenge: The $1.6 million federal grant for this work is now at risk. Due to Trump’s executive orders, the agency overseeing their grant has been gutted. Now, more than $2 billion in Reconnecting Communities and Neighborhood Access and Equity grants are at risk, including two right here in Minnesota. This uncertainty puts serious financial strain on Our Streets and threatens delays — or even stoppage — to this historic work. These potential cuts, currently being debated in the federal budget reconciliation bill, would derail critical efforts across the country to repair past transportation harms and reconnect communities. This devastating decision cuts off future opportunities for communities like Near North to access federal support for reparative infrastructure projects, making this work more urgent than ever. Bringing back 6th could provide immense economic benefits, housing opportunities, reconnection and safer streets, alternative transportation options, and improved public health. **So please: Make a donation of to help ensure that Our Streets’ Bring Back 6th efforts and the community’s vision don’t get stalled by bureaucratic chaos. Your support allows us to keep building momentum through public events, community outreach, and continued pressure on decision-makers.**
---
| | [ Donate here today! ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K369R9RPHW9S8V850T8MDQYT_2)
---
| After decades of disinvestment, Near North Minneapolis deserves a street that reflects the needs and dreams of its community—not outdated, dangerous infrastructure. Let’s Bring Back 6th. Let’s get this done. In Service,
---
| |
---
| Ilhan Omar
---
| Paid for by Our Streets.
---
| No longer want to receive these emails? [Unsubscribe](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K369R9RPHW9S8V850T8MDQYT_3).
DemsGive 712 H St NE Unit # 8746 Washington, DC 20002
---

name: Sen. Jeff Bridges
subject: Here's why we're headed into a special session
body:
Today the Colorado Legislature heads back to the Capitol for a special session. Not because of wildfires. Not because of property taxes. This time...

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/11a8ce273e94/get-more-smarter-on-colorados-budget-10368431?e=b48bb2b4f4)
---
[|
---](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=06f3ddeb02&e=b48bb2b4f4)
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Hi there,
Today the Colorado Legislature heads back to the Capitol for a special session. Not because of wildfires. Not because of property taxes. It’s to deal with fallout from the Big Beautiful (Awful) Bill.
Here’s why.
---
[|
---](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=5d94a29efc&e=b48bb2b4f4)
| | Colorado calculates our flat tax rate for both corporations and individuals based on a line in federal tax returns called Federal Taxable Income, or FTI. All of the new federal tax loopholes created by that terrible bill lower FTI. That means, essentially, Colorado automatically adopts all of those new federal loopholes into our own state tax code.
As chair of Colorado’s budget committee, this breaks my heart. We just cut $1.2 billion a few months ago because of TABOR. Now we’re cutting another $1.2 billion because of Trump.
**That's why we're headed back to the Capitol this week. By closing corporate loopholes at the state level, we'll stem the bleeding—while Colorado businesses will still pay less in taxes overall.**
We’re not only closing loopholes. I’m the prime sponsor of a bill to restore funding for Planned Parenthood that Trump’s bill cut—unconstitutionally, in my opinion. This matters because across Colorado there are thousands of Medicaid patients who depend on Planned Parenthood for care, and the rest of our primary care system simply can’t absorb all of these people.
**And now for the most important part of this email.**
My brilliant wife Rie has a panel under consideration for South by Southwest (SXSW). Everything she touches is incredible, and #SXSW26 will be better for including it. But we need your help to make that happen!
[Click here.](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=ca947f1754&e=b48bb2b4f4) Sign in or create an account (it’s really easy!) Click the
Deadline: This week! Jus do it now. Don’t leave this hanging over your head. You’ll feel better. Promise.
Thank you in advance for sending positive vibes both my way for the special and Rie’s way for SXSW!
Talk soon,

PS [Let’s eat cereal together.](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=1012be21ce&e=b48bb2b4f4)

---
| [CLICK FOR CEREAL](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=ad53570f9f&e=b48bb2b4f4)
---
|
---
| | | | | [](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=0adf2720e6&e=b48bb2b4f4)
---
[](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=9e7870d42d&e=b48bb2b4f4)

---
[](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=2b9c08b0ed&e=b48bb2b4f4)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: The Left hates to see us fight fire with fire
body:
That’s all this is...
Our Party must (and will) win the redistricting showdown.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1716043/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvU3lWZ0hKV2VSRA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MjE/LbmNsQjcwSTdneA/qP2hpZHM9bmN5Z0JTOUV5aDZyTTBscw/gaKcdjQ/sahe6f6f71d)

| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot,
---
Right now, Republicans only have a _1-SEAT_ majority in the House. __One__.
---
That’s why Gavin Newsom is trying to **ERASE _FIVE_** Republican-held congressional districts!
---
5 seats? There goes the House.
---
And it doesn’t stop there...**Obama is now joining the Democrat mission to shut down Republican redistricting efforts, claiming that the GOP maps are _unfair_. **
---
While Obama lectures us about “unfair” maps, let’s take a look at his home state of Illinois...
---
Below is just _ONE_ of 17 congressional districts. _Does this look like a fairly drawn district to you?_
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**_Of course not! Obama can spare us the crocodile tears._**
---
The Left’s hypocrisy is staggering. While they cry foul about redistricting in red states, they’ve twisted the map beyond recognition in places they control.
---
The truth is: **_They’re just angry that Republicans are fighting back and not caving to the Left’s demands!_**
---
In fact, President Trump is leading one of _the most important fights_ in the midst of redistricting: **a mid-decade census that ensures NO illegal aliens are counted in the census so that our congressional seats are ONLY decided by U.S. citizens.**
---
_Patriot, in the midst of this redistricting showdown that our Party must (and _will_) WIN, nothing is more vital to us than for you to verify your voter profile on behalf of your zip code._
---
[**So please, complete the questionnaire before the deadline TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M. to verify your voter profile for the month of August. >>**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[VERIFY NOW ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1716043/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLWpvcmRhbi9lOGYyY2M1NzcwYWJiZmI0Lw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MjE/LbmNsQjcwSTdneA/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDgxOSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9UldfQiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1PTE1Q/gaKcdjQ/s9ge7ba44e4)
---
Jim Jordan
---
---

clean_body: That’s all this is... Our Party must (and will) win the redistricting showdown. | Patriot, Right now, Republicans only have a 1-SEAT majority in the House. One. That’s why Gavin Newsom is trying to ERASE FIVE Republican-held congressional districts! 5 seats? There goes the House. And it doesn’t stop there...Obama is now joining the Democrat mission to shut down Republican redistricting efforts, claiming that the GOP maps are unfair. While Obama lectures us about “unfair” maps, let’s take a look at his home state of Illinois... Below is just ONE of 17 congressional districts. Does this look like a fairly drawn district to you? Of course not! Obama can spare us the crocodile tears. The Left’s hypocrisy is staggering. While they cry foul about redistricting in red states, they’ve twisted the map beyond recognition in places they control. The truth is: They’re just angry that Republicans are fighting back and not caving to the Left’s demands! In fact, President Trump is leading one of the most important fights in the midst of redistricting: a mid-decade census that ensures NO illegal aliens are counted in the census so that our congressional seats are ONLY decided by U.S. citizens. Patriot, in the midst of this redistricting showdown that our Party must (and will) WIN, nothing is more vital to us than for you to verify your voter profile on behalf of your zip code. Thank you, Jim Jordan Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed between Jim Jordan for Congress, Buckeye Liberty Fund, and American Liberty Foundation PAC. PO Box 909, Marysville, OH 43040

We can't lose our best shot at taking back the Senate, so we need to act fast, Peter. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfe2c35c9-0546-448c-825b-b4decc7f7d24/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Rural Americans United
subject: Strategy, Media, and the Future of Rural Washington
body:
Communication is power. Control the message, shape the outcome.
| | | | |
---
| What Is In This Newsletter?

* Strategy, Media, and the Future of Rural Washington
* INATAI Foundation awards Rural Americans United the Community Power grant!
* Shout out to Jayce Wright and Tri Cities NAACP Chapter

---
| |
---
|
Communication is a powerful tool, and controlling communication is almost infinite power.
When social media first launched, I had high expectations that it would democratize the internet, giving individuals the same strength of voice usually reserved for deep-pocketed corporations or governments. To some degree, this did happen. We now have influencers with millions of followers. However, if you consider a scantily clad person on social media doing silly dances to be a strong and influential voice, the definition has shifted.
By and large, the power of communication still lies in the hands of the few, and its importance can be clearly seen in how it has shaped American ideology. The far right has shown its astute planning for the future by playing the long game. This is further reinforced by the rush of MAGA-leaning billionaires buying communication networks, such as Larry Ellison's company acquiring CBS and Paramount, Jeff Bezos purchasing the Washington Post, Elon Musk acquiring Twitter, and Mark Zuckerberg shifting the significant influence of Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp. And let us not forget the family rivalry of the Murdochs, where patriarch Rupert is fighting a court battle to keep his media empire firmly in the hands of his MAGA-aligned son.
One of the biggest statements on the change and influence of media came from Mark Zuckerberg.
Facebook dropped third-party fact-checking and replaced it with community notes written by the people, like you and me, on the site. This may seem friendly and social, except Mark Zuckerberg's stated premise for doing this was that people are no longer interested in facts but in what they want to believe. He used the election of 47 to support this, suggesting that because 47 is a firehose of false narratives, lies, and deception yet was still elected, people now prefer a relative version of the truth rather than objective facts.
---
| |
---
| How does this affect a candidate running for office in districts such as Washington's 4th and 5th congressional districts?
I was at lunch the other day and, as not too typical, was asked if I would run again. Without hesitation, I said that if the right people asked me, I would, and much to my surprise I already had the list ready in my mind:

* Local 598 out of Hanford

My father retired from Local 598 plumbers and steamfitters. When I ran, they treated me like a stray cat dragging a dead rat around in my mouth. This goes far beyond a point of pride to have them "accept me." It is about union support, and if 598 steps up with an endorsement and significant cash, the other dominoes will fall into place. This is significant.

* The Tamaki family

They bring a substantial amount of credibility and monied resources to the table. I was told that unless they were confident I was going to win, they were only mildly interested in the race. Having their backing demonstrates a commitment to winning this race that it has, if ever, rarely seen.

* Either the Washington State Democratic Senate or House

We saw during the last Legislative District 14 race with our three strong candidates what west side Democrats can do if they give a damn. They pumped large amounts of money and support into the district, which changed the game in many positive ways. My guess is that only about two cents out of every donated dollar for Democratic politics from deep-pocket west side donors makes it east of the mountains, Spokane aside. This needs to change.

* Mainstream Republicans (I would still run as a Democrat)

With a large number of voters identifying as Independent and leaning right, there could be no better endorsement of a centrist, both-sides-of-the-aisle candidate than to have an influential group provide an endorsement--or at least a nod.

* Methow Valley

Our deep-pocket Democrat transplants from the west side. They are thoughtful, invested, and passionate. But are they really committed to the east side in the same way they are to the west side and big marquee races around the country? It is time to prioritize our neighbors and our own backyard ahead of others.
There are, of course, other influential groups, but these five represent the different pillars that must be addressed to truly have a winnable race. And they all point toward raising enough money. As I understand it, I raised more money than any candidate in Congressional District 4 history, and it was still not even close to enough. Why? Simply put, it is impossible to make your name common in every household in a district as large as 4 by either going to every fair, rally, parade, and knocking on twenty thousand doors--or by spending your entire media budget in the last 4 to 6 weeks of the race.
The sad reality is that between low voter turnout, the power of the Republican brand, and most voters being seriously unaware of important facts about the candidates--relying instead on name recognition or party alignment--it cannot be done that way. If I were to run again, hypothetically speaking, I would require at least a ten-month media campaign saturating Congressional District 4 with unique, frequently changing, highly relevant, and personal messaging.
That is why I started talking about the media and its importance and followed with my criteria of which organizations are needed to make it all happen.
I do believe that a good candidate can win without all of these things, but that would be the difference between winning the lottery and operating off a strategic business plan. We only have to look at all, for good or bad, that 47 has accomplished. He has effected more change in less than a year than most presidents accomplish in two terms--all because he had a strategic plan: Project 2025. Here is to our victory.
---
| |
---
| | [Your Donation Is Important](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tNZJS-Zmf2QvA78RhV1WOayCLRpr3m9nLZlzWl4w7eeaMxESf8r0Ef1P2bHJw5StkViHWLZ3Z4kNfc2UHKj4j43b_Sd0mtOY-1RGRdpB0C1_R9_M9nM2sp0GjucHYD2eobPEDZWCMP3VTQzAmQzpV3TzbU4C1ELC8untsjSEhW_M6zjB2cda1PuRq1n0TQauUG40f62sv8EwBbTwJ_HtK9T3rp8h5CA4vyQbvPWW6Xo=&c=IHIDcFmuN9IDxh98-1JMD1paDtfjxeqkAWVENS38fdC4bM9L3nttlQ==&ch=_lZNFgYENMdnFyXkUVvHmNUcresDEPqFST2k1OREzo5jmlBB9GyB1A==)
---
| |
---
| Rural Americans United for Inclusive Democracy has been awarded a Community Power grant from [INATAI Foundation.](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tNZJS-Zmf2QvA78RhV1WOayCLRpr3m9nLZlzWl4w7eeaMxESf8r0EQO6DTojWCynx1qX4HGIIf5zSYTPWZoS5vukzB6si5MxQ1Xmf-SPKuQR_J-dfRJRsX-9GLqrzntuZLFTuq1cayClh1PCLZioGQ==&c=IHIDcFmuN9IDxh98-1JMD1paDtfjxeqkAWVENS38fdC4bM9L3nttlQ==&ch=_lZNFgYENMdnFyXkUVvHmNUcresDEPqFST2k1OREzo5jmlBB9GyB1A==)
We are humbled by the continued support from [INATAI](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tNZJS-Zmf2QvA78RhV1WOayCLRpr3m9nLZlzWl4w7eeaMxESf8r0EQO6DTojWCynx1qX4HGIIf5zSYTPWZoS5vukzB6si5MxQ1Xmf-SPKuQR_J-dfRJRsX-9GLqrzntuZLFTuq1cayDvn-sX6nNAvg==&c=IHIDcFmuN9IDxh98-1JMD1paDtfjxeqkAWVENS38fdC4bM9L3nttlQ==&ch=_lZNFgYENMdnFyXkUVvHmNUcresDEPqFST2k1OREzo5jmlBB9GyB1A==) and from people like you. Rural Americans United provides a vital service for communities in rural Washington State. Through the use of media, we reach those who might otherwise be excluded from political information and the democratic process. Everyone deserves to be informed and included. With voter turnout rates declining, it is more important than ever that we expand our work. With your support, we can.
---
| |
---
| NAACP opens permanent office in Tri Cities
---
| | | |
---
|
Shout out to our advisory board member Jayce Wright for their incredible work bringing an NAACP chapter to the Tri Cities and making sure it has a [permanent home](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tNZJS-Zmf2QvA78RhV1WOayCLRpr3m9nLZlzWl4w7eeaMxESf8r0EQO6DTojWCyn6SowSJrUaQg-XsAnJ5oNR9LScvk4q4RoVO-S50GWI86q-C0eO0yLj0-GalPFrTWdrsR944gGXGJissO3-d0QaFTaikc9HVpnfWV-C8DLUZRNKtH7IZkZCzFDvWnBNejI2VkR9m8SgzorMwRiCuExXOCeqEBon-7H&c=IHIDcFmuN9IDxh98-1JMD1paDtfjxeqkAWVENS38fdC4bM9L3nttlQ==&ch=_lZNFgYENMdnFyXkUVvHmNUcresDEPqFST2k1OREzo5jmlBB9GyB1A==). Jayce is building community and they are shaping history. As Communications Director for [NAACP Chapter 1135-B](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tNZJS-Zmf2QvA78RhV1WOayCLRpr3m9nLZlzWl4w7eeaMxESf8r0EQO6DTojWCyn3-hsMxuDsWlH9bg_AkBPscJmArRLNg6kAF7-sU4LDDJP5VBiik-4BqG_DtKh0MdCUKx1lyTs6L30hqrNMezjYTdetCOoXB9M&c=IHIDcFmuN9IDxh98-1JMD1paDtfjxeqkAWVENS38fdC4bM9L3nttlQ==&ch=_lZNFgYENMdnFyXkUVvHmNUcresDEPqFST2k1OREzo5jmlBB9GyB1A==), they are making sure voices that have too often been silenced are heard loud and clear. We are proud to have leaders like Jayce on our team.
---
| [](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tNZJS-Zmf2QvA78RhV1WOayCLRpr3m9nLZlzWl4w7eeaMxESf8r0Ef1P2bHJw5St9Euc26Xa01hYg_IySQpDlvAoIbKlN8QAqkMH3rBHUsOJry5_Thz_FR7XfqByZHgxZjb3Ecokb1cMoN1k8c9yx-KoCG_Gscb3wqaVhz8thDRrSwnksiNj0A==&c=IHIDcFmuN9IDxh98-1JMD1paDtfjxeqkAWVENS38fdC4bM9L3nttlQ==&ch=_lZNFgYENMdnFyXkUVvHmNUcresDEPqFST2k1OREzo5jmlBB9GyB1A==) [](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tNZJS-Zmf2QvA78RhV1WOayCLRpr3m9nLZlzWl4w7eeaMxESf8r0Ef1P2bHJw5StPZqtN_mEbe7ENY_UZDvuiFURPZ7YXV3Xwc83BF76MGwcOR2qaqQUDOeWT_EYV8KliubokJ2Avy7Q45Nm8pJi5IjeLXP-Eyz7NZkUcpDuumaLU0us-aeghQ==&c=IHIDcFmuN9IDxh98-1JMD1paDtfjxeqkAWVENS38fdC4bM9L3nttlQ==&ch=_lZNFgYENMdnFyXkUVvHmNUcresDEPqFST2k1OREzo5jmlBB9GyB1A==) [](mailto:doug@ruralamericansunited.org)

But are they really committed to the east side in the same way they are to the west side and big marquee races around the country? It is time to prioritize our neighbors and our own backyard ahead of others. There are, of course, other influential groups, but these five represent the different pillars that must be addressed to truly have a winnable race. And they all point toward raising enough money. As I understand it, I raised more money than any candidate in Congressional District 4 history, and it was still not even close to enough. Why? Simply put, it is impossible to make your name common in every household in a district as large as 4 by either going to every fair, rally, parade, and knocking on twenty thousand doors--or by spending your entire media budget in the last 4 to 6 weeks of the race. The sad reality is that between low voter turnout, the power of the Republican brand, and most voters being seriously unaware of important facts about the candidates--relying instead on name recognition or party alignment--it cannot be done that way. If I were to run again, hypothetically speaking, I would require at least a ten-month media campaign saturating Congressional District 4 with unique, frequently changing, highly relevant, and personal messaging. That is why I started talking about the media and its importance and followed with my criteria of which organizations are needed to make it all happen. I do believe that a good candidate can win without all of these things, but that would be the difference between winning the lottery and operating off a strategic business plan. We only have to look at all, for good or bad, that 47 has accomplished. He has effected more change in less than a year than most presidents accomplish in two terms--all because he had a strategic plan: Project 2025. Here is to our victory. | | | | == | | | Rural Americans United for Inclusive Democracy has been awarded a Community Power grant from == We are humbled by the continued support from == and from people like you. Rural Americans United provides a vital service for communities in rural Washington State. Through the use of media, we reach those who might otherwise be excluded from political information and the democratic process. Everyone deserves to be informed and included. With voter turnout rates declining, it is more important than ever that we expand our work. With your support, we can. | | | NAACP opens permanent office in Tri Cities | | | | | Shout out to our advisory board member Jayce Wright for their incredible work bringing an NAACP chapter to the Tri Cities and making sure it has a ==. Jayce is building community and they are shaping history. As Communications Director for ==, they are making sure voices that have too often been silenced are heard loud and clear. We are proud to have leaders like Jayce on our team. | == == mailto:doug@ruralamericansunited.org Rural Americans United | | | | Rural Americans United | 420 South 72nd Avenue Suite 180 PMB 110 | Yakima, WA 98908 US | |

name: Wes Moore
subject: Our teachers are so important
body:
While Trump cuts more than $480 million in funding for public schools, here in Maryland we’re doing the opposite.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=483%2E1086043%2EyHf_XG)
As Dawn and I are getting Mia and James ready to go back to school, I can’t help but think about the teacher who changed the trajectory of my life.
_Señora Rothstein._
I had a long record of getting kicked out of classes, but never from Señora Rothstein’s.
The very first time that she was the one to send me to the principal’s office, and I was back in that familiar chair, I’ll never forget what I heard her say. _“It’s not that he’s hurting me. It’s that he’s hurting himself, and he doesn’t even know how smart he is.”_
She was the first person who ever said that to me. From that day forward, I was at the front of Señora Rothstein’s class, trying to be the best student for her. And that is the importance of a good teacher and of education.
Educators all across Maryland are making a difference in children's lives every day because they see our students – no matter their background, race, religion, or family lineage.
It’s why I’m proud of the record investments my administration has made in Maryland’s public schools.
We passed the **_Excellence in Maryland Public Schools Act**_ to support our schools by recruiting more teachers and providing the necessary resources to our students.
And we’ve recently recruited fired federal workers into teaching jobs.
But, with a new school year just around the corner, I have to be transparent:**Trump has cut more than $480 million in funding for public schools since taking office, and it’s unclear what the impact will be on our state and our students.**
**[In the coming years, it will be more important than ever to have someone with Maryland’s students top of mind. If you’re with us, please contribute $5, $10, to help us keep fighting for the best for Maryland’s students.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250821-1?refcode=em-20250821-1&refcode2=483_1086043_yHf_XG&akid=483%2E1086043%2EyHf_XG)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250821-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250821-1&refcode2=483_1086043_yHf_XG&akid=483%2E1086043%2EyHf_XG)**
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250821-1?refcode=em-20250821-1&refcode2=483_1086043_yHf_XG&akid=483%2E1086043%2EyHf_XG)
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250821-1&t=2&refcode2=483_1086043_yHf_XG&akid=483%2E1086043%2EyHf_XG)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=483%2E1086043%2EyHf_XG)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=483%2E1086043%2EyHf_XG)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Sign: Texas hands Trump 5 seats. Tell Dem states to take them back.
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Texas Republicans are stealing the election. Here's how we can stop them](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td14ff10c-6e37-41cd-8eec-d6b4b5163c1b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta2625590-3278-42b0-b51e-04fbc522f5e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Republicans in [Texas just advanced](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9eb7d2d5-5479-4d55-a52c-ca19e1b27f11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) a Trump plan to rig the election — pushing wildly gerrymandered districts that that make House elections essentially irrelevant, and flip 5 seats from Democrats, and lock in GOP control of the House at the national level, even if most Americans don't want it. **But we can stop them -- if we fight back, and fight fire with fire. ** [California is now moving ahead](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7da27782-fe8f-40ad-8683-f43bf2252896/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) with a plan to flip 5 seats to Democrats, to offset Texas. Multiple other Democratic states are considering similar plans -- please join with us to urge them to do it. Look, we are not fans of gerrymandering, but Texas Republicans fired the first shot, and if we want to save our democracy, we need to hit back harder. If you're in a boxing match, and the other guy steps in the ring with a chainsaw, it's time to recognize that the rules have changed and to hell with taking the high road. [**Sign the petition, and urge Democratic states to move forward aggressively to counter the Texas plan, and to save our democracy.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T81955b9b-f0cd-4af9-b09d-b4fd20873ceb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

name: Team Freedom Va
subject: Join Us for Some Town Halls!
body:
Next week, the Virgnia House Democrats are kicking off their "Standing Up for Virginia" town hall series in Petersburg — and we want you to join us.
| | |
---
| |
---
| Hi there,
Next week, the Virgnia House Democrats are kicking off their "Standing Up for Virginia" town hall series in Petersburg -- and we want you to join us.
Featuring: Speaker Don Scott, Senator Lashrecse Aird, Delegate Dan Helmer, and Kimberly Pope Adams, candidate for House District 82
When: Tuesday, August 26, 6:00 PM
This town hall will focus on the challenges and opportunities facing Petersburg and the 82nd District -- from lowering costs and creating good-paying jobs to strengthening our schools and expanding access to affordable health care.

name: GIFFORDS
subject: In 75 days
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Anything we do right now could make the difference.
#

Good morning.
It’s Thursday, August 21, and we have an important request for you.
In exactly 75 days, millions of voters will vote in their November elections. GIFFORDS is working hard to elect dozens of gun safety candidates across the country — but we need your support these final few weeks.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250821-1-b&t=1&akid=10803%2E3935704%2EiRx41j)
We can flip the Virginia governor’s mansion blue, defeat Donald Trump’s endorsed candidate in New Jersey, and elect leaders who will put our families above the gun lobby.
**But these races could be decided by just a handful of votes — meaning anything you give today could mean the difference between winning and losing.**
[**GIFFORDS PAC is working to defeat extremist Republicans everywhere. If you can, please rush in $3 so we can reach more persuadable voters right now.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250821-1-b&t=2&akid=10803%2E3935704%2EiRx41j)

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: We are looking for a huge number of donations today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
I've heard the calls to "Do Something!" And I agree.

Last night, the Texas House of Representatives passed the maps Donald Trump asked for. Trump said he was entitled to five seats, and Greg Abbott delivered.
Pathetic.
I've long supported independent redistricting, but we can't just sit there and act holier than thou while we watch our democracy be totally degraded.
I've heard the calls to "Do Something!" And I agree.
So later today, the California legislature will call a special election on November 4th to pass the Election Rigging Response Act.
California will redraw our maps and neutralize what Texas has done to try to rig the 2026 elections before even one vote is cast. And God help us if we're not successful. We may have enjoyed our last free and fair election.
But all of us will have a role to play in passing these maps. I can't do this alone. **So what I am hoping for is an absolutely enormous number of individual donations today to help us get it done.**
The amount isn't nearly as important as the donation itself. What matters is everyone who can standing up to Trump and for the rule of law. So please:
[**I am asking, humbly, please make a contribution of any amount you can afford to help me pass the Election Rigging Response Act. Our average donation is $30. Many give more. Some give less. All that matters is that Democrats everywhere who care chip in today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250821-1&refcode2=2485_4767699_R8nWzB&akid=2485%2E4767699%2ER8nWzB)

I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and _won_. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and won.
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.
**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**
**[I’m personally asking, friend: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $5 now – split between my campaign and Jacky Rosen’s – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113726628/564727265/1703322652?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5593-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTZhYTdkMi05NzdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jmkjyZEMV3GzLmKhuvLbTX4fm4vD-D30I7oPWRQRbvM=)**
Thank you for standing with me.

In solidarity,

Sherrod Brown
|

clean_body: This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to. | | | = Friend: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service. So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind – while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Jacky Rosen will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do. This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to. When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and won_. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and won. Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one. Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support. = Thank you for standing with me. In solidarity, Sherrod Brown | *

name: Jon Ossoff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

**$5,** Peter.
That is the contribution I’m asking you to make — today — to my reelection campaign here in Georgia.
**$5** because winning in 2026 is our only hope to regain Congressional power and reverse this descent toward one-man rule.
**$5** because if the GOP flips this seat red and turns Georgia red, they will lock in control of the Senate for years to come.
**$5** because there is no path back from the brink of authoritarianism without defending this seat — the very seat that secured the Democratic majority in 2021.
You might think that a single $5 contribution can’t make a difference in an election as expensive and competitive as this one.
But as you read this, lots and lots of people are chipping in their own $5 — and it adds up fast when lots of people chip in.
[**Please use this link to make a $5 contribution to my reelection campaign today. My team and I will put your donation right to work WINNING this U.S. Senate race.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250821-1-f&t=1&akid=656%2E5691347%2EH1r0cB)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250821-1-f&t=2&akid=656%2E5691347%2EH1r0cB)**
Gratefully,
Jon Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=3&akid=656%2E5691347%2EH1r0cB) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=656%2E5691347%2EH1r0cB) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

subject: CNN's reporting about President Obama...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
In 75 days, Virginia will host the first statewide election since Trump took back power. It's urgent that we receive the resources to lay the foundation to win.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113729180/564734644/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-08-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTEwNGU0ZTUtOWE3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TpG-0a26iiWo80V2NroyOiHL2AlOKUU2R6mTC91lQYA=)
Check it out, Peter:

White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt **[put a New York Times reporter in his place](https://substack.com/redirect/ea426f6a-452b-413b-ab2a-d46c356341f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for asking why President Donald Trump took a call with Putin privately, instead of infront of European leaders visiting the White House.
"Only a reporter from the New York Times would ask a question like that!" Leavitt chastised the reporter in front of the press room.
**[Watch the tense moment here:](https://substack.com/redirect/ea426f6a-452b-413b-ab2a-d46c356341f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

**Today 's Fastest Growing Company Might Surprise You**
_🚨 _**No, it's not the publicly traded tech giant you might expect** ... Meet **[$MODE](https://substack.com/redirect/24e13f15-728f-42bd-b5e5-e40b61d278d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , the disruptor turning phones into potential income generators. _Investors are buzzing about the company's pre-IPO offering._
**📲 Mode saw 32,481% revenue growth from 2019 to 2022**, ranking them the #1 overall software company on Deloitte's recent fastest-growing companies list by aiming to pioneer _"**Privatized Universal Basic Income** "_ powered by technology -- not government. Their flagship product, **EarnPhone** , **[has already helped consumers earn& save $325M+](https://substack.com/redirect/24e13f15-728f-42bd-b5e5-e40b61d278d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
**🫴 Mode's Pre-IPO offering is live at $0.30/share, **and**** 50,000+ shareholders have already invested. They've just been granted the stock ticker **$MODE** by the Nasdaq, and **[you can still invest in their pre-IPO offering](https://substack.com/redirect/24e13f15-728f-42bd-b5e5-e40b61d278d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[at just $0.30/share before it closes.](https://substack.com/redirect/24e13f15-728f-42bd-b5e5-e40b61d278d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**🚨[Round closing -- invest at 0.30/share now.](https://substack.com/redirect/24e13f15-728f-42bd-b5e5-e40b61d278d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/24e13f15-728f-42bd-b5e5-e40b61d278d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Trump threatens California schools with funding cuts for transgender policy defiance
President Trump **[announced on Truth Social](https://substack.com/redirect/08972d37-cf2c-47cf-9c2d-c743732259b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that California school districts not adhering to his administration's transgender policies will lose federal funding, with California receiving around $44 billion in federal education funding for fiscal year 2025.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/08972d37-cf2c-47cf-9c2d-c743732259b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Title IX interpretation creates state-federal conflict** : The Trump administration interprets Title IX as requiring separate bathrooms, locker rooms, and sports teams based on biological sex, directly conflicting with California state law that allows students to use facilities based on gender identity.
* **Justice Department lawsuit targets California sports policies** : The DOJ sued California last month for allowing transgender-identifying males to compete in female sports, with Assistant Attorney General Harmeet Dhillon arguing this deprives girls of "athletic trophies" and ignores their safety.
* **Multiple school districts nationwide at risk** : Beyond California, Northern Virginia school districts including Alexandria City, Arlington County, Fairfax County, Loudoun County, and Prince William County are also threatened with federal funding loss for violating the administration's interpretation of Title IX.

Peter,

It’s the first day of the best state fair in the country, and I’m fired up. The Great Minnesota Get Together is one of my favorite times of the year because it shows the strength of Minnesota.
Whether it’s eating a corn dog, riding the sling shot with my daughter, Hope, or grabbing a bucket of Sweet Martha’s Cookies, the state fair brings all of us together. When I talk with Minnesotans at the fair (or get the chance to serve up some ice cream), I see the best of us.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113729439/564735629/1902708795?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmVkOWZhNS05YjdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pdlI_HXB2VptF2g7ZBfHTW4o4bk0dMlwCgkdKCP9XTk=)

The Great Minnesota Get Together is one of my favorite times of the year because it shows the strength of Minnesota. Whether it’s eating a corn dog, riding the sling shot with my daughter, Hope, or grabbing a bucket of Sweet Martha’s Cookies, the state fair brings all of us together. When I talk with Minnesotans at the fair (or get the chance to serve up some ice cream), I see the best of us. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I'm grateful, Tim Walz ********=******

subject: Trump wants to silence MSNBC next.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:

**FIRST:** Trump won the election, and MSNBC viewership PLUMMETED...

**THEN:** Elon Musk threatened to buy the network and turn it into another far-right media platform, _**and Democrats STEPPED UP to SAVE IT!**_ ⬇️ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/watch-msnbc/?source=VPP_20250821_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=20969%2E878179%2EQBxky1) **NOW:** Donald Trump and his minions are FURIOUS and threatening MSNBC with HORRIBLE attacks, so we need to make sure Democrats are still watching:

body:
Nancy Mace will be in the Upstate on Monday, August 25, 2025, with stops in both Greenville and Spartanburg. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace/upstate-join-nancy-mace?e=ddc57b5ede)

| |
---
| | **NANCY MACE INVITES YOU TO UPSTATE EVENTS**
_Mace To Speak in Greenville and Spartanburg Monday_ Nancy Mace will be in the Upstate on **Monday, August 25, 2025** , with stops in both **Greenville** and **Spartanburg**. This is your chance to hear directly from her about her vision for South Carolina’s future.

Hi Derek, If you want to know where the country is headed, look at Virginia. We’ve been called a bellwether for good reason: when we move forward, the nation follows. When we protect our rights here, it strengthens the fight everywhere. But the path ahead isn’t guaranteed. Republicans see Virginia as their proving ground; they’re ready to spend millions to flip seats, take back the House of Delegates, and slam the brakes on progress. **[Can you chip in today to keep Virginia blue? clean_body: What happens in Virginia matters everywhere | Hi Derek, If you want to know where the country is headed, look at Virginia. We’ve been called a bellwether for good reason: when we move forward, the nation follows. When we protect our rights here, it strengthens the fight everywhere. But the path ahead isn’t guaranteed. Republicans see Virginia as their proving ground; they’re ready to spend millions to flip seats, take back the House of Delegates, and slam the brakes on progress. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = But if Republicans win here, they’ll block common-sense legislation, roll back reproductive freedom, gut environmental protections, and make life harder for our communities. And they’ll use their win in VA as a model for national races. We’ve kept Virginia moving forward because we’ve fought for every seat, every district, every voter. That fight takes resources — and early dollars matter most. = We’ve won before when we stood together. Let’s do it again. — Team DPVA [content goes here] Forwarded this email? If you would like to receive fewer emails, we understand. to sign up for only the most important updates, or you can . name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Voting rights were hard-fought through blood, sweat, and determination
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=631%2E181023%2EWePhSb)
Earlier this month, we marked the 60th anniversary of the _Voting Rights Act_ — landmark legislation that secured the right to vote for millions of Americans during the Civil Rights Movement. A victory born from the bravery of those who marched across the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, Alabama.
These protections were hard-fought, through blood, sweat, and determination. But these **rights are currently under attack.**
I began my career in Montgomery, Alabama, working alongside those who carried the legacy of these hard-fought wins forward. That path led me to Detroit, where I had the honor of clerking for Judge Damon Keith, who reminded us that “democracies die behind closed doors.”
**[**This is a moment for our democracy. Like trailblazers before us, we’re standing at the foot of the bridge, marching into right-wing chaos to fight for our values. If you’re with us in this work, will you make a contribution today?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=631%2E181023%2EWePhSb)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/263?c0=jmb-em-q32025._u867d&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=631%2E181023%2EWePhSb)

[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=631%2E181023%2EWePhSb)
---
Right now, we have a Supreme Court that has allowed this presidential administration to tilt the balance of powers in favor of certain people. We have elected leaders who are willing to suppress voters’ voices, redraw districts, and spread lies about election officials who are simply trying to empower people to make their voices heard.
**[**I'm running for governor to make sure every Michigander can safely cast a secure ballot to make their voices heard. While some leaders work to dismantle our democracy, I'm working to rebuild it stronger than ever. If you’re with me, can I count on your support today?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=631%2E181023%2EWePhSb)**

Thank you,
Jocelyn Benson

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113732288/564745129/-492875955?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.21_VBM_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NThiZjc3Zi05ZjdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cucJ7hkPDFx9PsUiox4cNejiHTlBeT4htIUmNTuQtDs=) Folks, each time I've been sworn into Congress, I've worn a special scarf. It's imprinted with the document that granted my great-great-great-grandfather the right to vote in 1867. It's a reminder of how far people of color have come. For him, it was a privilege to vote. For me, it's a privilege to serve in the Senate. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State, **the history of voting rights can't be written without the help of people of color who fought tirelessly for it.** That's why when I heard of Donald Trump's latest attack on vote-by-mail, I was furious. It's not enough that he undermined an entire election and rolled back voting rights across the country, now he has to attack a service that 30% of Americans used in the last election. I won't sit idly by while he uses his power to launch attacks on marginalized communities and their ability to participate in our democracy. [**_I need you on my side, friend. Will you please chip in $10 right now to help Senate Democrats stop MAGA-attacks on voting rights? clean_body: You received this message from Lisa Blunt Rochester because you've previously taken action and supported Democrats like Lisa. If you would like to get less email, To unsubscribe, | | = = Folks, each time I've been sworn into Congress, I've worn a special scarf. It's imprinted with the document that granted my great-great-great-grandfather the right to vote in 1867. It's a reminder of how far people of color have come. For him, it was a privilege to vote. For me, it's a privilege to serve in the Senate. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State, the history of voting rights can't be written without the help of people of color who fought tirelessly for it. That's why when I heard of Donald Trump's latest attack on vote-by-mail, I was furious. It's not enough that he undermined an entire election and rolled back voting rights across the country, now he has to attack a service that 30% of Americans used in the last election. I won't sit idly by while he uses his power to launch attacks on marginalized communities and their ability to participate in our democracy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ****=** | | ****=**** | ****=**** | | ****=**** | ****=**** | | ****=**** Thank you, Lisa Blunt Rochester | = I officially became the first woman and person of color to ever represent Delaware in the Senate. But even though our campaign is over, the work has just begun. Will you chip in any amount today to help Bright Hope take center stage in the Senate? | = = Lisa Blunt Rochester for Senate PO BOX 9767 Wilmington, DE 19809 United States | mailto:info@lisabluntrochester.com Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Senate Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Respectfully asking:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey there, it's Jon. I'm respectfully asking: [**Can you rush $5 to my re-election campaign and the DSCC today?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21333?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250821-JonOssoff-OssoffDirectlyAskingTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250821-JonOssoff-OssoffDirectlyAskingTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=21042%2E9716520%2Eb1tYFA)

Sorry to be so direct, but winning in 2026 is our _only_ hope to regain Congressional power and reverse our ongoing descent toward one-man rule.

And I am the _only_ Democratic U.S. Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won.

That makes me MAGA's #1 target in 2026. They're _already_ spending MILLIONS of dollars to try to defeat me.

**_There is no path back from the brink of authoritarianism without defending this seat — the very seat that secured the Democratic majority in 2021.**_

So I'm asking for your help. Not for me, **for all of us.**

[**If you're able, please split a contribution of any amount to my campaign and the DSCC today.](https://go.dscc.org/go/21333?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250821-JonOssoff-OssoffDirectlyAskingTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250821-JonOssoff-OssoffDirectlyAskingTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=21042%2E9716520%2Eb1tYFA)**

The campaign will be brutal.

_But this team wins the hardest battles._

We flipped Georgia when no one thought it was possible.

Remember? We unseated an entrenched GOP incumbent to win the Senate majority.

And we will win again — with your help.

[**Please: send $5 to my re-election campaign and the DSCC today.****

| **[DONATE NOW](https://go.dscc.org/go/21333?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250821-JonOssoff-OssoffDirectlyAskingTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250821-JonOssoff-OssoffDirectlyAskingTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=21042%2E9716520%2Eb1tYFA)**
