name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Texas's extreme gerrymander will go through today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
NYT: Texas House Approves Redistricting Maps, Just as Trump Wanted [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=082125_1&amount=25]
Team: As much as we wanted to stop them, Texas's new gerrymandered maps will pass the state legislature today and be signed into law shortly thereafter.
President Trump pressured Texas legislators into an " aggressively partisan congressional map " — and possibly five new seats in the U.S. House next year for his party.
Needless to say, this didn't need to happen. While opponents of voting rights run Texas and have for decades, their state was already extremely gerrymandered to protect their own power. These new maps aim to dilute the voting power of the state’s Black and brown voters, harming Texans around the state and making it harder for them to have their voices heard in their elections.
Whether it's Texas, or Florida, or Indiana (or California and New York) or any other state that's considering partisan gerrymanders, this constant escalation will only silence more potential voters and leave citizens less pleased with their elections and their representation.
Extreme partisan gerrymanders depress turnout and drive down voter enthusiasm for participation in our elections. Help us fight back for fair maps with $25 or whatever you can today in Texas and beyond >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=082125_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082125_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082125_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082125_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082125_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082125_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082125_1&amount=35]
President Obama said it best this week: " Over the long term, we shouldn't have political gerrymandering in America, just a fair fight between Republicans and Democrats based on who's got better ideas."
He continued: " Texas is taking direction from a partisan White House and gerrymandering in the middle of a decade to try and maintain the House despite their unpopular policies ". This gerrymandering effort is simply a Trump/MAGA protection program.
It's also clear this is a racial gerrymander. For every 445,000 white Texans, there will be one congressional representative. That number rises for Hispanic Texans to 1.4 million residents for the same representation. For Black Texans, it takes 2 million residents for the same level of representation.
Fair maps and fair representation would mean those numbers were equal. Fair maps wouldn't look like a swirling vortex meant to grab *just enough* voters of certain demographics or party registration to spread them out and dilute their strength. Fair representation wouldn't be pushed through mid-decade at the request of a desperate president trying to distract from a failing economy and his involvement with an underage sex scandal.
Opponents of voting rights will stop at nothing in their pursuit of power and control. Please, chip in $25 or whatever you can to protect voting rights and fair representation >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=082125_1&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=082125_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=082125_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=8dRHB97ZdxUF8HcPKyaXUi8i1dnT1EjdYk2ClDkixZcgjISpmEPD7swgSL5J9avtixSU9gDAa1bzkp8VDL3QCbVizPDstYPipW8Q6eCD%2BHymiUs0p3p%2FAzGwOtCyXJVkN6hmGdnEexgJu0MTsOENCfxxsOGV3B3qineNag%2BqPKkJaKXVVNYjsCo27T3EEAOlwq5EOT9ZFeJSssckrqIgGPcFT1DsDuAfkpREWCETbUc%2FeWNnvbLf7InrO%2BU7Au0iyMu%2F2YGZwMUJeQyO%2F1AXIOdqpbwfD7C3LZdGZmt42j2fnAsBYDtfwFUPDhzj3aXJPVEbfpFyJAcJqnvxCmyjnq5rC43a6nq3XxxDWvpiO63ib%2B5ls2c2r3kKUUsfxCfjTxXlRT8kaO6MNajcsSxfieCn%2FU2HBI49mhIKrpP9n6A%3D .

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: Who’s to blame for your insane electric bill?
body:
Peter, Ok, it’s time to get real, friends. Because that’s what we do here at Common Sense Club. We were all treated to a shock when we got our INSANELY high electric bills out of the blue in June. It was already bad.
| | [ ]()
---
Peter, Ok, it’s time to get real, friends. Because that’s what we do here at Common Sense Club. We were all treated to a shock when we got our INSANELY high electric bills out of the blue in June. It was already bad. We were already struggling under the weight of crushing income taxes, chart-topping property taxes, and overall costs of living. And then, _this._ New Jersey electricity costs are now the 12th highest nationally. We got mad — and rightly so. Immediately, Murphy and his Trenton (and DC) co-conspirators (and that includes you, Ms. Sherrill...) got to work spinning the blame away from themselves and onto literally anyone and anything else. Because when you and your party are responsible for making New Jerseyans pay hundreds of dollars more a month to cool their homes, you probably aren’t going to do well on Election Day. If it weren’t for that reality, we can guarantee they wouldn’t give a crap. But let’s back up a little. Governor Murphy has bowed the knee to the Green New Deal agenda from day one. He’s on a mad dash to destroy New Jersey faster than Gavin Newsom is destroying California. He signed the “Clean Energy Act” in May 2018 that led to the shutting down of our state’s coal and nuclear power plants (the last one shut down in December 2022) with no viable and immediately ready “clean” alternative to offset this lost source of energy. Then in 2020, he signed his moronic Executive Orders 100 and 315 – his “Energy Master Plan” – to force the state into 100% clean energy by 2035. With no viable alternatives and the PJM struggling to keep pace with integrating new energy sources (quite understandably given that Murphy’s plan was all about an ideological win for his donors and not at all about the realities of powering the state), prices spiked. And that amazing offshore wind energy we keep hearing about that is supposed to solve all these problems? Yeah, getting that infrastructure up and running keeps being pushed out – two plus years at this point. But who do we hear as the favorite target of blame for Murphy, Mikie, and company? These sweeping, rapid and ill-advised policy changes that shut down an entire sector of energy production? Nope. The blame lies with PJM. They’re “too slow to connect chiefly renewable projects to [their] grid” (Source: New Jersey Monitor). Oh, yeah, and AI data centers. What about the $100 energy credit? That’s partly funded by fines paid by energy suppliers that don’t meet the green energy goals that caused this problem to begin with. The cycle of Leftist Lunatics creating problems that they “save us” from using dollars they steal from businesses and taxpayers through heavy-handed mandates continues. And the temporary credits? Assemblyman Alex Sauickie pointed out these feel more like a political bribe than real relief. He was quoted in NJBiz.com — “Electric bills have tripled because of state Democrats’ failed leadership and policies, and now they want to buy votes with $160 of temporary credits. What’s worse is while ratepayers would normally pay less in the winter for their electricity, bills will be shockingly high because customers will be forced to pay it all back. This isn’t a rebate, it’s a bribe.” You’re not wrong, sir. Mikie wants to distance herself from Murphy’s legacy on this, but facts are stubborn things. And here, we call out the BS. Sherrill said as recently as February that she supports Murphy’s 2035 push, saying “I love those goals!” (as reported by Politico, of all places). Plus, she frequently doubles down on her support for offshore wind. She’s endorsed by the one and only Sierra Club – proud promoters of the Green New Deal – and the League of Conservation Voters who are dying on the hill of offshore wind against all odds, our pocketbooks be damned. If you just want some straight answers and a reasonable electricity bill, you’re not alone. That’s most of us. That’s why we’re the Common Sense _Majority_. They think we’re stupid. But they’re soon going to find out _they_ were the stupid ones. For New Jersey,
---

---

Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsenseclub.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsenseclub.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.

Peter — I recently went on CBS News Miami to expose the one truth that insurance companies desperately don't want you to know _(and most Floridians don’t realize)_ : **Florida's Attorney General has the power to take on insurance companies and hold them accountable.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113734652/564752031/860755201?refcode=em_JJR_FR_Insurance_082125&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjVjNGFmZTctYTA3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zLg6I42pu7f-NphZPBimwMaM9Fn-fDXJo_TYJ_a3vn4=&emci=e09b6da7-ed7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=65c4afe7-a07e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=32374386)** They have the power to bring lawsuits. They have the power to question and investigate how CEOs can rake in millions of dollars, yet don't have the money to pay for claims once those devastating storms come through. It's not uncommon for Attorneys General to bring actions against insurance companies or conduct investigations into how their constituents and the people of their state are treated. But you never hear about it because here in Florida, we haven't had an Attorney General in decades who's used the power of the office the way it's supposed to be used. Instead, the insurance companies get everything they want in Tallahassee. **They had better buckle up – because as your next Attorney General, I will sue, I will investigate, and I will hold insurance companies accountable when they take advantage of the working people and families of our state.** **[Peter: If you're sick and tired of seeing our leaders put special interests over the needs of everyday people, or if you're frustrated by skyrocketing insurance rates and powerful interests taking advantage of you and your family — then I ask that you chip in just a few dollars to my campaign to power this movement forward and help me shake up the status quo in Florida>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113734653/564752040/1801001640?amount=10&refcode=em_JJR_FR_Insurance_082125&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjVjNGFmZTctYTA3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zLg6I42pu7f-NphZPBimwMaM9Fn-fDXJo_TYJ_a3vn4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113734654/564752060/1801001640?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=em_JJR_FR_Insurance_082125&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjVjNGFmZTctYTA3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zLg6I42pu7f-NphZPBimwMaM9Fn-fDXJo_TYJ_a3vn4=) **

clean_body: (Most Floridians don’t realize this) | Peter — I recently went on CBS News Miami to expose the one truth that insurance companies desperately don't want you to know (and most Floridians don’t realize) : Florida's Attorney General has the power to take on insurance companies and hold them accountable. They have the power to bring lawsuits. They have the power to question and investigate how CEOs can rake in millions of dollars, yet don't have the money to pay for claims once those devastating storms come through. It's not uncommon for Attorneys General to bring actions against insurance companies or conduct investigations into how their constituents and the people of their state are treated. But you never hear about it because here in Florida, we haven't had an Attorney General in decades who's used the power of the office the way it's supposed to be used. Instead, the insurance companies get everything they want in Tallahassee. They had better buckle up – because as your next Attorney General, I will sue, I will investigate, and I will hold insurance companies accountable when they take advantage of the working people and families of our state. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Let's do this! Jose Javier Rodriguez | = = PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL Jose Javier Rodriguez for Attorney General 701 S. Howard Avenue #106-813 Tampa, FL 33606

name: VoteVets
subject: The GOP is straight up lying about what they did to Medicaid
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
They’ve been back home the last few weeks trying to tell folks they didn’t make any cuts to Medicaid. You can look it up, it’s on tape. It’s nuclear grade gaslighting.
#
Peter, we were all living on the same planet when Republicans in Congress passed a budget that stripped health care from hundreds of millions of people and gave tax cuts to billionaires and trillionaires.
That wasn’t a dream.
They’ve been back home the last few weeks trying to tell folks they didn’t make any cuts to Medicaid. You can look it up, it’s on tape. It’s nuclear grade gaslighting.
Here’s the truth: 4.4 million Veterans live in rural America. 1 in 10 Veterans rely on Medicaid. Hospitals will close. People will die.
Cutting that care isn’t just cruel — it’s an attack. And Veterans are going to be among the people that attack hurts the most.
These MAGA sickos are lying through their teeth about Medicaid cuts because they know how bad they are. They think they’re going to get away with it. We will not let them.
VoteVets will hang this budget around their necks and bash them in the face with it from now until next November. Nobody’s going to forget it.
[**We’ll do whatever we can to win back the House and Senate in 2026, and we’ll do it the way no one else can. body:
You can't make this up, friend.| | | Friend,
The politicians in denial about DC’s crime problem are the **same ones** who insisted that Joe Biden was **_'sharp as a tack'_** last year.
That same blind arrogance is how **Jay Jones** helped turn DC into the most violent city in America.
**When Jay Jones was DC's Assistant Attorney General:**
❌ Violent Crime jumped **24.3%**
❌ Murders spiked **28.5%**
❌ Carjackings happened **nearly every single day**
And now Jay wants to bring his DC-style agenda into Virginia? Absolutely not.Jay Jones lied to voters about crime in DC and is now doing the same in Virginia. **He wants us to forget:**
❌ He voted to **release** rapists, murderers, and drug dealers early
❌ He fought to make drug dealing near schools **less punishable**
❌ He **opposed** jail time for repeat abusers
We cannot let this failed radical bring his DC disaster home to Virginia.
**Help me expose the lies, protect our communities, and win this race in November.**

🚨🚨🚨BREAKING NEWS🚨🚨🚨
California just became the first Democratic state to launch a mid- decade redistricting plan to counter Donald Trump and Greg Abbott’s map-rigging scheme.
Gov. Gavin Newsom and Democratic leaders have announced the Election Rigging Response Act — a constitutional amendment, a new congressional map, and a $100 million voter campaign to be decided this November 4 .
We’re standing with them — because this is how Democrats fight back and WIN.
But we have less than 90 days to help mobilize the grassroots, and Republicans are already attacking the plan.
We need your help right now: Will you rush $10 so we can help pass California’s plan, stop GOP gerrymandering, and defend democracy nationwide? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-abbott?refcode=082125_1]
Here’s what’s at stake:
* Trump and Abbott are redrawing Texas’ map to grab 5 more GOP seats.
* California’s plan can neutralize their power grab — and inspire other blue states to act.
* This will be close, expensive, and we cannot afford to fall short.
If we win, Democrats set the standard for fighting back in eve ry state.

name: State Democrats HQ
subject: These are the five Senate seats most likely to flip in 2026 according to The Hill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
We've got some good news and some bad news
#
We’ve got some good news and some bad news, Peter.
**_The Hill_ just released its list of the top FIVE U.S. Senate seats that are most likely to flip in 2026.** We’ll start with the good news:
_North Carolina, Maine, and Texas all made the list._
**If we’re going to restore our Democratic majority in 2026, we absolutely NEED to flip these GOP-held Senate seats.**
**[FLIP THESE SEATS: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93944?refcode=em20250821-9305&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9305%2E614464%2EmsjaDF)**
Now, here’s the bad news, Peter:
_Georgia and Michigan also made the list._
**These Dem-held Senate seats are two that we MUST defend in 2026.**
Georgia will be one of the most competitive and expensive Senate races happening next year. And Michigan’s open seat could provide the perfect opportunity for the GOP to gain even more control than they already have.
**[DEFEND THESE SEATS: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93944?refcode=em20250821-9305&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9305%2E614464%2EmsjaDF)**
Republican groups are already spending MILLIONS of dollars to attack the Democrats running in these critical elections. **Over the next year, they’ll spend whatever it takes to keep their grip on the GOP’s Senate majority.**
That’s why we’re urgently asking for your help, Peter.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: The date has been set!
body:
Last week we were informed that the U.S. Supreme Court has scheduled oral arguments for Wednesday, October 8th, in our lawsuit challenging an Illinois law “extending” Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law.

|
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Last week we were informed that the **U.S. Supreme Court** has scheduled oral arguments for **Wednesday, October 8 th**, in our lawsuit challenging an Illinois law "extending" Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law.
**October 8 th** is the _third day_ after the opening of the High Court's fall term...
...**and the early scheduling of our oral argument reflects the importance of this lawsuit as we get closer and closer to the critical 2026 congressional midterm elections.**
October 8th is a big day for **Judicial Watch** ...and it is an even more important day for the cause of honest elections in America!
**And as the calendar counts down to October 8 th, [I urge you to make an urgent tax-deductible contribution to support our work today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76107&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2).**
| [HELP US DO THE HEAVY LIFTING FOR ELECTION INTEGRITY](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76107&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

No one... _including the Trump Justice Department_ ...is fighting as hard as **Judicial Watch** to shut down attempts by the Left to corrupt our election processes and tilt the electoral playing field in their favor.

* We are also in court against **California** and **Mississippi** over their laws "extending" Election Day beyond the federally mandated "_first Tuesday after the first Monday in_ _November_ ," because they also violate federal law and open wide the door to massive voter fraud!

[SUPPORT US AS WE PRESENT OUR CASE BEFORE THE SUPREME COURT](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76107&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

* And we are in court against **California, Illinois and Oregon** over their failure to clean their voter rolls as federal law requires...because keeping our elections honest requires persistent, sustained hard work.

This work is how we have already been able to force states to remove over **_5 MILLION_** ineligible voter registrations from their voter rolls...that's over **5 MILLION** opportunities for voter fraud we have eliminated!

[FUEL THE FIGHT FOR HONEST ELECTIONS](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76107&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

_The opportunities facing Judicial Watch are great_ ... _and so are our achievements in fighting for honest elections._

_But the challenges are just as great as you know the Left will fight tooth and nail to stop our clean election law efforts_!

That's why I hope you will _[stand with us today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76107&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)_ , as we prepare for one of the most important court appearances in our 31-year history.

And thank you for taking the time to consider my appeal today!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76107&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

clean_body: Last week we were informed that the U.S. Supreme Court has scheduled oral arguments for Wednesday, October 8th, in our lawsuit challenging an Illinois law “extending” Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law. | | | | | | Dear Fellow American, Last week we were informed that the U.S. Supreme Court has scheduled oral arguments for Wednesday, October 8 th, in our lawsuit challenging an Illinois law "extending" Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law. October 8 th is the third day after the opening of the High Court's fall term... ...and the early scheduling of our oral argument reflects the importance of this lawsuit as we get closer and closer to the critical 2026 congressional midterm elections. October 8th is a big day for Judicial Watch ...and it is an even more important day for the cause of honest elections in America! And as the calendar counts down to October 8 th, . | No one... including the Trump Justice Department ...is fighting as hard as Judicial Watch to shut down attempts by the Left to corrupt our election processes and tilt the electoral playing field in their favor. We are also in court against California and Mississippi over their laws "extending" Election Day beyond the federally mandated "first Tuesday after the first Monday in November ," because they also violate federal law and open wide the door to massive voter fraud! And we are in court against California, Illinois and Oregon over their failure to clean their voter rolls as federal law requires...because keeping our elections honest requires persistent, sustained hard work. This work is how we have already been able to force states to remove over 5 MILLION ineligible voter registrations from their voter rolls...that's over 5 MILLION opportunities for voter fraud we have eliminated! The opportunities facing Judicial Watch are great ... and so are our achievements in fighting for honest elections. But the challenges are just as great as you know the Left will fight tooth and nail to stop our clean election law efforts! That's why I hope you will , as we prepare for one of the most important court appearances in our 31-year history. And thank you for taking the time to consider my appeal today! Sincerely, Thomas Fitton President | | Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 Third Street SW, Suite 800 Washington, DC 20024 ©2024, All Rights Reserved Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Contributions are received from individuals, foundations, and corporations and are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. | |

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5b3385251fa346ff8eb63e67b83201b1&_e=ynQ3ETfIY6SZCA74WxnS6quv4mIslQUyVgWybV1Zai8k1bEfTLEUGLrKVZxN_3E0UiWkrQ1NXEJQsA7Ks_tyAU8ERH-Ak_DK5nmxhR8LnsNdjXI-eODVELlt_9QLhXvuu2W1p1V1_IgBOpPSOFv7FZTrJznGJCHvXRv2vWKdZ9U45-TxdyZx8LePZlaDfBlM2gE4QXtDR93dm_r4OZ43TPzKbkQSnuBXpuxP7F1Pj2haJFaX_WgfKaphlNyzAXRpYDFOOOFywOqxFK7X8dK3o8deXjMON993ggzuy_uZ7E-z8L3ErJqNcHidY2_EgNpyIRoAk9IK36AuRM0Z1E02MIjyweK-FVN9IBHMoz6bw-S4Y8suvgLsZ5BXxx3xPOWjEON26aCONdWyVktWQ0uvFDJtSJ3Hi_2lebCiKIkOJbRcTXvrfpIJSY4H1G9O6dGrFlInlso2uegTuBt-7010yNTxVF7lJc70BmjrVZ7lGvqbvrPBlqQXhQfXW59f09CN-1xIGw5BxieOqctdUGjNCsVSdr0rzc9yp8UXa0hK5-gRizGNY0GiX6N6s_tvXFtmTleiWIO-RIgQLNCQx4u70tzvgAx4Edo_IC2PDnz_nsO3e3W5UZfK0Lec4tmVqemIAC9tXo9GGTClJvAZRs2YPlsNb1AbnULonXoKmcbp34WLjpB18blIFLDSwWSbSzU_g4ujHzWtOXwlF2C8_ArRENBRloNgypsNXd3TnRbFM0hQRCgSwBaCxj1jSbDMhRKH)Hey Patriot,
Just wanted to take a second and introduce myself.
My name is Monica De La Cruz - I'm a free-thinking Hispanic woman. I'm a Christian conservative. And I'm running to defend the most competitive congressional seat in America.
In the 2022 midterms, we made history when we successfully flipped this seat red in a region that has voted blue for over 100 years.
It is now the one seat Democrats need to win back to completely control the federal government - scary, I know.
I too am afraid of what happens to America under the rule of Democrats... but what I'm not afraid of is taking them head-on.
National Democrats, the liberal media, and the radical Left despise me for who I am and what I believe.
They're the very same people who will tell you my skin color determines who I am and nothing else.
The people who will tell you I can't be pro-life or pro-family because I'm a woman.
The people who will tell you that I can't be pro-law enforcement and pro-border security because I'm Hispanic.
My being and my values destroy the entire platform of the Democratic Party and the liberal narrative.
And don't they know it!
That's exactly why the DCCC and Democrat mega-donors are unloading millions of dollars right now - to defeat me at all costs.
They're going to spend, say, and do whatever it takes to flip this seat back to blue, and ensure it stays that way for another century.

null, it's Team Haley Stevens here with a warning:

Republicans are openly floating plans to privatize Social Security – including Donald Trump’s own treasury secretary.
Here’s what privatization would mean:

📉 You’d hand your hard-earned Social Security to hedge funds.

🎯 They’d gamble your retirement on the stock market.

🔥 All so they can gut the system and sell it off.
It’s not a fix. It’s a cash grab for Wall Street.

But Haley Stevens has a different idea: _**How about we protect what working people have earned?** _
Haley will never stop fighting to protect retirement security for Michigan families. But we need your voice to help shape our fight:
**

name: Gregory Wrightstone, CO2 Coalition
subject: The truth they’ve hidden about the so-called climate emergency – delivered to your inbox
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206wvdvw9vffyyl1fd6oiqke1qka8aadh7pyq1dofl5u40qeuce58blj7p83sxkjta05hz8ib4kxbrybh13&__stmp=t1cp2y&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1cp2y&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1hfzt2h2xnfjcz31y326h34oh7elitjhs68a4v1squklw7vzec5v8pd8km2bqvcmqy9jaj6scoz41pk2mma9zet5jgclf13f9591vcx7t6aybhprdbpr2a1umezv3e619plmnpx65c&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1cp2y&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1cp2y&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1cp2y&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1cp2y&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1hfzt2h2xnfjcz31y326h34oh7elitjhs68a4v1squklw7vzec5v8pd8km2bqvcmqy9jaj6scoz41pk2mma9zet5jgclf13f9591vcx7t6aybhprdbpr2a1umezv3e619plmnpx65c&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1cp2y&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1cp2y&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Hassan Martini
subject: Time to address the elephant in the room - The Do Nothing Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DS9fi8hUq1S8zgcF5CeUO1aXp5EmPc8g9DWU1bVsfD5ohC7YupOq00IOp68QvXJ0ILjm5RlUv4NiVWihEjnAvMNvbkvHkzY9kEWxKyF3mp6qDV6vibHPk3y7j1oz8zaibcX_nHcYBeJpovRKUySHXlk4Qwd29NcyiRxJ12kOzzt1uXQ40jGYYFJSM7TFzEnXnfPZ_mlTX8HT1hATBAj7vv6YFhJvy8ZCftZQJ_LwfHxp__R2qbkc0urd-spGF9qeFHCsPBiA2jLR3VCgll1yEFbBvLpVbXqeXUD6bV7mK0ycxIcfcIPPukKGiEz7QQ7kyPXd0Kt3638yUxp04FZFNWuL4RDPgl5Snw9C04AEsvKc/4j8/kSmk7_BYR9y6I-6F9AeLJQ/h0/h001.d1s28XBnAaDL94M5PIlC_GM6PfuD5QupaxAOm4znTIg)
---
Friend, My entire life, I have been taught to follow the rules, abide by the laws, **and try my best to do good when and where I can.** Recently, I have been having a hard time sleeping and even going about my life. The weight of this moment has been dawning on me. The rules and laws we've been following are being written and carried out by men and women with no conscience or human decency. The laws themselves are immoral. **So what do I do? What do we do?** What do we do when the law is to abduct children? What do we do when the law is to murder children indiscriminately, as is the case with Israel--whom we fund and effectively give the green light to do whatever they want? What do we do when the government has turned its back on its people and acts in ways that go against the very fabric of what it means to be an American? I am struggling to rationalize this moment, _**and I think it 's because it cannot be rationalized.**_ We are living in a very dark time, not just here in America but globally. Every morning, I wake up, watch the news, and then see my three children come down the stairs one by one. I smile because it's still early in the morning and they haven't driven me crazy yet; but in that moment, I can't help but wonder: **what kind of country are we leaving for them?** I don't want this message to be one of desperation, tragedy, or regret. I want to share with you a behind-the-scenes look at what this work means and why we do it. I founded No Dem Left Behind with the hope of uplifting folks across the country who are ideologically aligned with the progressive movement but do not have a local community they can turn to for help or support. **Then Gaza happened,** and we learned the hard way that for some in the Democratic Party, "progressive" meant everything except Palestine. That was my red line. We have no choice but to fight: fight for our country, fight for our democracy, fight for our way of life--for our children and for generations to come. I am not done fighting for our progressive values, **and I know you aren 't either.** But we must do better as a movement, because, to be completely honest, we have never been weaker than we are right now. Our leadership in Congress--Schumer, Jeffries--**has failed us.** They are the textbook definition of coastal elites who simply don't get it. They ignored the inflation crisis that gave Trump the opening to seize power in the first place. **The fight we face right now is inside the Democratic primaries.** I have met with dozens of progressive challengers who are taking on do-nothing Democrats. We need leaders who will fight for us, who believe in our values, and who will do whatever it takes to win back this country and do good for the American people. That's why I'm asking you: _**stand with us. Join this fight.**_ Chip in today to help progressive challengers take on the establishment and win. For our future, for the next generation, for our values, and for the hope that this country can still offer the dreams it once promised.
---
[ Join Our Fight Today! ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DS9fi8hUq1S8zgcF5CeUO1aXp5EmPc8g9DWU1bVsfD5rLF-R72z9eFUNLFgzToDB9FAHdumwteKRn7TdUUzvNYKJcoIYzTcQ0nkypkXT_eNB2q3XDPkr8I0YA3Fb3hcSgkg9Zn7bteM7CGpIl3mrx6lgkIcShjBRqtGvtdkh_T_pPCiy6cWdcp28tv39qvaQ2vM6LmaOsY9H8NMnFhLXyoANxM7Q5f832pO7E9e8Ov49LH_DebH3W_bsa-yZG0TmfeSWp75hsFnQhK0-552qWLT3y-ps3ToCUHkJ8Bt_V90c8tMtM_O-_nYLLtqWGeJ8Fs4ru4SDGcmXo1cLlZKkh-dAYCxTWhegFrhCwQeQ5g1Y/4j8/kSmk7_BYR9y6I-6F9AeLJQ/h1/h001.IRRrUDqLU8yCCsgbsE9kik3_DtyVQOwzFsXx9rc9nZ4)

name: DNC HQ
subject: BREAKING: Trump announces plan to end mail-in voting
body:
---
Derek, **Trump just said he would “lead a movement” to end mail-in voting ahead of the midterms.** This is a code red emergency and an assault on our democracy. Trump is threatening an unprecedented attack on the voting rights of millions of Americans. Meanwhile, the DNC is _already_ suing Trump for his last unlawful executive order attempting to suppress the rights of voters and investing _big_ in organizing programs in every single state to make sure folks have all of the information they need to cast their votes this year and beyond. **No matter your circumstances or location, every American deserves equal access to make their voices heard.** At the DNC, we’re committed to fighting for the right to a safe and accessible method of voting for folks nationwide. **[If ensuring the right to vote safely and accessibly matters to you, please consider pitching in $3 to help the DNC invest in fighting back against Trump’s threats to end mail-in voting and attempts to unlawfully limit the rights of voters.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250821_4379_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4391_22930333_py01KI&akid=4391%2E22930333%2Epy01KI)** _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250821_4379_fr&refcode2=4391_22930333_py01KI&akid=4391%2E22930333%2Epy01KI)**

Peter,
TikTok designed its app to addict and prey upon young people, causing serious harm to them in the process. My office’s extensive investigation showed this wasn’t by accident — the app’s addictiveness is the result of choices made year after year by TikTok’s leadership.
The more kids who are addicted to TikTok, the more money the company makes, and the more kids’ mental health suffers. This isn’t just deeply immoral — it’s illegal.
Here’s my bottom line: I’ll protect Minnesota’s kids. That’s why I’m suing TikTok to stop them from preying on children and violating consumer protection laws.
Our records show that you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. That means you can donate $75 (or $150 for couples) to our campaign and receive a full refund.
[**Peter, will you make your refundable $75 donation right now to support the fight against exploitative corporations like TikTok?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113737576/564760089/-517326047?refcode=body&amount=75&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjAzMWQxOC1hNzdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OdnLcMJuAvJg-BfDkzzK5PC02baxjzVPayEl7j6pazo=)

But even as we celebrate, Trump and his MAGA Republicans are working to turn Minnesota red and impose their extreme agenda on our state. To stop them, we must stand together and fight back against Trump and his assault on Minnesota values. = | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | = | = | | = Thank you, Minnesota DFL | = * = = Monthly supporters are the backbone of all we do. Join the DFL Victory Club today to help us build the infrastructure we need to defend our values from Donald Trump's extreme agenda. = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | Paid for by Minnesota Democratic–Farmer–Labor Party Minnesota Democratic–Farmer–Labor Party 255 Plato Blvd St. Paul, MN 55107 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

**FAMILY SERVICE OF ROANOKE VALLEY FUNDRAISER** Since 1901 Family Service of Roanoke Valley has been a cornerstone of Roanoke Valley's community assistance ecosystem. Offering community based services, mental health counseling, and youth development programs, they have proven over the years that dedicating quality time, resources, and compassion are the building blocks of changing someone's life. Please consider donating to support their work.
---
**CALL ON CONGRESS TO SAVE CRITICAL FOOD PROGRAMS** Food security is a cornerstone of healthy, thriving communities, and programs like Feeding Southwest Virginia ensure that no family has to go without a meal. With the current Farm Bill extension set to expire on **September 30** , it's critical that Congress fully funds nutrition programs that support families, seniors, and children in our region. Call your representative [here](https://clicksp.sam4va.com/f/a/oTVSpegsnIKQfIr6cuomKw~~/AAPPABA~/xHI6fI9Mop8iFRCQ-wdeOjZi13OYjVgw9pTcEhb51fnwh4NiwrqwWp4NLuAOHCL2sSiuRkd1WAQE_YIaIAzvHM4zaZH-7ZnP9I0FUGsgxmhXYk4kf39g0VALX_GvieYfuPdg9C5VvjCa-EPxClVyJTV8marGHNfp-3nqYMaMosTEv0Yz0Wk_lWZfuEGTg5XnuToyZR0yWCddAAzcUK3c-pXEEyX-xBgsgOI6CCMKtdXER2iz1Gji3wkAzVNe5z-f48mPR8WwKKrhBFFyVkS02YGkcEqeBPimi4ZLT6S0NOIIhqDOXjVeqLetRdxX97GW).

**THE ENCAMPMENTS SCREENING AND DISCUSSION** When campuses are no longer a safe space for free speech, we permit those in positions of power to impede on the rights of all. On Monday, we watched "The Encampments" \- a documentary showcasing the bravery of those on our college campuses, protesting the genocide of Palestinians. It is only when we fight together that we can make real change.

**WELCOME FIRST WEEK OF CLASSES, RCPS STUDENTS!** Welcome back, Roanoke City Public Schools students! I know you will thrive this school year and make your teachers and families proud. I'm excited for all the accomplishments ahead and can't wait to see the amazing things you achieve in 2025-26!

Offering community based services, mental health counseling, and youth development programs, they have proven over the years that dedicating quality time, resources, and compassion are the building blocks of changing someone's life. Please consider donating to support their work. name: Forward Party
subject: Gerrymandering - More Than Just A Weird Word
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Here's what's happening in the Forward world...

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_76&n=1)
---
Thursday, August 21, 2025 | Peter -- If you've been watching the news the last few weeks, you've seen headlines like this about the [President calling for Texas to gerrymander](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=wWw1LGKe09YoyrHaTkDQ4GG1qh98GYcXj0zaOWKzAER4qovKwmMDnHPRCv6QBprkxCZ6wDkWGuQhl8gBSrmRdXIVmYHcyPV6QoHPDyaDIVY&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_76&n=2) its districts in the middle of the decade to pick up a few extra seats. And you've also seen these headlines about [Governor Newsom saying he'll gerrymander California](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=8c4KZMXYR5lO6Tv9ZXupefpVwQzRAlcLQGeNfkQUKXUUo8a1PjOcCiqdSmVxJkbWo5xCbOEsZ5zfqUCbfPEcwj-GL4FJtmHcJpTgbO0s0Rfgx7phezm1PVWtIVwMik3j&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_76&n=3) back. You've heard it before, and you've heard it from us. But that doesn't mean it's any less important to say now. **Gerrymandering is corrupt - it's wrong and no one should be ok with it.** Politicians choosing their voters to ensure political power and silence the voices of those they disagree with is, perhaps, the single least American action our legislators take. Our government is supposed to represent all of us. No one should be made irrelevant because their opinion is different than their neighbors. Watch Forward Party Executive Chair Lt. Governor Kerry Healey and also Forward Party Comms Director John Goodwin discuss Gerrymandering in the links below. **Lt. Governor Kerry Healey** [****](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEouH4SjeZmYtvTWulgNFAfYFzKpiTmVMknz4i-He_MQR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_76&n=4)**John Goodwin** [****](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrElvOpmjN9I-_NFVU9W97JTes-JC1V-_LwKwG4DfyXi6F&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_76&n=5)
**[Forward Endorsed Congressman Don Davis Embraces The Forward Party](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=jMHeSgphcTZt4V4qO_V_4v1VgnHeiC1TyKZQJdIPORiSFOIzi8qox0ptBmn8CPkMEhzoGsvyL8-8TAhfle8AcY4ckTREFxGeI3aV0Qi_QvKWns4h5aCDmG50Kea5cIQJ&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_76&n=6)** | **WUNC** "It's not about the parties. It's not about the labels. It's about the policy. It's about the principles, about how we're able to help families," Davis said at a virtual meeting of the North Carolina Forward Party last Thursday. **[NC Forward Chair Patrick Newton Discussed Redistricting](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=w3B_spA9pBxvNsPGvqwYO6Kaf5U7UkjlvldZktcDbAteD-qq2K3H3VbT1tDQuF4CYNfGirIjH0zOlWVQrt27Nu3sksHfn2KHI2DQ342VNLlbqYGUBCirr-3lzWVQn7x8ijU6ulzp6qeiy-VqRpx1fg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_76&n=7)** | **Spectrum Local News** In the midst of all the chaos around redistricting, Patrick Newton, chair of the North Carolina Forward Party, weighs in on the controversy in Texas and California.
**August 21 | BVC Fireside Chat With Rep. Jermaine Johnson
** Join us for a powerful virtual fireside chat with South Carolina State Representative **Jermaine Johnson** , hosted by the **Forward Party Black Voters Committee**. This engaging conversation, moderated by **Larry Weathers** , will dive into Rep. Johnson’s journey from athlete to legislator, his alignment with Forward Party values, and his vision for coalition-driven political change. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/bvc_fireside_chat_with_rep_jermaine_johnson?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_76&n=8)** **August 21 | Civic Engagement With The Young Forwardists
** Beliefs matter—but without action, they’re only words. If you’re passionate about making change and don’t want to wait to make an impact, you’re in the right place. Join our Summer of Civic Engagement Policy Meeting, where driven young people come together to tackle pressing issues, craft legislation, and work to turn ideas into reality. This is your opportunity to take initiative, speak up, and create meaningful change. We’re ready to get to work, join our team! **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/civic_engagement_20250821?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_76&n=9)** **August 25 | BVC Fireside Chat With Rep. Jermaine Johnson
** Are you interested in becoming a leader in your community who brings politics back to the people? If so, this is your opportunity to take initiative by creating your own Young Forwardist Chapter. Join our National High School Chapter meeting. As part of our biweekly check-ins, we will be navigating ways the national Young Forwardists committee can best support our high school chapters. Whether it's providing club meeting materials to leadership training, we are here to help. Join us! **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/national_high_school_chapter_meeting_20250825?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_76&n=10)** **August 28 | FWD NJ Happy Hour - Middlesex Meet Up
** Bring a friend, grab a drink, and let’s talk about how we can strengthen our communities together! Join the Forward Party of New Jersey for an evening of connection and conversation at our Middlesex Social Hour. This is a chance to meet neighbors, local leaders, and fellow Forwardists who believe politics should be about solving problems, not fueling division. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/paulnjeb/fwd_nj_happy_hour_--_middlesex_meet-up?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_76&n=11)** **August 28 | NOVA Forward Monthly Meet Up
** Join Forward NOVA for our regular open meeting! We have the opportunity to make a stand for democracy and civil engagement in the face of the political chaos coming out of DC. We have a lot of work to do and need your help. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/nova_fwd_monthly_20250828?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_76&n=12)**
**[Lindsey Drath on Expanding the Two-Party Political System](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_BNtuvNT9V_JqWn2w6nllybg76_jEKRlGk5D0uhEsPoUHtRANk0xm9UUwpfFM1Bi&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_76&n=13)** | **MSNBC** **[Two Wrongs Don't Make A Right](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=RIHtn6w49bxOMGwRnhkk5sxc5Xm5M8_cKxS2jTOLBAoGZmeCIlqxhMmqaiX52b4F4lz-Rq752aSYMSAqt6Gd3SYEYXi8Jd334OVfSyO-rb0&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_76&n=14)** | **Tri City Record**

name: Lindsey Scholten
subject: Less than 2 weeks left to enter our Photo Contest! 📸🌲
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/56626F546B546B71353437386E362F73716A56434F6C79623451615A6A576D7431476137437349795362446F366D306C7A5044304745512F364C4E4F4F793851/editor_images/82225%202025%20Photo%20Contest%20-%20email%20header.png]
Photo from OLCV's 2023 Photo Contest, by Victoria Hawkins
Hi Peter,
OLCV’s 2025 Photo Contest is coming to a close on September 1st, so I hope you get your photos in before then for the chance to be featured on the cover of our upcoming Environmental Scorecard! Take a look at some of the photos that have already been submitted:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/82225%202025%20Photo%20Contest%20-%20photos.png]
This past session was hard, and the Environmental Scorecard will reflect that. In moments like these it’s even more important for us to remember why we do the work we’re doing. With your photos we can do just that! Before you submit, make sure that they relate to any of these three categories:
1. You, your family, friends and pets on our public lands (we love photos with people in them!)
2. Wildlife
3. Climate
How to submit your photos by September 1st:
* Send up to 3 photos in an email to respond@olcv.org with ‘Photo Contest’ in the subject line
* Include your name, where the photo was taken, and a short description of why the photo is meaningful to you
I can’t wait to see all of your photos!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Lindsey.png]
Lindsey Scholten (she/her)
OLCV Executive Director
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/ReVeUSnqh0mAa9rjhFdl7A2?unsubscribedata=LWANmFJjpIEKym%2BUejii4qoCfk%2BV1rsg4ECXlYGR46UUhCLDpZdRjYduts6F9i1%2F5L%2FQfyS4rHkXeHg705GhfvGPj0Vh8Jl56mqoqIU7yKqu%2F1p6itY8wdhU6O083vmY%2BojL7K1GBfjXvIxRpUZHvnzScriXrvzOF025qVXgzYJ9B5LY3gqa%2BoZ2wT70bhfZgt9OvkcZPdanD1JQpUwkjPXoUA%2BDjJcTj%2Fhr52foHEyiKW25fHzjnHfkqQ9Y%2BWLuUtsPU1G5VE%2FilqZOJxQ5tVa5%2FfHaiZSmG2guLVbboQdsSlSOPM36lwULyd4OWcmN%2F3rBdMEsT4aT8xooc1b6BQsBN1%2BjwDMyeREyEfoVSSyPqOuRAZEisIf2AtYCK7TGEGGWd1bfsQ%2FV73igPsfOYIooCHAKOC9G%2Fi9UIltoTNY%3D .

name: Team Yass
subject: A year of eras
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
Taylor Swift isn’t the only one with eras to write about! |
---
Peter, Taylor Swift just announced her 12th studio album, and we know one Swiftie who will be sure to tune in! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113740832/564771296/2050919713?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250821_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2VlMDA0Ny1hOTdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bnXschbPzXpicAC9VJQ-Bka8LzJTj69890G-L_yHHMs=) _Yass at Taylor Swift’s Fearless Tour in 2009_ We know Yass can’t wait for Taylor’s new album to drop, but in the meantime, she’s hard at work fighting _fearlessly_ in Congress to defend our democracy and make life better for Arizonans. **[Chip in now to support Yassamin:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113740836/564771299/1302243248?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250821_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2VlMDA0Ny1hOTdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bnXschbPzXpicAC9VJQ-Bka8LzJTj69890G-L_yHHMs=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113740844/564771306/1302243248?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250821_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2VlMDA0Ny1hOTdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bnXschbPzXpicAC9VJQ-Bka8LzJTj69890G-L_yHHMs=)
---
Yassamin may have only gotten to Capitol Hill seven months ago, **but she’s already making a huge impact.**
In fact, Taylor Swift isn’t the _only_ one with eras to write about. Here are some of Yassamin’s eras in Congress so far:
**The Elon Musk Era** — When Elon Musk and his DOGE bros moved to recklessly shut down critical federal agencies, Yassamin fought back by demanding answers at the EPA, the Department of Housing and Urban Development, and the Department of Education.
**The El Salvador Era** — The Trump administration wrongfully deported Maryland resident Kilmar Abrego Garcia to a brutal prison in El Salvador. Yassamin and three of her Democratic colleagues traveled to El Salvador to meet with Mr. Garcia and fought for his return to the United States.
**The Big, Ugly Bill Era** — The start of many long nights at the Capitol as Yassamin and Democrats fought back against Republicans’ budget that gives tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy and guts health care for 17 million Americans.
**The Accountability Era** — After Trump signed his ugly budget into law, Yass got straight to work calling out the Arizona Republicans who voted in favor of this disastrous budget and sold out their constituents.
**[These first seven months have flown by, and Yassamin is only getting started. Pitch in right now to help fuel our team and boost our foundation ahead of our August fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113740848/564771312/1302243248?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250821_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2VlMDA0Ny1hOTdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bnXschbPzXpicAC9VJQ-Bka8LzJTj69890G-L_yHHMs=)**

clean_body: Taylor Swift isn’t the only one with eras to write about! | Peter, Taylor Swift just announced her 12th studio album, and we know one Swiftie who will be sure to tune in! = Yass at Taylor Swift’s Fearless Tour in 2009 We know Yass can’t wait for Taylor’s new album to drop, but in the meantime, she’s hard at work fighting fearlessly in Congress to defend our democracy and make life better for Arizonans. = | = Yassamin may have only gotten to Capitol Hill seven months ago, but she’s already making a huge impact. In fact, Taylor Swift isn’t the only one with eras to write about. Here are some of Yassamin’s eras in Congress so far: The Elon Musk Era — When Elon Musk and his DOGE bros moved to recklessly shut down critical federal agencies, Yassamin fought back by demanding answers at the EPA, the Department of Housing and Urban Development, and the Department of Education. The El Salvador Era — The Trump administration wrongfully deported Maryland resident Kilmar Abrego Garcia to a brutal prison in El Salvador. Yassamin and three of her Democratic colleagues traveled to El Salvador to meet with Mr. Garcia and fought for his return to the United States. The Big, Ugly Bill Era — The start of many long nights at the Capitol as Yassamin and Democrats fought back against Republicans’ budget that gives tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy and guts health care for 17 million Americans. The Accountability Era — After Trump signed his ugly budget into law, Yass got straight to work calling out the Arizona Republicans who voted in favor of this disastrous budget and sold out their constituents. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = — Team Yass Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

subject: Silent coup. Loud resistance.
body:
If they succeed, they won’t just flip the court. They’ll control Pennsylvania’s maps, election laws, and abortion access for the next decade. And they’ll do it without most Democrats ever realizing
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K64rvPfv6gJbdvt3xmTCukLYvIEFBFDr4VFwedB12Cp_dWubLus7z841KB4XgR6ftaTmV5RUXGfn9izb9JUYbVBo_LxaCEq3ziW0nbKk1Awmg0MVILueFLozNJgYMkaNObGpLL3pZ7L7IBtot0mjh9QKxH3i8HNCfCYHpbCyJe4QigmhjXoOoLNH1Wgcxb7yne7oOe_ned6i9ElC3M7JKXVhfs8CwI0XqtvFXgCx-Xw=&c=wn5VTCGXzI6Cj-ei8X1Rasa3zaU4NjGEcDXrc6P66cSIJtBSj4jhWg==&ch=GxcribQeEwHdNBv6PCYDo6J6g_KWjoaBwFZdLA7fGDZF960cWy6mIg==)

| Peter,
Donald Trump and his MAGA allies have learned their malicious lesson: Coups don't need to be loud. They don't need mobs storming buildings or headlines splashed across the front page.
The new coup is silent.
It's billions in dark money funneled quietly into judicial races no one's watching. It's obscure ballot questions that most voters skip. It's stacking courts with loyalists who rewrite the rules so Trump can't lose -- no matter how many votes he gets.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K64rvPfv6gJbdvt3xmTCukLYvIEFBFDr4VFwedB12Cp_dWubLus7z841KB4XgR6ftaTmV5RUXGfn9izb9JUYbVBo_LxaCEq3ziW0nbKk1Awmg0MVILueFLozNJgYMkaNObGpLL3pZ7L7IBtot0mjh9QKxH3i8HNCfCYHpbCyJe4QigmhjXoOoLNH1Wgcxb7yne7oOe_ned6i9ElC3M7JKRHtyo4aO_Ru9HATzEkck38=&c=wn5VTCGXzI6Cj-ei8X1Rasa3zaU4NjGEcDXrc6P66cSIJtBSj4jhWg==&ch=GxcribQeEwHdNBv6PCYDo6J6g_KWjoaBwFZdLA7fGDZF960cWy6mIg==)

| | | | That's exactly what's happening in Pennsylvania this November. Three Democratic justices are up for retention, and MAGA is spending millions to take them out.
If they succeed, they won't just flip the court. They'll control Pennsylvania's maps, election laws, and abortion access for the next decade. And they'll do it without most Democrats ever realizing what happened.
That's their plan. A silent coup.
But here's the good news: we can answer with loud resistance.
Every dollar we raise fuels ads, mailers, and door-knocking to make sure voters know what's at stake. Every new supporter we reach chips away at MAGA's advantage. Every action we take turns their silence into noise.
[There's absolutely NO TIME to lose. Can you rush a donation right now to join the Loud Resistance and stop MAGA's silent coup in Pennsylvania?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K64rvPfv6gJbdvt3xmTCukLYvIEFBFDr4VFwedB12Cp_dWubLus7z841KB4XgR6ftaTmV5RUXGfn9izb9JUYbVBo_LxaCEq3ziW0nbKk1Awmg0MVILueFLozNJgYMkaNObGpLL3pZ7L7IBtot0mjh9QKxH3i8HNCfCYHpbCyJe4QigmhjXoOoLNH1Wgcxb7yne7oOe_ned6i9ElC3M7JKWOxHOgqtXEn-qJXHMepYy8=&c=wn5VTCGXzI6Cj-ei8X1Rasa3zaU4NjGEcDXrc6P66cSIJtBSj4jhWg==&ch=GxcribQeEwHdNBv6PCYDo6J6g_KWjoaBwFZdLA7fGDZF960cWy6mIg==)

name: Barack Obama
subject: This isn't normal:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
This is about something precious: Who are we as a country? What values do we stand for?
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113741461/564773069/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmZWVhOWY5LWE5N2UtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GEw9cgS7ACdyD5xynjQe7W8xWPPt2h8C5OeuTBdrq3I=&emci=206060cb-087e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=2feea9f9-a97e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, these are not normal times, to put it mildly. Just imagine if, heading into a tough midterm election, I demanded that a state controlled by Democrats suddenly redraw its electoral maps because my party was “entitled to five more seats.” Republicans who are silent now never would have tolerated that from me or my predecessors. And let me be clear: This is not about partisanship. **This is about something more precious: who we are as a country, and the values we stand for.** At times like this, it’s on each of us to decide what we care about — and what we’re willing to do for our democracy. **Eric Holder and I started the National Democratic Redistricting Committee to be on the front lines of these fights — and this work matters more than ever.[So I need to ask: Will you make a donation to support this cause and help face down escalating threats to American democracy?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113741463/564773070/-387901526?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ObamaAug_email_20250821-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaAug_cntrl&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250821-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaAug_cntrl&utm_campaign=ObamaAug&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmZWVhOWY5LWE5N2UtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GEw9cgS7ACdyD5xynjQe7W8xWPPt2h8C5OeuTBdrq3I=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

It wasn’t long ago that most Americans didn’t have to worry about any of this.
For decades, there was a broad consensus — among Democrats and Republicans, conservatives and liberals — around a certain set of rules by which we settled our differences. We recognized that some bonds transcend party, region, or ideology. And even if we had not fully realized an ideal version of America, we could all agree on the basic ideals to pursue: freedom, justice, and equality.
But some of these concepts also started to become abstract in our minds. Because they don’t intrude on our day-to-day lives, we started to take them for granted. Not anymore.

[**The fight to end gerrymandering and make elections fairer is central to the fight for democracy. I’m so proud to be part of it. name: Kashia @ Team MGP
subject: This is going to be tough
body:
| | Peter – This seat belongs to the people of Southwest Washington, not to DC party bosses, special interests, or dark money groups. Marie is fighting to keep it that way, but this re-election fight may be the toughest challenge she’s faced yet – which means, she needs you now more than she’s ever needed you before.

Marie is one of us. She’s a mom. A small business owner. A Southwest Washingtonian who has already proven she will fight for our community in Congress.

[https://go.marieforcongress.com/a/august](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113741621/564773450/497279752?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_90DO_250821_1_2&refcode2=acd803af-aa7e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2Q4MDNhZi1hYTdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lagHyuWMJOA0ovJajtpgmiWd-VSQ0m5x0IlahUzYzb0=)

Kashia
Marie for Congress

_Previous Message from Marie:_

Peter,

Southwest Washingtonians are strong and independent, deeply immersed in our community. We don’t let the party bosses in D.C. call the shots. That’s why I work hard every day in Congress to deliver for the people here – not for a political party or a special interest group.

**But, national Republicans have started pouring money into this race to try to replace me with someone they can control.**

I’m counting on your help now, Peter. Together, we can keep this seat in local hands and make sure Southwest Washington’s voice can’t be bought. clean_body: This is the situation I’m caught in: Friend, Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation. The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

Peter,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs.

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Peter, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.
