name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: When I came out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=4936%2E35263%2EXnNCWn ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Peter, can I
tell you a story?

When I came out in college, I knew I was interested in a career in public
service, but I feared that I would have to face a serious choice between
pursuing the field of my dreams or living my authentic life openly.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-aug25.EOUccb&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=4936%2E35263%2EXnNCWn ]Tammy young

After seeing others in the LGBTQ+ community demonstrate acts of courage by
coming out, being themselves, and being public about who they are and who
they love, I came to realize that I could do both:

I could run for office and be honest about who I am — so that’s exactly
what I did.

When I became the first openly gay Senator elected in our nation’s
history, I understood that I needed to use this extraordinary opportunity
to make a difference in people's lives. From lowering prescription drug
prices to protecting same-sex marriage through the Respect for Marriage
Act, I’ve worked hard every day since to do just that.

But I didn’t run to make history, I ran to make a difference. And folks
like you supported me because you wanted to make a difference, too.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-aug25.EOUccb&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=4936%2E35263%2EXnNCWn ]I can’t keep up this work without your help. Will you help me continue
to make a difference by making a grassroots donation today?

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4438?c0=stb-em-aug25.KUWn1c&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=4936%2E35263%2EXnNCWn ]DONATE

In 2015, the Obergefell decision made marriage equality the law of the
land. In 2022, I was proud to pass my Respect for Marriage Act to protect
the rights and freedoms of millions of LGBTQ+ couples.

As Trump and his administration pull every lever to undo the progress
we’ve made toward equality, I’ll never stop fighting to create a more
accepting and equal country that lives up to the ideals of our nation.

The LGBTQ+ community is facing an onslaught of concerning attacks. The
Supreme Court was asked to overturn Obergefell, and in 2025 alone, 604
anti-LGBTQ+ bills have been introduced across the country.

From pulling over $800 million in research on LGBTQ+ health care, to
targeting universities that refuse to discriminate against transgender
athletes, to scrubbing mere mentions of the word “gay” from federal
websites — this administration’s attacks are meant to intimidate a
community that’s only asked for true equality.

It’s going to take all of us to counter these extreme attacks so everyone
grows up knowing they belong, and that kindness and inclusion — not hatred
and division — are American values.

clean_body: [ ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE Peter, can I tell you a story? When I came out in college, I knew I was interested in a career in public service, but I feared that I would have to face a serious choice between pursuing the field of my dreams or living my authentic life openly. [ ]Tammy young After seeing others in the LGBTQ+ community demonstrate acts of courage by coming out, being themselves, and being public about who they are and who they love, I came to realize that I could do both: I could run for office and be honest about who I am — so that’s exactly what I did. When I became the first openly gay Senator elected in our nation’s history, I understood that I needed to use this extraordinary opportunity to make a difference in people's lives. From lowering prescription drug prices to protecting same-sex marriage through the Respect for Marriage Act, I’ve worked hard every day since to do just that. But I didn’t run to make history, I ran to make a difference. And folks like you supported me because you wanted to make a difference, too. [ ]I can’t keep up this work without your help. Will you help me continue to make a difference by making a grassroots donation today? [ ]DONATE In 2015, the Obergefell decision made marriage equality the law of the land. In 2022, I was proud to pass my Respect for Marriage Act to protect the rights and freedoms of millions of LGBTQ+ couples. As Trump and his administration pull every lever to undo the progress we’ve made toward equality, I’ll never stop fighting to create a more accepting and equal country that lives up to the ideals of our nation. The LGBTQ+ community is facing an onslaught of concerning attacks. The Supreme Court was asked to overturn Obergefell, and in 2025 alone, 604 anti-LGBTQ+ bills have been introduced across the country. From pulling over $800 million in research on LGBTQ+ health care, to targeting universities that refuse to discriminate against transgender athletes, to scrubbing mere mentions of the word “gay” from federal websites — this administration’s attacks are meant to intimidate a community that’s only asked for true equality. It’s going to take all of us to counter these extreme attacks so everyone grows up knowing they belong, and that kindness and inclusion — not hatred and division — are American values. [ ]I’m hoping you’ll support this important work by chipping in to my fight for a more equal future, and to help me support democratic candidates who will do the same. Please chip in: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]CHIP IN $5 NOW [ ]CHIP IN $10 NOW [ ]CHIP IN $25 NOW [ ]CHIP IN $50 NOW [ ]CHIP IN $100 NOW [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT Thank you for your ongoing support. Let’s recommit ourselves to work towards the day when all LGBTQ+ Americans can live in a world where they feel safe, accepted, and loved. — Tammy [ ]DONATE P.O. name: George Whitesides
subject: I’m fighting back against this dangerous precedent
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113743275/564779356/-1384072709?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTk4YWU0NS1iMDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EmbJ25YO0wmvFRcRfnQCX84i9aVPs1m_bva6HZdCrSk=)
I’m proud to share this with you, Peter.

**I recently introduced new legislation in Congress called the Statistical Agency Integrity and Independence Act.** My bill is designed to protect leaders of key federal statistical agencies from politically-motivated firings.

This comes after President Trump unjustly fired the commissioner of the Bureau of Labor Statistics after he got a jobs report that he didn’t like.

**Here’s the bottom line: Americans rely on federal agencies for unbiased information. This firing sets a dangerous precedent that we cannot allow to stand.**

When I served as NASA Chief of Staff under President Obama and led businesses in the Antelope Valley, it was critical that the data we received was accurate so we could make decisions that impacted our communities.

Now in Congress, I’m doing the same: going to bat for small businesses and working families who rely on this information to make decisions that work for them.

I’m going to get a lot of pushback from Trump and House Republicans for taking a stand, but I’m not backing down. **[Please consider chipping in $3 to keep me in Congress fighting for you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113743278/564779359/-1384072709?refcode=em-8.21.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTk4YWU0NS1iMDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EmbJ25YO0wmvFRcRfnQCX84i9aVPs1m_bva6HZdCrSk=)**

Thank you,

George

P.S. If you’d like to read more about this legislation and how I’m fighting against the decisions of this administration, click **[here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113743280/564779360/-812074359?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTk4YWU0NS1iMDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EmbJ25YO0wmvFRcRfnQCX84i9aVPs1m_bva6HZdCrSk=&emci=a9f5595d-aa7e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d198ae45-b07e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=36198509)**

clean_body: | = I’m proud to share this with you, Peter. I recently introduced new legislation in Congress called the Statistical Agency Integrity and Independence Act. My bill is designed to protect leaders of key federal statistical agencies from politically-motivated firings. This comes after President Trump unjustly fired the commissioner of the Bureau of Labor Statistics after he got a jobs report that he didn’t like. Here’s the bottom line: Americans rely on federal agencies for unbiased information. This firing sets a dangerous precedent that we cannot allow to stand. When I served as NASA Chief of Staff under President Obama and led businesses in the Antelope Valley, it was critical that the data we received was accurate so we could make decisions that impacted our communities. Now in Congress, I’m doing the same: going to bat for small businesses and working families who rely on this information to make decisions that work for them. I’m going to get a lot of pushback from Trump and House Republicans for taking a stand, but I’m not backing down. = Thank you, George P.S. If you’d like to read more about this legislation and how I’m fighting against the decisions of this administration, click | **=** | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

The Blazers are a part of Portland’s DNA, Peter: our past, our present, and our future. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113743510/564780109/109091865?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzk4YWU0NS1iMDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n6hj3vV1V1_6zp7ZvTi6m-5-mERpXcN-zTjY0vVh2CA=&emci=50cfe673-e97d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=c798ae45-b07e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=15353729) Governor Kotek is committed to working with investors, local leaders, and stakeholders to keep the Blazers where they belong:**at home in Portland**. name: Emily Randall for Congress
subject: News from our adopted swing district 🗞️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
There's A LOT going on with redistricting. But no matter what happens in other states, Arizona’s 6th will still be one of the most competitive races in the country

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113744065/564782067/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.08.21_MendozaUpdate_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmVlYzFiMi1iMDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGHVBYlPcUIlTGfw2elWKJgXH09E3_41pvEW9N3XCVg=&emci=08d08815-a57e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3beec1b2-b07e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) | Peter — we have a big update in the race for our adopted swing district, Arizona’s 6th. **➡️ The other Democrat running for the seat has ended his bid and endorsed our candidate, JoAnna “Jo” Mendoza. That leaves her as the sole Democrat in the race!** As you probably know, there's A LOT going on with redistricting. But no matter what happens in other states, Arizona’s 6th will still be one of the most competitive races in the country, and we will continue [_**lending critical, early support to Jo and her campaign team.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113744071/564782078/1791191835?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.08.21_MendozaUpdate_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmVlYzFiMi1iMDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGHVBYlPcUIlTGfw2elWKJgXH09E3_41pvEW9N3XCVg=) It’s already shaping up to be a tough fight. Republican Juan Ciscomani (who spoke out against the Big Bad Bill, then voted for it 😡) raised over $1 million last quarter. Jo, who comes from working-class roots and served for 20 years in the U.S. Navy and Marine Corps, raised about half as much in that time. **With the end of the month coming up fast, we’re calling on Team Emily to give Jo the grassroots boost she needs to stay competitive! Can you split a donation between JoAnna Mendoza and our organizing today?[_Our goal is to add 100 grassroots donations to Jo’s total by the end of August →_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113744078/564782085/1791191835?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.08.21_MendozaUpdate_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmVlYzFiMi1iMDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGHVBYlPcUIlTGfw2elWKJgXH09E3_41pvEW9N3XCVg=)** [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113744082/564782092/1791191835?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.08.21_MendozaUpdate_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmVlYzFiMi1iMDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGHVBYlPcUIlTGfw2elWKJgXH09E3_41pvEW9N3XCVg=) Thank you so much for your support. Adopting a swing district over a year before the election is unusual, but these times call for more than “business as usual.” Sincerely, — The whole team at Emily Randall for Congress

* * *
_**In case you missed it — Our AZ-06 Deep Dive:**_ Peter, **Earlier this year, Emily “adopted” one of the most competitive districts in the country, Arizona’s 6th, also known as AZ-06. ** That means we’re directing our grassroots energy to flip this critical seat ahead of the 2026 elections. We wanted to give you an overview of why this race is so important – and how our combined efforts can turn this district from red to blue.
_**The District**_ AZ-06 encompasses the southeastern corner of Arizona, including all of Greenlee County, and parts of Cochise, Pima, Pinal, and Graham Counties. Most of the District’s population lives in Pima County in the rapidly growing suburbs of Tucson. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113744085/564782097/755184972?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.08.21_MendozaUpdate_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmVlYzFiMi1iMDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGHVBYlPcUIlTGfw2elWKJgXH09E3_41pvEW9N3XCVg=&emci=08d08815-a57e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3beec1b2-b07e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113744087/564782100/193919884?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.08.21_MendozaUpdate_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmVlYzFiMi1iMDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGHVBYlPcUIlTGfw2elWKJgXH09E3_41pvEW9N3XCVg=&emci=08d08815-a57e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3beec1b2-b07e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) AZ-06 is truly a PURPLE district. Voters here backed Trump by 5% in 2016, then Biden by 0.1% (!!) in 2020, then Trump by 2% in 2024. However, the 6th District has supported Democratic candidates for Senate in 2020, 2022, and 2024.
_**The Incumbent**_ Republican **Juan Ciscomani** won this seat in 2022 by 1.5% and in 2024 by 2.5%. Despite representing an extremely purple district, he has voted lockstep with the MAGA agenda. When the Big Bad Bill was moving through Congress, Ciscomani [spoke out](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113744088/564782101/-1460501170?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.08.21_MendozaUpdate_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmVlYzFiMi1iMDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGHVBYlPcUIlTGfw2elWKJgXH09E3_41pvEW9N3XCVg=&emci=08d08815-a57e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3beec1b2-b07e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) against the provisions in the bill that would hurt Arizona’s green energy businesses. [He also said](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113744091/564782102/-1111014941?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.08.21_MendozaUpdate_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmVlYzFiMi1iMDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGHVBYlPcUIlTGfw2elWKJgXH09E3_41pvEW9N3XCVg=&emci=08d08815-a57e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3beec1b2-b07e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) he "cannot, and will not, support any legislation that reduces Medicaid benefits for vulnerable populations the program intended to serve." However, once Trump and Republican leaders applied a little pressure, Ciscomani caved and voted for the destructive budget he knew would hurt his constituents. The final bill contained a tax provision that [benefits Ciscomani personally](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113744095/564782106/-998883073?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.08.21_MendozaUpdate_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmVlYzFiMi1iMDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGHVBYlPcUIlTGfw2elWKJgXH09E3_41pvEW9N3XCVg=&emci=08d08815-a57e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3beec1b2-b07e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442), increasing the amount of “pass-through” income he can deduct from his taxes.
_**Our Candidate**_ While Ciscomani serves himself, our candidate **JoAnna Mendoza** has made a lifelong commitment to serving others. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113744098/564782110/-803653937?v=MWF6cmJ1OiI&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.08.21_MendozaUpdate_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmVlYzFiMi1iMDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGHVBYlPcUIlTGfw2elWKJgXH09E3_41pvEW9N3XCVg=&emci=08d08815-a57e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3beec1b2-b07e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) JoAnna — known to friends as “Jo” — grew up in a farmworker family and relied on programs like SNAP and WIC. She enlisted in the United States Marine Corps at age 17 and served for 20 years – becoming a drill sergeant, deploying to Iraq and Afghanistan, and leading the next generation of Marines. She returned to Arizona to raise her son, Aidan, and worked as a nonprofit leader, veterans advocate, and policy expert to benefit working people in her community. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113744100/564782114/-803653937?v=MWF6cmJ1OiI&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.08.21_MendozaUpdate_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmVlYzFiMi1iMDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGHVBYlPcUIlTGfw2elWKJgXH09E3_41pvEW9N3XCVg=&emci=08d08815-a57e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3beec1b2-b07e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) Saying that she would be an upgrade for Arizona’s 6th District is an understatement!
_**What’s Next?**_ There’s no handbook for “adopting” a swing district – but here are a few things we can do now: ➡️**Help with fundraising.** The earlier the Mendoza campaign brings in funds, the more effective they can be. ➡️ **Combat disinformation.** The GOP and their billionaire donors will target Jo. But there aren’t normal times, so we’re trying something new. We need to flip three seats to take back the House, and AZ-06 could be one of them. Peter, it's Valerie Foushee. We’ve seen constant attacks on jobs here in the Research Triangle since Donald Trump took office. Our vibrant region here in North Carolina is the research home to the leading agencies like the CDC, NIH, FDA, and EPA — and Peter, all of these organizations have faced massive layoffs this year. The latest on the chopping block? **The EPA’s Office of Research and Development (ORD).** Trump’s hand-picked EPA Administrator, Lee Zeldin, announced that he’s shutting down the ORD — so Congresswoman Deborah Ross and I are joining forces to protect our constituents and communities across the country. Some of the work conducted by the ORD includes:
* Studying the health impacts of wildfire smoke inhalation,
* Researching PFAS toxicity and detection methods,
* Improving water treatment technologies,

_and so much more._ Peter, Americans across the political spectrum care about clean air, clean water, and the health of their children and loved ones. Americans care about their environment, whether it’s their back yard or their favorite national park. **Developments and research to protect the future of our planet, which is what ORD does, is not partisan.** I’m working in lockstep with Congresswoman Ross to demand the immediate reversal of this decision. But with Trump going all out to undermine environmental protections and slash funding, we need to go ALL OUT to stop this disaster of an administration. That starts with taking back the House in 2026. **[Please, Peter, will you split a donation of $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Deborah Ross to help us hold our seats, support our vulnerable colleagues, and take back the House?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113744116/564782161/1328024003?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_082125_EPASplit_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2M1MjdjYS1iMDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X63UF7YityVszeARAw89Fbr_ESUsKLXEeHyZaVQUW1A=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Valerie Foushee and Deborah Ross.

clean_body: Trump’s hand-picked EPA Administrator, Lee Zeldin, announced that he’s shutting down the ORD If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, it's Valerie Foushee. We’ve seen constant attacks on jobs here in the Research Triangle since Donald Trump took office. Our vibrant region here in North Carolina is the research home to the leading agencies like the CDC, NIH, FDA, and EPA — and Peter, all of these organizations have faced massive layoffs this year. The latest on the chopping block? The EPA’s Office of Research and Development (ORD). Trump’s hand-picked EPA Administrator, Lee Zeldin, announced that he’s shutting down the ORD — so Congresswoman Deborah Ross and I are joining forces to protect our constituents and communities across the country. Some of the work conducted by the ORD includes: Studying the health impacts of wildfire smoke inhalation, Researching PFAS toxicity and detection methods, Improving water treatment technologies, and so much more. Peter, Americans across the political spectrum care about clean air, clean water, and the health of their children and loved ones. Americans care about their environment, whether it’s their back yard or their favorite national park. Developments and research to protect the future of our planet, which is what ORD does, is not partisan. I’m working in lockstep with Congresswoman Ross to demand the immediate reversal of this decision. But with Trump going all out to undermine environmental protections and slash funding, we need to go ALL OUT to stop this disaster of an administration. That starts with taking back the House in 2026. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Valerie Foushee and Deborah Ross. | = | = | = | = | = | = We’ll never give up on fighting for a safer, cleaner, and sustainable future for our kids and grandkids. Our families are always worth fighting for. name: Troy Downing
subject: From the scrapbook (8 photos)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
My story’s a little different than most.

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgyMV9MUi1CTC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2OTIzMDEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MjFfTFItQkwuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjkyMzAxLTI4OTkifQ/X7tuwbKcbppgL7xrzeaJFQ)
---
Never could this young boy have imagined he’d one day be sending an email like this.

Peter, it's Troy Downing.

If you don’t have much time, all you need to know about me is that **I only care about three things: God, family, and country.** **[I’m fighting in Congress to defend those three things for myself and every American.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgyMV9MUi1CTC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2OTIzMDEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MjFfTFItQkwuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjkyMzAxLTI4OTkifQ/fbkk6XSpAXfZuLJIvKC5NQ)**
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgyMV9MUi1CTC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2OTIzMDEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MjFfTFItQkwuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjkyMzAxLTI4OTkifQ/EyO2KF1Xqy73MAXa2C9vKg)
---
Growing up, I was a bit of a nerd. I studied mathematics and computer science in college. Then, I started my own business, which merged with Yahoo!. I started other small businesses in insurance and real estate, but then my life changed forever...

Like millions of Americans, September 11th was a turning point.

**I immediately enlisted in the United States Air Force/ANG.** I served two tours of duty in Afghanistan as part of a Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR) squadron.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgyMV9MUi1CTC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2OTIzMDEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MjFfTFItQkwuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjkyMzAxLTI4OTkifQ/JaXLBTUQFRpE-J9XUIkJGg)
---
After eight years of service, I was honorably discharged from the Air Force and returned home to Montana with my wife and kids.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgyMV9MUi1CTC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2OTIzMDEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MjFfTFItQkwuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjkyMzAxLTI4OTkifQ/e7lxi0LDOVnzdVYnNqeWgw)
---
We are partners in a local distillery in Bozeman, and when the COVID pandemic hit, our company went above and beyond to help our friends and neighbors. There was a shortage of toilet paper, sanitizing wipes, and hand sanitizer in every store.

We quickly turned our whiskey distillery into a hand sanitizer production facility to provide free hand sanitizer to families, first responders, and hospitals.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgyMV9MUi1CTC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2OTIzMDEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MjFfTFItQkwuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjkyMzAxLTI4OTkifQ/tqSUKDwl7dN8_FoDZk1LJw)
---
In the Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR) Community, we live by this motto:

**“These things we do, that others may live.”**

I’ve taken this motto with me in everything I do. I’ve taught my kids to live by this. And now, my public service is not finished. **[I’m fighting in Congress to preserve our American way of life, protect our God-given rights, and defend our nation with everything I’ve got.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgyMV9MUi1CTC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2OTIzMDEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MjFfTFItQkwuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjkyMzAxLTI4OTkifQ/75e9v-VYBBiP7l7KOfYL7Q)**
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgyMV9MUi1CTC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2OTIzMDEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MjFfTFItQkwuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjkyMzAxLTI4OTkifQ/EsEMUleQ5MWKviZ2AhIbTg)
---
I’m fighting in Congress for **GOD** so we will never forget that we are one nation UNDER God.

I’m fighting in Congress for our **FAMILIES** so our kids have every opportunity to succeed.

I’m fighting in Congress for our **COUNTRY** so every future generation can still call the United States of America their home and the best country that has ever graced God’s creation.

Peter, defending our conservative House Majority and advancing President Trump’s agenda won’t come cheap. Democrats are chomping at the bit to flip the House BLUE so they can turn every state into the next California! I can’t let that happen, but I’m hoping strong, loyal Patriots like you will help win this fight.

[**If you can spare just $5 or $10, that’s all it takes to make a difference – seriously!**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgyMV9MUi1CTC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2OTIzMDEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MjFfTFItQkwuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjkyMzAxLTI4OTkifQ/oy8R_BWSSNUpgZFG_fSUYw) I don’t have billionaires on speed dial or Hollywood award winners to campaign for me.

I depend on like-minded friends and neighbors like you to chip in a few bucks. **[If everyone reading this chips in $8, I’ll hit my goal!](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgyMV9MUi1CTC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2OTIzMDEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MjFfTFItQkwuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjkyMzAxLTI4OTkifQ/r4im2_jef_gY9RlC9NSmfw)**
---
[ **DONATE TODAY**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-Qg)
---
[**I appreciate any and all support.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)

With your help, Peter, **we can save our country and put God, Family, and Country FIRST. **

God Bless,

Troy Downing (R-MT)

clean_body: My story’s a little different than most. | | | Never could this young boy have imagined he’d one day be sending an email like this. Peter, it's Troy Downing. If you don’t have much time, all you need to know about me is that I only care about three things: God, family, and country. Growing up, I was a bit of a nerd. I studied mathematics and computer science in college. Then, I started my own business, which merged with Yahoo!. I started other small businesses in insurance and real estate, but then my life changed forever... Like millions of Americans, September 11th was a turning point. I immediately enlisted in the United States Air Force/ANG. I served two tours of duty in Afghanistan as part of a Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR) squadron. After eight years of service, I was honorably discharged from the Air Force and returned home to Montana with my wife and kids. We are partners in a local distillery in Bozeman, and when the COVID pandemic hit, our company went above and beyond to help our friends and neighbors. There was a shortage of toilet paper, sanitizing wipes, and hand sanitizer in every store. We quickly turned our whiskey distillery into a hand sanitizer production facility to provide free hand sanitizer to families, first responders, and hospitals. In the Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR) Community, we live by this motto: “These things we do, that others may live.” I’ve taken this motto with me in everything I do. I’ve taught my kids to live by this. And now, my public service is not finished. I’m fighting in Congress for GOD so we will never forget that we are one nation UNDER God. I’m fighting in Congress for our FAMILIES so our kids have every opportunity to succeed. I’m fighting in Congress for our COUNTRY so every future generation can still call the United States of America their home and the best country that has ever graced God’s creation. Peter, defending our conservative House Majority and advancing President Trump’s agenda won’t come cheap. Democrats are chomping at the bit to flip the House BLUE so they can turn every state into the next California! I can’t let that happen, but I’m hoping strong, loyal Patriots like you will help win this fight. I don’t have billionaires on speed dial or Hollywood award winners to campaign for me. I depend on like-minded friends and neighbors like you to chip in a few bucks. With your help, Peter, we can save our country and put God, Family, and Country FIRST. God Bless, Troy Downing (R-MT) | | | Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. Troy Downing For Congress P.O. Box 20333 Billings, MT 59104 | | | To unsubscribe from Troy Downing for Congress,

name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: We’re defiant, determined, and undaunted / Somos desafiantes, decididos e intrépidos
body:
Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español]
We won't back down:
Texans fight back as Republicans pass their racist redistricting map
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Texas%20For%20All%20group%20shot.jpg]
Texas Republicans rammed through gerrymandered congressional maps Wednesday, proving again that the system is doing exactly what it was built to do: protect white political power and erase Black and Latino Texans from decision-making.
These redistricting maps to appease Donald Trump are a deliberate tool to keep Black and Latino Texans out of power. They’re not broken, they’re working exactly as intended.
MAGA extremists want us silent and invisible, but we’re not going anywhere. And just like State Rep. Nicole Collier courageously showed the country this week [https://www.keranews.org/texas-news/2025-08-19/fort-worth-rep-nicole-collier-refuses-to-leave-texas-house-protesting-state-trooper-escorts] , we’re not shutting up or backing down from fighting for what is morally just for Texans.
WATCH TOP Co-Executive Director Brianna Brown’s fiery remarks in opposition to this rigged GOP redistricting. [https://www.facebook.com/share/v/16dyzEXf85/]
To learn more about what comes next in this battle against Trump and Abbott's racist redistricting scheme, contact David at dvillalobos@organizetexas.org [dvillalobos@organizetexas.org] .
Celebrate worker power with TOP and allies this Labor Day in Houston
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Labor%20Day%20protest%20logo%202025.jpeg]
Working people built this nation and we know how to take care of each other. And we'll never stop fighting for our families and the rights and freedoms that ensure access to opportunity and a better life for ALL who call this country home. Join TOP and Houston-area labor allies for a "Workers Over Billionaires" celebration this Labor Day.
Register here and share with your networks. [https://actionnetwork.org/events/workers-over-billionaires-labor-day-celebration/]
On September 1st, we'll continue the movement that progressive organizations across the country collectively launched on May 1st, standing in solidarity with all our communities under attack from the Trump regime and fighting for real wins for all our people.
TEXANS:
Help us unite around one major campaign priority
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Brighter%20Dallas%20community%20dinner%20July%202025.JPG]
If you live in Texas and care about building a more progressive future for our state, we want to hear from you! TOP is uniting around one major campaign priority that we believe will reflect the Texas we deserve. Your voice is essential in shaping our collective fight for justice and equity.
TEXANS: Click here to take our quick survey. [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc0JcmarckcN1aeYp7Qy807cgCm0rIjxGJsg2s5nfS7STQ-cA/viewform]
For more information about this survey and campaign effort, contact Sofia at slopez@organizetexas.org [slopez@organizetexas.org] .
TOP Tip: Make sure you're registered for November's Texas constitutional amendment election

Español
No cederemos: Los tejanos contraatacan mientras los republicanos aprueban su mapa racista de redistribución de distritos
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Texas%20For%20All%20group%20shot.jpg]
Los republicanos de Texas impusieron el miércoles mapas electorales manipulados, demostrando una vez más que el sistema está haciendo exactamente lo que fue diseñado para hacer: proteger el poder político blanco y excluir a los tejanos negros y latinos de la toma de decisiones.
Estos mapas de redistribución de distritos, diseñados para apaciguar a Donald Trump, son una herramienta deliberada para mantener a los tejanos negros y latinos fuera del poder. No están rotos, están funcionando exactamente como se esperaba.
Los extremistas de MAGA nos quieren silenciados e invisibles, pero no nos iremos a ninguna parte. Y tal como la representante estatal Nicole Collier demostró valientemente al país esta semana [https://www.keranews.org/texas-news/2025-08-19/fort-worth-rep-nicole-collier-refuses-to-leave-texas-house-protesting-state-trooper-escorts] , no nos callaremos ni cederemos en la lucha por lo que es moralmente justo para los tejanos.
VEA los enérgicos comentarios de la codirectora ejecutiva de TOP, Brianna Brown, en contra de esta redistribución de distritos manipulada del Partido Republicano. [https://fb.watch/BCZSiZZWDU/]
Para saber más sobre lo que viene a continuación en esta batalla contra el plan racista de redistribución de distritos de Trump y Abbott, contacte a David en dvillalobos@organizetexas.org [dvillalobos@organizetexas.org] .
Celebre el poder de los trabajadores con TOP y sus aliados este Día del Trabajo en Houston
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Labor%20Day%20protest%20logo%202025.jpeg]
Los trabajadores construyeron esta nación y sabemos cómo cuidarnos unos a otros. Nunca dejaremos de luchar por nuestras familias y por los derechos y libertades que garantizan el acceso a oportunidades y una vida mejor para TODOS los que consideran este país su hogar. Únase a TOP y a los aliados sindicales del área de Houston para celebrar "Trabajadores por encima de Multimillonarios" este Día del Trabajo.
Regístrese aquí y comparta con sus redes. [https://actionnetwork.org/events/workers-over-billionaires-labor-day-celebration/]
El 1ro de septiembre, continuaremos el movimiento que las organizaciones progresistas de todo el país lanzaron colectivamente el 1ro de mayo, solidarizándonos con todas nuestras comunidades atacadas por el régimen de Trump y luchando por victorias reales para toda nuestra gente.

clean_body: Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español] We won't back down: Texans fight back as Republicans pass their racist redistricting map [] Texas Republicans rammed through gerrymandered congressional maps Wednesday, proving again that the system is doing exactly what it was built to do: protect white political power and erase Black and Latino Texans from decision-making. These redistricting maps to appease Donald Trump are a deliberate tool to keep Black and Latino Texans out of power. They’re not broken, they’re working exactly as intended. MAGA extremists want us silent and invisible, but we’re not going anywhere. And just like State Rep. Nicole Collier courageously showed the country this week [] , we’re not shutting up or backing down from fighting for what is morally just for Texans. [] To learn more about what comes next in this battle against Trump and Abbott's racist redistricting scheme, contact David at dvillalobos@organizetexas.org [dvillalobos@organizetexas.org] . name: Ron Wyden
subject: $16 million dollar bribe
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
Quite the coincidence that Paramount would give the president a sweetheart settlement just when they need that president’s administration to ok a multi-billion dollar windfall.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113745310/564786370/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTQ4ZTgwYy1iMzdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i-1V83yZbCA5DlTh_2kF0Ylkr9-Z-Zgkl99gXFIMMLk=&emci=f86e1755-a87e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=fa48e80c-b37e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Let me tell you a story of open corruption and manipulation of the free press. Earlier this year, Trump sued "60 Minutes" because he didn't find their coverage during the 2024 presidential campaign to his liking. Rather than stick up for its employees, Paramount (CBS's corporate parent) _settled_ Trump's baseless lawsuit for $16 million. It just so happened that at the same time, Paramount was in talks with another media corporation to be bought out in an $8 billion merger that needed sign-off by Trump's FCC. **Quite the coincidence that Paramount would give the president a sweetheart settlement just when they need that same president's administration to sign off on a multi-billion-dollar windfall.** A large portion of the payout from Trump's settlement with Paramount will go towards his presidential library, which is a discreet way for Trump to collect "contributions" money for personal use. Trump's FCC approved the sale of Paramount following what was clearly a bribe for merger approval. This is corruption, plain and simple. **Donald Trump can't be allowed to get away with accepting any shiny, lavish gift that comes his way from big corporations, foreign governments, and even anonymous donors.** In May, I publicly raised concerns about potential bribery related to the Paramount deal and settlement.**At the time, I warned that: "These reports raise fresh questions about corruption in the Trump administration and President Trump's willingness to accept payments from entities with significant policy interests before agencies he controls."** This deal also raises real concerns about Trump once again meddling in free speech in the media. **We can't let this blatant corruption become commonplace. Letting blatant corruption become commonplace means media coverage can be shaped by the whims of a leader with a grudge.** When Democrats retake power, I'll be first in line calling for federal charges. In the meantime, state prosecutors should make the corporate execs who sold out our democracy answer in court today. I'll continue exposing the grift, bribery, and anti-free speech behavior of the Trump administration. And I'll fight to elect a Congress with the courage to conduct oversight and investigate clear violations of the law. Onward, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly:

This deal also raises real concerns about Trump once again meddling in free speech in the media. We can't let this blatant corruption become commonplace. Letting blatant corruption become commonplace means media coverage can be shaped by the whims of a leader with a grudge. When Democrats retake power, I'll be first in line calling for federal charges. In the meantime, state prosecutors should make the corporate execs who sold out our democracy answer in court today. I'll continue exposing the grift, bribery, and anti-free speech behavior of the Trump administration. And I'll fight to elect a Congress with the courage to conduct oversight and investigate clear violations of the law. name: Rick Larsen
subject: The women and men who served our country deserve top-quality care
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
This month, I reintroduced the Veteran Families Health Services Act of 2025.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113745389/564786596/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWVmOGY3ZS1iMzdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K7DdLyogm6Vp7bqapnq-lAeFJQzDNp72uR7yJIfPffY=&emci=bab011b8-2b79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=89ef8f7e-b37e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **This month, I reintroduced the**** _Veteran Families Health Services Act of 2025_****.** This comprehensive legislation would expand the fertility treatments and family-building services that are covered under servicemembers' and veterans' health care to include—among other things—in vitro fertilization (IVF) and adoption assistance, for servicemembers and veterans who are unable to conceive without assistance, and the option for individuals to freeze their eggs or sperm ahead of deployment to a combat zone. **The 2nd District is home to nearly 57,000 veterans, including many veterans who served in Iraq and Afghanistan.** I am committed to ensuring that the women and men who have served our country in uniform get the resources and services they need – whether it be healthcare, housing, or career training. While the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) and the Department of Defense (DoD) currently offer some forms of fertility treatment and counseling, these offerings are extraordinarily limited and difficult for veterans to access, even when they are technically eligible—and far too often, these benefits fail to meet the needs of servicemembers and veterans. **America's women and men in uniform should have access to high-quality, affordable options to grow their families.** Congress should take the long-overdue step of permanently overturning outdated limitations on IVF and other fertility treatments for veterans and service members by passing the Veteran Families Health Services Act of 2025. No one should be forced to choose between serving their country and starting their family. More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

A former “Alligator Alcatraz” corrections officer is describing the facility as an oversized, overcrowded dog kennel.
* No sunlight.
* No hot water.
* Limited access to showers.
* Bathrooms backed up.
* Water pouring into the tents on rainy days.
* No relief from the sweltering heat
* Swarms of mosquitos

Detainees are scared, and 72 percent of them have committed no crimes.
The former employee said, “It’s inhumane the way that they’re keeping their residents. They’re doing wrong.”
Journalists are being denied access to the area.
**The Tamiami Trail through the Everglades is the only road leading to Alligator Alcatraz - and Cedar Key Progress donors like you have now funded a billboard to ensure anyone who drives it knows what an American disgrace it is.**

clean_body: | | | Our billboard is now LIVE on the only road leading to ICE’s swamp camp. A former “Alligator Alcatraz” corrections officer is describing the facility as an oversized, overcrowded dog kennel. No sunlight. No hot water. Limited access to showers. Bathrooms backed up. Water pouring into the tents on rainy days. No relief from the sweltering heat Swarms of mosquitos Detainees are scared, and 72 percent of them have committed no crimes. The former employee said, “It’s inhumane the way that they’re keeping their residents. They’re doing wrong.” Journalists are being denied access to the area. The Tamiami Trail through the Everglades is the only road leading to Alligator Alcatraz - and Cedar Key Progress donors like you have now funded a billboard to ensure anyone who drives it knows what an American disgrace it is. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. To donate by check, send to: Cedar Key Progress c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- \- Paid for by Cedar Key Progress and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. subject: We’re launching a FUNDRAISING STORM while Dems snooze this August.

** ** **Speaker Johnson: ** It's August, which means Democrats in Congress are spending the month schmoozing with the leftist donors. Meanwhile, I'm sending this to every strong Republican supporter. It's a memo with a plan to deliver a **BIG BLOW** to the Left. Instead of taking time off, I've asked Republicans to roll up their sleeves and hit the ground hard to raise every dollar we can to return to D.C. stronger than **EVER.** Because here's the truth: teachers, nurses, plumbers, electricians, mechanics, and the regular working-class folks who built this country **DON 'T** get a month off. **So why should politicians?** I've never been one to take breaks. Every second I have as Speaker of the House, I'm using it to help Republicans and President Trump win **BIG.** It's the _least_ I can do to thank the people who elected me. And we've already shown what's possible. In just the first 7 months of President Trump's term, we've accomplished more than most presidents do in a **LIFETIME.** So while the Democrats are snoozing, I'm plotting to **DERAIL** their entire movement. We're closer than ever to landing the **KNOCKOUT PUNCH** , but frankly, I can't do it alone. _**I need YOUR help to succeed.**_ Every dollar we raise from grassroots heroes like you fires a **flurry** of bad news at the Democrats and soon enough, they'll be running for the hills. It's never too early to start preparing for the 2026 midterms. We'll need **EVERY **dollar to combat the Radical Left's lunatic agenda that will come at us like a **FREIGHT TRAIN** next year. 2026 is **THE** fork in the road that will determine the future of our country and of President Trump's term. If we take our foot off the gas now, we could be throwing away **EVERYTHING** we've achieved so far. **[That’s why I’m humbly asking for just $5 today. clean_body: > This is our plan to deal a BLOW this August << | | Speaker Johnson: It's August, which means Democrats in Congress are spending the month schmoozing with the leftist donors. Meanwhile, I'm sending this to every strong Republican supporter. It's a memo with a plan to deliver a BIG BLOW to the Left. Instead of taking time off, I've asked Republicans to roll up their sleeves and hit the ground hard to raise every dollar we can to return to D.C. stronger than EVER. Because here's the truth: teachers, nurses, plumbers, electricians, mechanics, and the regular working-class folks who built this country DON 'T get a month off. So why should politicians? I've never been one to take breaks. Every second I have as Speaker of the House, I'm using it to help Republicans and President Trump win BIG. It's the least I can do to thank the people who elected me. And we've already shown what's possible. In just the first 7 months of President Trump's term, we've accomplished more than most presidents do in a LIFETIME. So while the Democrats are snoozing, I'm plotting to DERAIL their entire movement. We're closer than ever to landing the KNOCKOUT PUNCH , but frankly, I can't do it alone. I need YOUR help to succeed. Every dollar we raise from grassroots heroes like you fires a flurry of bad news at the Democrats and soon enough, they'll be running for the hills. It's never too early to start preparing for the 2026 midterms. We'll need EVERY dollar to combat the Radical Left's lunatic agenda that will come at us like a FREIGHT TRAIN next year. 2026 is THE fork in the road that will determine the future of our country and of President Trump's term. If we take our foot off the gas now, we could be throwing away EVERYTHING we've achieved so far. ** I've asked every Republican in Congress to join me to launch a FUNDRAISING STORM against the Left. But we can't get the job done without grassroots support from folks like you. Your friend, Speaker Mike Johnson Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

| | Dear Peter,
---
Last November, a record-breaking 9 million Californians passed [Proposition 4](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113746434/564790695/242390430?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjYjVjMmE1LWI4N2UtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4GdrbVtL5SjocoDcrWJro7LSROwRlaH5PcZrpT7lork=&emci=3523de71-487d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=ccb5c2a5-b87e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1504551), securing $10 billion for climate resilience efforts. Voters made it clear: Investing in a healthy environment—including redwood ecosystems—is vital. Yet despite this mandate**, the California Assembly now says it won’t release Prop 4 funds this year.** In an era of megafires, drought, and threats to clean water and air, this is unacceptable. Together we got Prop 4 on the ballot and secured its passage. Now let’s work together to ensure every voter-approved dollar is used to strengthen California’s resilience. [Contact your state legislators today ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113746437/564790696/1500783926?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjYjVjMmE1LWI4N2UtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4GdrbVtL5SjocoDcrWJro7LSROwRlaH5PcZrpT7lork=&emci=3523de71-487d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=ccb5c2a5-b87e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1504551)and demand Prop 4 funding be allocated this year—as promised. The legislative session ends in just a few weeks. We must act now so the organizations safeguarding our natural resources get the funds they need.**** **Voters said yes. Now let’s make sure legislators listen.**

clean_body: Weeks left to release billions in funding for climate resilience—act now| | | | | | | Dear Peter, Last November, a record-breaking 9 million Californians passed , securing $10 billion for climate resilience efforts. Voters made it clear: Investing in a healthy environment—including redwood ecosystems—is vital. Yet despite this mandate, the California Assembly now says it won’t release Prop 4 funds this year. In an era of megafires, drought, and threats to clean water and air, this is unacceptable. Together we got Prop 4 on the ballot and secured its passage. Now let’s work together to ensure every voter-approved dollar is used to strengthen California’s resilience. demand Prop 4 funding be allocated this year—as promised. The legislative session ends in just a few weeks. We must act now so the organizations safeguarding our natural resources get the funds they need.** Voters said yes. Now let’s make sure legislators listen.** | | Thank you, Save the Redwoods League | | Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States CONNECT WITH US | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- |

**[Mom, social worker, and union sister Elizabeth Guzman is now endorsed by the Virginia AFL-CIO in a crucial, nationally-watched red to blue race in VA-HD22. Donate NOW to win in just over 70 days.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqV4L1yibpnnxAqS2wxuS2391adw55EaVet93JJXLwbcl4Y2X2ny7zvNHM4TiWSkviPgVzsWWfq5gMW7ejsxCtAabunZQGSb0oP5Jx8qvuQ1BTUO9Uc9Q4L4PWprHw4x2xLXwPY_5Im_rL1JxslxyMpOol9FJ9U3G_xFln4RUN7GgrxOvvisq4X0-5hOEJzzpCkqERoE1ZVRu8xAnupmOw_g1Pwgie8IiwhHbc_KBNAbIC5dp0y1Hrt6grMSBq1B3ksiqFhvyxwDR_RzMyPz5oRjIFLuvYKN7UlahJkHhmFRGIlPLXExOKnx6n3Ujo9ezLXV15c2fdPqWPfQJPozlo1U/4j8/wMRnPRThSwuoY7YePVrcSg/h1/h001.oKJJbkYhSHuu6XPhRlkLUyfkbdqQz3BxlGDWpXoLzbk)**
* * *
The Virginia AFL-CIO is proud to endorse mom, social worker, and labor leader Elizabeth Guzman to flip VA-HD22 this November against an ardent anti-labor MAGA Republican.
In her previous service in the House of Delegates, Elizabeth passed a law repealing a Jim Crow-era ban on public sector collective bargaining - allowing teachers, firefighters, and other public servants the right to organize.
Now, she’s running to return to the VA House.
As union-buster Donald Trump tears up contracts with public servants, and guts federal enforcement of labor laws, a strong union victory in Virginia’s November elections will show that we’re fighting back.
Early voting starts in less than a month - and we are running a full-scale advertising, mail, and field campaign funded by over 6,000 donations from bold activists like you.

subject: Does this worry you?

body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
WaPo - The truth about election fraud: It’s rare [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/WaPo_TruthElectionFraudRare.png]
As the 2024 elections got underway, many Americans, in particular those who identify as Republicans, were increasingly fearful that the outcome would be affected or even determined by election fraud.
Thousands of poll watchers were dispatched. Drop boxes were under surveillance. A Fox News poll conducted recently still found that 55 percent of those surveyed were extremely or very concerned about voter fraud despite lacking any evidence of fraud. Among self-identified Republicans, nearly three-quarters said they were that concerned.
Team: Are you worried about voter fraud?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=082125_2yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=082125_2no&amount=15]

https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=082125_2&amount=20]

clean_body: Voter Action Project [] WaPo - The truth about election fraud: It’s rare [] As the 2024 elections got underway, many Americans, in particular those who identify as Republicans, were increasingly fearful that the outcome would be affected or even determined by election fraud. Thousands of poll watchers were dispatched. Drop boxes were under surveillance. A Fox News poll conducted recently still found that 55 percent of those surveyed were extremely or very concerned about voter fraud despite lacking any evidence of fraud. Among self-identified Republicans, nearly three-quarters said they were that concerned. Team: Are you worried about voter fraud? By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded: YES [] NO [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. Peter — It's been official. Trump's so-called "Big, Beautiful Bill" is law, and the consequences are _devastating._
The nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office confirms what we feared: **11.8 million Americans will lose Medicaid coverage** while billionaires receive massive tax breaks.
Roughly **1 in 5 Americans** rely on Medicaid. This bill puts their care, their hospitals, and their lives at risk. No one should lose access to health care just to pay for billionaire tax cuts.
**We need to know where you stand:**
**Do you support Donald Trump’s Medicaid cuts?**
**[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113747356/564793938/-1704325408?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjZTI4ODZlLWI5N2UtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4wwuTrthXTcL1vYf_NhPBQnvtBy_GSo3AdnUP15Ghxo=&emci=a4231f37-177e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=8ce2886e-b97e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=16951753)** | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113747357/564793939/-1704325408?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjZTI4ODZlLWI5N2UtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4wwuTrthXTcL1vYf_NhPBQnvtBy_GSo3AdnUP15Ghxo=&emci=a4231f37-177e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=8ce2886e-b97e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=16951753)**

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: update RE: Newsom's plan to STOP the GOP election steal
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-threespecials?refcode=082125_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-threespecials?refcode=082125_2]
UPDATE: Gavin Newsom just went ALL-IN to stop Trump & Abbott’s election-rigging scheme!!
California Democrats are launching a mid-decade redistricting plan — and Republicans are already on the attack.
We’re standing with them, but we need to raise emergency grassroots funds before midnight to fuel this fight. Rush $10 right now so we can help pass California’s plan and stop MAGA gerrymandering nationwide » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-abbott?refcode=082125_2]
🚨🚨🚨BREAKING NEWS🚨🚨🚨
California just became the first Democratic state to launch a mid- decade redistricting plan to counter Donald Trump and Greg Abbott’s map-rigging scheme.
Gov. Gavin Newsom and Democratic leaders have announced the Election Rigging Response Act — a constitutional amendment, a new congressional map, and a $100 million voter campaign to be decided this November 4 .
We’re standing with them — because this is how Democrats fight back and WIN.
But we have less than 90 days to help mobilize the grassroots, and Republicans are already attacking the plan.
We need your help right now: Will you rush $10 so we can help pass California’s plan, stop GOP gerrymandering, and defend democracy nationwide? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-abbott?refcode=082125_2]
Here’s what’s at stake:
* Trump and Abbott are redrawing Texas’ map to grab 5 more GOP seats.
* California’s plan can neutralize their power grab — and inspire other blue states to act.
* This will be close, expensive, and we cannot afford to fall short.
If we win, Democrats set the standard for fighting back in eve ry state.
If we lose, we hand Trump a free pass to rig the House for years to come.
We have the momentum — now we need the resources to finish the fight. Chip in NOW to stand with Gavin Newsom, Texas Democrats, and the fighters on the frontlines COMBATTING the MAGA takeover in every corner of the country. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-abbott?refcode=082125_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-abbott?express_lane=true&refcode=082125_2&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-abbott?express_lane=true&refcode=082125_2&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-abbott?express_lane=true&refcode=082125_2&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-abbott?express_lane=true&refcode=082125_2&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-abbott?express_lane=true&refcode=082125_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-weekly?refcode=082125_2&amount=25]
Thanks for standing up for Democracy,
The Real Texas PAC
The Real Texas PAC
1150 N Loop 1604 W
Ste 108-230
San Antonio, TX 78248
United States
Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/Pq6mZqR8vUu32u6MFdTiQw2?unsubscribedata=hsO8HAPcwDoqKTvMk5CewYS8eZA3CB6BLdAhiPICcmuuaN5Ot4rFcXnLm725qnOZk3XD%2BEaKSKdFU42%2BFYHMWj7PfaRJ%2BDI1E03zjJXJMzq9k10mwdxSphkS1gnoSpQPOQPZF3HFHfwfk8JHkOVqebOrYHS%2BvenH56tErVdRbZ6tKNHHZbeFRTl5bW8M7zqJMFFA4xC7K8gbtgaY6neqqCPbFV0YYPTAWCIi5%2FMDQR%2F1%2FqNIJdbAULrPZB%2FrmAv5xZR4IhRqPaEcnXTFdMSqyA8b3xO6RRFAyqJSti1SpKpmgX4wjpwDZW0YvuLvaeCjPaxjw2qA8VOk1MDtPA7iy47SflWhsomKkRSQMbH3xdJr02s5%2FNtWV26%2B00mqMBNBXknkjCcyQ3q1XxWiebNjS0zecNLv9o6GLmZ38oILv%2Fg%3D .

name: Vann Bentley, Team Pappas
subject: This shouldn’t be up for a debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
I married the love of my life. Now SCOTUS might take that away.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=1967%2E582294%2EFntLpr)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250821_1_vann?refcode=em20250821-1967&amount=5&refcode2=1967_582294_FntLpr&akid=1967%2E582294%2EFntLpr)
I never thought I’d have to write an email like this.
When Chris and I got married, we did so believing that our love was just as valid and protected as anyone else’s. Now the Supreme Court has been asked to determine whether that’s true.
And honestly? _It’s terrifying._
Let me be perfectly clear. No Supreme Court decision will change our love or our bond. But the host of legal, medical, and other rights of married couples are at risk.
This isn’t political theory — it’s our life. And if the Court rules the wrong way, families like ours across the country could lose the rights and protections we’ve fought so hard for.
**Chris is running for Senate because he knows what’s at stake — not just for us, but for millions of LGBTQ+ Americans.** I’ve seen firsthand how deeply committed he is to standing up to dangerous, right-wing extremists who want to drag our country backward.
Now more than ever, we need leaders in the Senate who will fight to protect our families, not erase them. My husband Chris is that leader — but he can’t win this race without you.
[**Will you contribute $5 and send Chris to the Senate so he can fight for all of us?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250821_1_vann?refcode=em20250821-1967&amount=5&refcode2=1967_582294_FntLpr&akid=1967%2E582294%2EFntLpr)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250821_1_vann?amount=5&refcode=em20250821-1967&refcode2=1967_582294_FntLpr&akid=1967%2E582294%2EFntLpr)**
Thank you for standing with us.
❤️ Vann
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250821-1?t=2&refcode2=1967_582294_FntLpr&akid=1967%2E582294%2EFntLpr)**

name: Robert Garcia
subject: The stakes just got higher
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113747909/564796003/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2JlODI0NS1iYzdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iEp3CwYQpnTRz6sKgHwpMisCrXxOjyho3hK_rasH_RM=)
Hi, it's Democratic Congressman Robert Garcia. I have big news: Our Congressional district just got redrawn.
**If this map is passed, I will be running in California's new 42nd District. **
This district includes my hometown of Long Beach, as well as Seal Beach, Huntington Beach, Newport Beach, Costa Mesa, and South Santa Ana.
**Here’s the rub:** This new district is tougher. In 2024, our district voted for Kamala Harris by 32 points. _Our new district voted for Kamala Harris by less than half that._
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113747910/564796004/-309737922?refcode=250821_RG_stakes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2JlODI0NS1iYzdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iEp3CwYQpnTRz6sKgHwpMisCrXxOjyho3hK_rasH_RM=)
That means we need to fight harder than ever to keep this seat blue.
But here’s what else you should know: I’m not backing down. I love my current district, and I’m proud of the communities I’ve served. But I also understand the stakes — our democracy is on the line.
**This is going to be one of the most competitive races in California. Republicans will pour money into Southern California to try to flip this seat. And the only way we can stop them is with a strong grassroots campaign powered by supporters like you.**
**[So I’m asking: will you chip in $10, $20, or whatever you can today to help us launch this new campaign in CA-42, keep this district blue, and flip the House?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113747911/564796005/-309737922?refcode=250821_RG_stakes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2JlODI0NS1iYzdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iEp3CwYQpnTRz6sKgHwpMisCrXxOjyho3hK_rasH_RM=)**

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1011&refcode=email-20250821_v&akid=9222%2E5885482%2EX33IK1 ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Andrew Cuomo just said the quiet part out loud, ADMITTING that he’s
relying on Donald Trump and his Republican cronies to beat grassroots
progressive champion Zohran Mamdani.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33255?source=email-20250821&t=1061&akid=9222%2E5885482%2EX33IK1 ]Headline: Cuomo admits he really needs Trump's help

That’s right – Cuomo told a roomful of rich donors at a fundraiser in the
Hamptons that he believes “there will be opportunities to actually
cooperate” with Trump. He’s not even bothering to hide it as he
desperately tries to claw his way back to power – pandering to
billionaires, Republican deal-makers, and the old Democratic machine.

This is a fight for the future of the Democratic Party, and for who our
government really serves. And Our Revolution is ALL IN, hitting the
streets to do everything we can to help Mamdani win.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250821nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9222%2E5885482%2EX33IK1 ]Donate $5, $25, or whatever you can right now to fuel Our Revolution’s
work to elect Mamdani, and show Trump, Cuomo, and their billionaire donors
that our political system is NOT for sale.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250821nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9222%2E5885482%2EX33IK1 ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250821nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9222%2E5885482%2EX33IK1 ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250821nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9222%2E5885482%2EX33IK1 ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250821nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9222%2E5885482%2EX33IK1 ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250821nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9222%2E5885482%2EX33IK1 ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250821nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9222%2E5885482%2EX33IK1 ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Make no mistake: Cuomo and the rest of the establishment are scared as
they try desperately to hang onto their power. Mamdani’s campaign is
drawing record crowds as his progressive platform inspires the grassroots.

And so Cuomo is lining up every right-wing donor he can find, launching
attack ads designed to spread fear and division, and flooding social media
with lies about Mamdani’s record. So-called Democratic “moderates” are
happy to let Trumpists choose our next mayor, as long as it keeps
progressives out.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33255?source=email-20250821&t=1060&akid=9222%2E5885482%2EX33IK1 ]Headline: Cuomo hopes Trump will help him beat Mamdani

We’re NOT going to let them win, but we’re up against millions of dollars
in billionaire money and right-wing PACs. Every grassroots gift means we
can put more organizers in the field, knock more doors, counter their lies
with the truth, and turn out voters in every neighborhood.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250821nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9222%2E5885482%2EX33IK1 ]Cuomo and Trump think they can buy this election. Let’s show them what
people power looks like. Chip in now and inspire the next victory for the
working class EVERYWHERE.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

So-called Democratic “moderates” are happy to let Trumpists choose our next mayor, as long as it keeps progressives out. [ ]Headline: Cuomo hopes Trump will help him beat Mamdani We’re NOT going to let them win, but we’re up against millions of dollars in billionaire money and right-wing PACs. Every grassroots gift means we can put more organizers in the field, knock more doors, counter their lies with the truth, and turn out voters in every neighborhood. [ ]Cuomo and Trump think they can buy this election. Let’s show them what people power looks like. Chip in now and inspire the next victory for the working class EVERYWHERE. When we organize, we win. ❌ Here in the Commonwealth, Republicans are coalescing around an extreme Republican who is running in 2026. An election denier and anti-choice extremist, and we need to be ready to fight back.
❌ Three million Pennsylvanians are at risk of losing healthcare access, food assistance programs are being slashed, and families are struggling.
