| | Donald Trump just unveiled his latest attack on democracy: he wants to eliminate Vote by Mail by executive order. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113748173/564797075/-1309392219?contactdata=tDE1cWDy4CzcicaZPx+Sa+a1hfgeG0TcIEWVo7R4qtKkobJWSr/JK8klL8pakpKTjtgjDFLo8D+0fl3pL7oGzKmG3p9IdI6lJvHVKW1KrTBHASlKOGqpLKPwgCoJVRgrmh2FPfKNDATKh8RUfVg6IQ==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzE4ZWJkOC1iYzdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ugBOKihrQKkoUWWCcK8vjivEntPZsV5B-PB15juCrqw=&emci=5388834d-b17e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=dc18ebd8-bc7e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7731215) **Let's be clear: Vote by Mail is safe, trusted, and used successfully by millions of Americans — including here in Oregon** , where we've been voting exclusively by mail for more than 20 years. Because of it, we consistently have some of the highest voter turnout rates in the nation. That's what happens when you make voting accessible and secure. Vote by Mail leaves a paper trail, prevents long lines at polling places, and ensures that every eligible voter can have their say. Donald Trump and Republicans want to turn back the clock and make it harder to vote and harder to be heard. **Trump wants everyone to have to vote on Election Day because it is very easy to suppress the vote in targeted precincts and manipulate the outcome on Election Day.** Reducing the number of polling places, constantly moving their locations, putting them in areas with little parking, understaffing them, or using faulty machines all create long lines, so fewer people can wait to vote. This kind of Election Day suppression is common in many parts of the country and deeply undermines our democracy. But we won't let them strip Americans of this freedom. That's why I've championed legislation to safeguard and expand access to the ballot box, strengthen election security, and make Vote by Mail the law of the land. **Voting is a right, not a privilege, and it should be accessible and easy for every American, no matter your zip code.** Egged on by Trump, Republicans across the country are ramping up voter suppression tactics to silence our voices, block participation, and make it harder to hold them accountable. Democracy only exists when every eligible voter can cast a ballot and have their vote counted, and Vote by Mail is one of the best tools we have to make that happen. Vote by Mail isn't a partisan issue. It's a democracy issue. It's about whether power belongs to the people or to politicians who want to silence them. The ballot box is the beating heart of our democracy, and we must do everything we can to make sure all Americans can have their voices heard. name: Chris Brooks, LCV
subject: LET'S SHUT THIS COAL PLANT DOWN.
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI4NDQwMjMS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjI4MDI2MDkzNQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter — coal-burning facilities worsen the climate crisis and are a nightmare for our health. Their dirty emissions are pumped into our air and cause damage to our hearts,
lungs, and brains. Children, the elderly, pregnant women, individuals with
chronic disease, and those who work outdoors are especially vulnerable. Today is the deadline for the Trump administration to decide the fate of a coal
power plant that’s plagued Michigan residents for decades. The president’s phony “energy emergency” is keeping the plant open despite a
years-old plan to retire it. The J.H. Campbell power plant was slated to close in May. But a last minute
order from Trump’s Department of Energy has forced it to keep operating despite
opposition from local communities. Instead of moving to cleaner energy sources,
Michigan residents are being forced to pay to keep operating a polluting plant
that is jeopardizing their health and environment. We’re rallying the local community to show that NO ONE WANTS THIS COAL PLANT.
Our demonstrations at the plant are making sure they hear our voices – and we’re
going to keep campaigning until we close it for good. We need your help to keep our campaign going, Peter.YOUR support is what allows us to keep up the pressure on polluters, rally in
communities like these, and make our grassroots movement impossible to ignore. A decision from the Trump administration could come at any moment. Please, help power our response by renewing your LCV membership today >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/G8bxcK_ RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/X6bzs~ https://links.messages.lcv. Peter — we have a real shotat shutting down this harmful facility once and for all, bringing relief to
hundreds of thousands of Michiganders. But the truth is that we’re in for a real fight from the Trump administration
and their fossil fuel allies who care more about their dirty energy profits than
about our climate or our health. We rely on support from LCV members like you to keep our campaigns for people and our planet going strong. As we wait for the Trump administration’s ruling, I hope you’ll renew your LCV membership today >> https://links.messages.lcv. Thanks for standing with us, Peter. Together, we can bring real change that makes our communities and our climate healthy and safe for
generations to come. With gratitude,

Chris Brooks
Vice President of Membership
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12844023&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI4MDI2MDkzNQS2&spReportId=MjI4MDI2MDkzNQS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12844023&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI4MDI2MDkzNQS2&spReportId=MjI4MDI2MDkzNQS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~

But a last minute order from Trump’s Department of Energy has forced it to keep operating despite opposition from local communities. Instead of moving to cleaner energy sources, Michigan residents are being forced to pay to keep operating a polluting plant that is jeopardizing their health and environment. We’re rallying the local community to show that NO ONE WANTS THIS COAL PLANT. Our demonstrations at the plant are making sure they hear our voices – and we’re going to keep campaigning until we close it for good. We need your help to keep our campaign going, Peter.YOUR support is what allows us to keep up the pressure on polluters, rally in communities like these, and make our grassroots movement impossible to ignore. A decision from the Trump administration could come at any moment. Please, help power our response by renewing your LCV membership today >> RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP >> Peter — we have a real shotat shutting down this harmful facility once and for all, bringing relief to hundreds of thousands of Michiganders. But the truth is that we’re in for a real fight from the Trump administration and their fossil fuel allies who care more about their dirty energy profits than about our climate or our health. We rely on support from LCV members like you to keep our campaigns for people and our planet going strong. As we wait for the Trump administration’s ruling, I hope you’ll renew your LCV membership today >> Thanks for standing with us, Peter. Together, we can bring real change that makes our communities and our climate healthy and safe for generations to come. With gratitude, Chris Brooks Vice President of Membership League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information here to unsubscribe from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support. 740 15th St NW, Suite 700 Washington, DC 20005 202-785-8683 DONATE

body:
https://www.movement4freedom.com/home [https://www.movement4freedom.com/home]
Hi friends,
For those who received our email yesterday, we want to make sure you have all the correct details about this Saturday’s mutual aid event:
If you’re in the DC area, we’d love for you to join us this Saturday, August 23rd, from 11 AM – 4 PM, for a free mutual aid event hosted by Monument City Mutual Aid and 50501 DC, a space to connect, learn, and support one another.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250821_mutualaid_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250821_mutualaid_actrs]
This free mutual aid event, hosted by Monument City Mutual Aid and 50501 DC, will be a space to connect, learn, and support one another. Movement for Freedom will be hosting a workshop at 11 AM!
📍 Tools for Self-Care in Stressful Times
When: Saturday, August 23, at 11 AM
Where: St. Mark’s Episcopal, 301 A St SE, Washington, D.C.
Hosts: Rev. Dr. Stephany Rose & Dr. Dena Samuels
We don’t want to stop here. With your support, we can bring workshops like this to cities and towns across the country. Donate today to help us expand this work and bring healing tools to more communities. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250821_mutualaid_actrs]
And hope to see you Saturday,
— Stephany

Every single dollar helps us build, train, and fight for the justice we all deserve.
Want to learn more? Visit our website at Movement4Freedom.com [https://www.movement4freedom.com] .

body:

| | Hey Reader, Most civilians don't know this - and I’m shocked the mass media hasn’t picked up on this yet. But a group of American engineers have created **[the first unbreakab](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21836/6374453/3e6743aba32e70a8796145107cea2a4879df5ddb/3915ea34a61a0d7b5a6ce4e018c70e014a46a088)[le tactical glasses](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21836/6374453/3e6743aba32e70a8796145107cea2a4879df5ddb/3915ea34a61a0d7b5a6ce4e018c70e014a46a088)** that meet MIL SPEC ballistics standards for combat use... It’s all thanks to a groundbreaking new methods of using proven technology to create extreme durability and protection in even combat conditions. Now available to civilians for the first time. **[==> THESE are unbelievable](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21836/6374453/3e6743aba32e70a8796145107cea2a4879df5ddb/3915ea34a61a0d7b5a6ce4e018c70e014a46a088)** **Thank You.** **P.S.** Right now, I'm throwing in 4 sets of lenses, a hard case, and FREE S&H!

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Only Citizens Vote! Your Local and D.C. Action Steps.
body:
Deliver petitions in D.C., find a local tour stop, and sign wave for 30 minutes.
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/01000198cdf43cb4-3e6ce501-221c-4ac5-b9af-85a2d35decac-000000/ms4Su1JW4bM7_8vZl5-mlQx6JDP3r0iNkNjt08SzRIo=419)Patriot–**We’re running at full steam during Only Citizens Vote Month, and we’d love to have you with us.** Thousands of patriots are stepping up to spread the truth about the SAVE Act and why Congress needs to attach it to must-pass legislation _this year._
* * *
**When we show up, we win: D.C. rally & petition delivery**Join me in Washington, D.C. on Wednesday, Sept 10th for a rally and to deliver petition signatures to Congress to make it clear: **close the loopholes and pass the SAVE Act—only U.S. citizens vote in U.S. elections!** Make your plans now so that you are able to attend! Those who oppose election integrity are hoping for a low turnout. Don’t let that happen. From the earliest days in the tea party movement, we understood that “when we show up, we win.” Help us show up in great numbers and win this fight![RSVP FOR DC](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fevents.teapartypatriots.org%2Fevent%2Focv-bus-tour-washington-dc%2F/1/01000198cdf43cb4-3e6ce501-221c-4ac5-b9af-85a2d35decac-000000/wrvRJhQvVDLrAMxP27tvJQ7KFOvYA2usA3sB4EQJ_WY=419)Also, if you haven’t yet, please sign the petition _and_ help us collect signatures from friends, family, and neighbors, at community events, outside gun stores, etc. These are the petitions you can help us deliver in D.C.—and remember, the integrity of American elections is at stake!| [SIGN ONLINE](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Fonlycitizensvote%2F/1/01000198cdf43cb4-3e6ce501-221c-4ac5-b9af-85a2d35decac-000000/8VJU8k9m6gbVU-fisx-C8vQqlr5HIK218owK1hxm5mc=419)| [PRINT PETITION](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpp-resources.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fdocuments%2FTPPA-SaveAct-Petition.pdf/1/01000198cdf43cb4-3e6ce501-221c-4ac5-b9af-85a2d35decac-000000/xXe6E828A0dxyGvCn3CXMGcNUdWO4jYys656ifQ95GU=419)
---|---
* * *
**Host a sign-waving event on Saturday, August 23rd**
Organize a sign-waving event on Saturday, August 23rd (yes, tomorrow!) in your local community, in support of Only Citizens Vote Month and the SAVE Act. I know August is hot, but **even just thirty minutes on a busy corner in the morning when it’s a bit cooler can make a real impact.** Bring a friend and be seen. **I know this is short notice, but it can literally be you and one other person** with one homemade sign that says, “Only Citizens Vote!” And one that says, “Pass the SAVE Act NOW!” Take a picture and send it to [_**photos@teapartypatriots.org**_]() and it will absolutely help us apply pressure on Members of Congress that they can’t ignore.
[REGISTER EVENT](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fonly-citizens-vote-month%2F/1/01000198cdf43cb4-3e6ce501-221c-4ac5-b9af-85a2d35decac-000000/a1942BeYogctHX-hPS05j-ejG3cgo9jBMASqBk-iScE=419)
* * *
**Join us at a bus tour stop near you!**
Join us at one of the upcoming Only Citizens Vote Month Bus Tour stops. We’re crossing the nation to inform, equip, and rally Americans to support the SAVE Act so that we can ensure that only Americans vote in American elections. If we’re near you, come out—we want to see you!
[RSVP TO YOUR STOP](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fonlycitizensvotetour%2F/1/01000198cdf43cb4-3e6ce501-221c-4ac5-b9af-85a2d35decac-000000/JIvr414hoaXIhcoQlQBQ1D0BqMEKB12Zv-3VhaJ8HTE=419)
* * *
Thank you for standing with us this month. Every hour you give and every signature you gather matters. And please forward this to people you know who share our values!
In liberty,
Jenny Beth
[CONTRIBUTE](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/1/01000198cdf43cb4-3e6ce501-221c-4ac5-b9af-85a2d35decac-000000/a1EOx60QCWzTG59OumKKrdLLdx6_Of_SRa64jDts8JY=419)

_Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes._
To donate by mail, send your check made payable to:
[_**Tea Party Patriots Action**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/2/01000198cdf43cb4-3e6ce501-221c-4ac5-b9af-85a2d35decac-000000/c5IqeEJo1UrnAFeCmT9DyuaErQg35azLHNCEFcRaanY=419)
2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314
Woodstock, GA 30189
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [unsubscribe](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/1/01000198cdf43cb4-3e6ce501-221c-4ac5-b9af-85a2d35decac-000000/h3gI_0VjDjrGNBjlCfkOsLD8my2BvAwex0RvzGRBUS4=419) or [update your preferences](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/2/01000198cdf43cb4-3e6ce501-221c-4ac5-b9af-85a2d35decac-000000/5rwlKE9d5emDRJhRMDAPZeMbAWMgKM4WY0SjV7cgrhk=419).

subject: Senator Casey & Governor Wolf
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carol for PA
body:
I wanted to share a little bit about my journey and why I’m running for Congress.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113748580/564798513/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-08-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTZmYjcwNWMtYmY3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BdT_XVaO6uDPZtMpIsKYpIgYdK6tJDmTcjVjMWUei74=)

| Hi Peter, I wanted to share a little bit about my journey and why I’m running for Congress.

Before I decided to run, I had the privilege of serving Pennsylvanians under Senator Casey and Governor Wolf. I’ll tell you more about that in just a moment, but if you’re ready to help me continue fighting for our communities in Washington, I hope you’ll [_**make a donation to my campaign today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113748582/564798515/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-08-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTZmYjcwNWMtYmY3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BdT_XVaO6uDPZtMpIsKYpIgYdK6tJDmTcjVjMWUei74=)
---
| | | [DONATE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113748585/564798517/1877634325?&refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-08-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTZmYjcwNWMtYmY3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BdT_XVaO6uDPZtMpIsKYpIgYdK6tJDmTcjVjMWUei74=)
---
In 2011, Senator Bob Casey asked me to be his Regional Manager in Lehigh, Northampton, Carbon, and Berks Counties, and I served as his Statewide Latino Affairs Advisor. I worked one-on-one with thousands of people in our community, connecting them to services that made a real difference in their lives. I went to bat for them, and I’m proud to have delivered results.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113748588/564798520/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-08-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTZmYjcwNWMtYmY3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BdT_XVaO6uDPZtMpIsKYpIgYdK6tJDmTcjVjMWUei74=)
A few years later, I joined Governor Tom Wolf’s Advisory Commission on Latino Affairs, representing the Lehigh Valley. I pushed for policies that truly supported working families and advocated for our community’s needs at the highest level of state government.

I’ve seen firsthand how important it is to listen to people, understand their struggles, and take action to make life better for them. And now, I’m running for Congress because I believe PA-07 deserves someone who shows up, listens, and actually gets things done.

But here’s the thing: This race is going to take everything we’ve got. We need your support to stay competitive and keep pushing forward.

[_**Will you chip in today to help us continue this fight and make sure PA-07 gets the representation it deserves?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113748591/564798523/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-08-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTZmYjcwNWMtYmY3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BdT_XVaO6uDPZtMpIsKYpIgYdK6tJDmTcjVjMWUei74=)

Thank you for your support,

Carol Obando-Derstine

clean_body: I wanted to share a little bit about my journey and why I’m running for Congress. | = | Hi Peter, I wanted to share a little bit about my journey and why I’m running for Congress. Before I decided to run, I had the privilege of serving Pennsylvanians under Senator Casey and Governor Wolf. I’ll tell you more about that in just a moment, but if you’re ready to help me continue fighting for our communities in Washington, I hope you’ll = | | | = In 2011, Senator Bob Casey asked me to be his Regional Manager in Lehigh, Northampton, Carbon, and Berks Counties, and I served as his Statewide Latino Affairs Advisor. I worked one-on-one with thousands of people in our community, connecting them to services that made a real difference in their lives. I went to bat for them, and I’m proud to have delivered results. = A few years later, I joined Governor Tom Wolf’s Advisory Commission on Latino Affairs, representing the Lehigh Valley. I pushed for policies that truly supported working families and advocated for our community’s needs at the highest level of state government. I’ve seen firsthand how important it is to listen to people, understand their struggles, and take action to make life better for them. And now, I’m running for Congress because I believe PA-07 deserves someone who shows up, listens, and actually gets things done. But here’s the thing: This race is going to take everything we’ve got. We need your support to stay competitive and keep pushing forward. = | | | = Thank you for your support, Carol Obando-Derstine * | | = Paid for by Carol for PA Carol for PA P.O Box 83 Allentown, PA 18105 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

Peter,

Last week, EMILYs List Action released new national polling with Impact Research that zeroed in on the issues women voters care about most — and we're using those insights to shape our plan to win big in the midterms. The results revealed:
* The depth of Americans' economic struggles
* The anger toward the current state of politics under a second Trump administration
* What voters want to see from candidates in 2025 and 2026

Now, we want _your_ voice in the mix. We're asking our most committed supporters to share their perspective on the economy, the issues that matter most, and the kind of leadership our country needs.

**Your answers will help guide how we recruit, train, and elect Democratic pro-choice women who will lower costs, protect freedoms, and deliver for American families. **

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: New Op-Ed: "Media fact-checkers brought ruin on themselves"
body:
| | |
---
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=7d29d02972ce48f1af15cb1fd26807d0&_e=mw2eazqyeAL_ckwOsyckB5z4bk0agLRKiNXKSf6859xhi6H2Mke5t-aEAP7wAlPqDfzVG9v9B1-z6zFrlmKGz7Ul2XgmS0jFPo6i2N5r34bHknKE5K_8IdtLy6-6hhi-7eDuqT7IeyOI5Qzc6FdlSbI9eLxZUl75p6zu8SMJYqozMeCV62DpcrrLOCLQuEcRT6fqhGzSCDpSnfq3kpIYWXRR499aKG0Nmr6rnUlQLM5ff7DB38M-VJDUWS1B29TkXvYw6Wxe8WAD-O7WCSJzft-vMX3ftw-BgWI3OStWS6YxZjF0cn5E9el7lzhU7gj3)
---
**Media fact-checkers brought ruin on themselves** By Bobby Jindal
---

---
Media fact-checkers self-immolated their credibility when they conspired with Biden government bureaucrats to suppress questions about the possible lab leak origins of COVID-19, the efficacy of masks and social distancing, and vaccine side effects. As Sen. John Kennedy (R-LA) observed, we need new conspiracy theories because “all the old ones turned out to be true.”
I had an up-close and personal encounter with these biased “fact-checkers.” On Jan. 19, 2015, I addressed London’s Henry Jackson Society and decried “no-go zones,” where the police were unable to enforce the law, to proclaim the need for assimilation to accompany immigration. My remarks caused predictable liberal denunciations, and I was invited by the international media to defend my statements. name: Juan Ciscomani
subject: Here’s what I’ve been up to 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=9f85b6b687&e=659fba240e)
---
|
# **Here’s what I’ve been up to 🇺🇸**

We’ve had some**BIG** wins in Washington, and before heading home for August, we passed one of the biggest yet.
📣 **PASSED: The One Big Beautiful Bill** This is a major win—and I was proud to vote**YES.** ✅ **Tax relief that helps Arizona families and job creators**
We expanded the small business deduction, restored 100% expensing, and introduced the new “No Tax on Overtime” provision—because if you're putting in extra hours to support your family, Washington shouldn’t take more out of your paycheck. ✅ **B****order security**
This bill provides more agents, better enforcement, and serious resources for our Border Patrol. As a representative of a border district, this has been a top priority from day one. ✅ **Pro-growth, pro-America policy**
It reins in reckless spending and rolls back Washington overreach—putting families back in control.

This is the kind of commonsense legislation Arizona needs and that you sent me to Washington to fight for.

📍 **Back in AZ-06 for August** I’m back home, spending August doing what matters most: spending time with family and staying connected to the people I serve in AZ-06. I started the month speaking with the North West Republican Association, where we had a thoughtful discussion about the One Big Beautiful Bill, the need for serious border enforcement, and the importance of delivering real tax relief to working families and small businesses. I am excited to be back home and am looking forward to seeing you around the district!

Your friend,
Juan

**P.S.** If you haven’t signed my petition to get back on the 2026 ballot yet, this is the first step to keeping the House majority, and it runs right through AZ-06.
👉 **[SIGN HERE](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=3215cae9eb&e=659fba240e)**

Peter, I've seen a lot of tough races in my time, so let me tell you:

The Virginia Governor's race is a bellwether for the entire country. This will be the first major election of Trump's second term, and it will set the stage for Democrats in 2026. _If we don't win big here, we'll be facing a rough road ahead._

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: Americans deserve to live free from the fear of losing Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
Last week, we celebrated 90 years since the creation of Social Security. Today, the program provides monthly benefits to almost 70 million seniors, disabled people, and survivors.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113749488/564801738/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjQyNGEyMmEtYzE3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Brt9J5TFrbF7oyDpsVrgH6whwcbRBZ5MESs0s-y7Lps=) Last week, we celebrated 90 years since the creation of Social Security. Today, the program provides monthly benefits to almost 70 million seniors, disabled people, and survivors. These are benefits that Americans have earned after a lifetime of work. They allow seniors to retire with dignity, and tens of millions of people count on them each month. **But over the last few months, we’ve seen Republicans in Washington threaten the agency and the benefits people depend on.** Since the start of the new administration, the Social Security Agency has cut 7,000 workers — the largest staffing cut in the agency’s history. They’ve closed field offices around the country. And just recently, the Treasury Secretary suggested that the “Trump accounts” created in the GOP’s budget could be a “backdoor for privatizing Social Security.” These attacks on Social Security have only raised concerns about the earned benefits millions of people count on — and they deserve to know this earned benefit isn’t going anywhere. **Americans deserve to live free from the fear of losing their Social Security, and I’m fighting to protect this critical lifeline in Congress.** **[I won’t stop fighting to protect and expand this essential program and stand up for the earned benefits millions of people count on — because our seniors deserve to retire with dignity. If you agree, I’m humbly asking for your support to help me keep up this fight in Congress to protect Social Security.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113749489/564801743/-629675555?refcode=email_082125_social-security&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjQyNGEyMmEtYzE3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Brt9J5TFrbF7oyDpsVrgH6whwcbRBZ5MESs0s-y7Lps=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113749491/564801750/-629675555?refcode=email_082125_social-security&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjQyNGEyMmEtYzE3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Brt9J5TFrbF7oyDpsVrgH6whwcbRBZ5MESs0s-y7Lps=)

clean_body: Last week, we celebrated 90 years since the creation of Social Security. Today, the program provides monthly benefits to almost 70 million seniors, disabled people, and survivors. = Last week, we celebrated 90 years since the creation of Social Security. Today, the program provides monthly benefits to almost 70 million seniors, disabled people, and survivors. These are benefits that Americans have earned after a lifetime of work. They allow seniors to retire with dignity, and tens of millions of people count on them each month. But over the last few months, we’ve seen Republicans in Washington threaten the agency and the benefits people depend on. Since the start of the new administration, the Social Security Agency has cut 7,000 workers — the largest staffing cut in the agency’s history. They’ve closed field offices around the country. And just recently, the Treasury Secretary suggested that the “Trump accounts” created in the GOP’s budget could be a “backdoor for privatizing Social Security.” These attacks on Social Security have only raised concerns about the earned benefits millions of people count on — and they deserve to know this earned benefit isn’t going anywhere. Americans deserve to live free from the fear of losing their Social Security, and I’m fighting to protect this critical lifeline in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you, Janelle | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. We need to act now >>

| Hi friend, we’re reaching out again because the threat to the U.S. Postal Service hasn’t gone away — in fact, it’s getting worse.

Donald Trump is doubling down on his push to privatize the USPS, **even though it’s protected by the Constitution and essential to millions of Americans.**

If he succeeds in handing over a vital public service to private corporations, it would set a dangerous precedent that presidents can dismantle core public services without any oversight.

New Dems are fighting back, but we need the backing of the American people who are paying attention and ready to push back.

Here's what you need to know and what you can do to help save the Postal Service.

1\. **The Post Office is enshrined in the US Constitution and created by an act of Congress.** _Trump’s efforts to unilaterally dismantle it are unconstitutional!_

2\. **Privatizing USPS would mean higher costs, slower delivery, and the loss of universal service** — especially for rural communities, seniors, and people with disabilities.

3\. **It’s a threat to our elections.** Millions depend on the USPS to vote by mail. Weakening it makes it harder for everyday Americans to participate in our democracy.

We can’t allow Trump to dismantle the USPS and privatize it completely.

**[As New Dems fight to defend working Americans’ access to the USPS, we need you to have our back! Can you add your name to defend the USPS? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113749713/564802402/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250821_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzI0YTIyYS1jMTdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K6pIT6ZzfI3ViGjn2Dt-BFY7YyNYXHM2hdBpquVThbs=&emci=2c0c0707-217d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=f324a22a-c17e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=48524772)**

Did you see this headline, Peter?
# Trump Builds $274 Million War Chest Ahead of Midterms
Wannabe dictator Trump is building his war chest to hold onto power and one of his biggest donors is right **here in Pennsylvania.** | _Trump's super PAC, MAGA Inc., took in $177 million, with support from executives in tech, finance, and energy, including a $5 million donation from [Elon] Musk and**$16 million from [Jeffrey] Yass.**_
---
Jeffrey Yass of Pennsylvania is spending BIG to keep Trump and his MAGA cronies in office. Not only is he giving to Trump’s Super PAC, Yass is also giving to the National Republican Senatorial Committee and the National Republican Congressional Committee to maintain Congressional control. It's only a matter of time before he tries again to buy the PA Supreme Court election, later this year.
**In 2025 so far, Yass has spent at least $37.6 million on federal elections which puts him on pace to spend about 50% more than he did in the 2024 cycle.**
Help us fight back and show billionaires like Jeffrey Yass that our elections and our democracy cannot be bought. The way we answer fascist billionaires dropping huge sums on our elections is with a groundswell of small dollar donations.

name: Jessica McCabe
subject: Have you added your name yet?
body:
Medication abortion is worth fighting for
Peter,

For more than two decades, abortion pills like mifepristone have transformed reproductive health care by providing a safe, effective, and accessible way for people to get the care they need, when they need it.

Now, access to this essential care is under threat.

**Attacks on medication abortion are escalating, but together, we have the power to fight back. It starts here—with you.** [**Speak up and demand protections for medication abortion!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113750284/564804360/1107180884?sourceid=1150861&utm_campaign=26emcma-0803aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDBlNDNkYS1jMjdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jTnWRuGCp0kq0equi4TdBN2KxU7lyo0BFSiAhNdtsjI=&emci=12e42efd-037e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=a00e43da-c27e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)

Protecting abortion pills means protecting our right to make private health decisions without political interference.

[**This is our care. Our choice. Our right. Peter, join us and speak up today!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113750285/564804361/1107180884?sourceid=1150861&utm_campaign=26emcma-0803aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDBlNDNkYS1jMjdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jTnWRuGCp0kq0equi4TdBN2KxU7lyo0BFSiAhNdtsjI=&emci=12e42efd-037e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=a00e43da-c27e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)

In solidarity,

Jessica McCabe
Associate Director of Individual Giving

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdae24af2-73bd-41a3-b99a-582c4330e6d8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Adam
subject: She thinks YOU'RE an ASS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
Take it from a Navy SEAL - the tides are turning in Minnesota. We cannot miss out on the moment to act, or we may be waiting for a long time to set sail again. | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c7c4a5212b134124bb647656914b98a2&_e=nbWn2us_-vYUgmoUJNEIR9wwZ9Qyy56JnMTOYQcSpWSwseRBa-HljPY1ctMbAD7l9i0bH_zgO35EQpBr2Mc3dT54U8VokOVf7DjeA7Z1IrS5duvOAhSlxYlq7wDZ6Wna0QDCxexV_sqqszhlgV-ZQTLmig9a8FW0RxYGKcHtDo2oQE1ezP98USjPMLCgPnKiA1yGV6ssg-_WVUs99OyfVcfRZ8U0akkOyM75aAbHNMHwljMP0h0R0KVZnKilKJkc1V2lTg-dOWXCf9cjBiPrvUWE-emHoLV1tKRv8Yf3jYsfO4KFhFDehl1oyZM6lV3rH8DHnutRU3z2vbcKvfcYv7qWb7skVzxno59UFrdmtpXaws9W01B8fHgD5th0geK1-oIw0kdkNxSNnWB4Udpm24zTR47k45YEwMIvyhGcdwKpBy74Sns_wtwT1T97bbYlXCmUbGb3K46_lKhX-vQ0upz18U4acghKjaLM2b_o0WvDYNwp5BO56cQFplgYzVLbG4DKbekj4wmxCF0abGctAS5CcWGkGMRwJ6j7wGIzE52YyBBSXgCQR8TBaiEarwTWvQWyeVn-ndEiBOeEV_aXpry_1XXGr1vUBFn_5YSlomYuJOzd9LwYiGhXlDAXOW4a8Nmuyl78FUnUTftYLeMMNe1FbREg6IB54yuCndH4bc7HUjPIM1KuP9MYzgCvhgKydl8392jKVid6sWKWfK_8eqtU0W2TpB14DLSqLLNxO3VX4LpRlHp3brpwTLgGuH93)

---
Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze- I’m a retired Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran. I’m running for Al Franken’s former Senate seat in Minnesota, in what is shaping up to be the most competitive Senate race in Minnesota since 2009.
**
_Democrats think we’re assholes, buffoons, Nazi’s, and just plain idiots. You and I both know that’s BS. _**__

I carried our flag on the battlefield for more than 20 years in over 70 countries. While serving our nation and carrying Old Glory, I learned a few things, and I want to share a few with you today.

**I’m concerned Google may be censoring our messages to you, so I’m including my message on a secure page that is only accessible for the next 24 hours.**

[**READ MY MESSAGE BEFORE IT DELETES
**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c7c4a5212b134124bb647656914b98a2&_e=nbWn2us_-vYUgmoUJNEIR9wwZ9Qyy56JnMTOYQcSpWSwseRBa-HljPY1ctMbAD7l9i0bH_zgO35EQpBr2Mc3dT54U8VokOVf7DjeA7Z1IrS5duvOAhSlxYlq7wDZ6Wna0QDCxexV_sqqszhlgV-ZQTLmig9a8FW0RxYGKcHtDo2oQE1ezP98USjPMLCgPnKiA1yGV6ssg-_WVUs99OyfVcfRZ8U0akkOyM75aAbHNMHwljMP0h0R0KVZnKilKJkc1V2lTg-dOWXCf9cjBiPrveKhrqdkvhHDwg52cWkN_JwvxlcuhQrfquXwxL5II1p_TdxT2Av4fUtYYDZuhIal5VIk4Ix5AHTKj1zlFRq2Zhx8e4Ey3LTrezH2zuU3vp8hXyOEEOXn5PwmhTDNGaDz08RjmA3s2b_TvhFRAIyKmw95sd5NMa38tbfKmdR5NFgvx4zHyrXDEqHMJ6yzp_JOzp15MRtL7J31VCJnjYJdwRQ8IWbbMZIHEwykEdQZp08yIWYwrfXnypdgqk7cGJLQF-67txre0JFVyCNThEAK2Q7loM7Gtmk0zH7udytzVfvk4bFf9WrrUANM8IEThe-hn_0YDqtJiu8W8ckIL3lew2x0H5XaQanY-UuvhnI8QYjCkiOwapsyNEl2OJppZaxmBRY-Yu1pUaH4wjkXIVVBikqthhq5D6-kbCJwez5Ll1AXQYrTOzPWVRrCF4KFeZeMlAGYDbNXHozdvzhucOk-6YZnQFljbxxBHhIQlKMT-GW0)
_
_ I hope you’ll take the time to read my note to you.

With steadfast resolve,
Adam Schwarze
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota
_**Former Navy SEAL officer

clean_body: Take it from a Navy SEAL - the tides are turning in Minnesota. We cannot miss out on the moment to act, or we may be waiting for a long time to set sail again. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze- I’m a retired Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran. I’m running for Al Franken’s former Senate seat in Minnesota, in what is shaping up to be the most competitive Senate race in Minnesota since 2009. Democrats think we’re assholes, buffoons, Nazi’s, and just plain idiots. You and I both know that’s BS. I carried our flag on the battlefield for more than 20 years in over 70 countries. While serving our nation and carrying Old Glory, I learned a few things, and I want to share a few with you today. I’m concerned Google may be censoring our messages to you, so I’m including my message on a secure page that is only accessible for the next 24 hours. I hope you’ll take the time to read my note to you. With steadfast resolve, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA - | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Confirmed: Obama made the call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
The rumors have been confirmed. Obama made the call.
| Friend,
---
Rumors were circulating that Obama was meddling behind the curtain in the New York City Mayor’s race in support of Zohran Mamdani – a communist who wants to abolish prisons and private property.
---
_Those rumors have now been confirmed by Mamdani himself._
---
**Obama called him to congratulate him and guide him to victory in an election nearly 2 months away.**
---
_In fact, the entire Obama Network has been quietly meeting with Mamdani._
---
Why? _Because they see Zohran Mamdani as the next Barack Obama_.
---
You may be inclined to brush this off as a problem for New York City alone...
---
_**...But knowing what you know now, would you have brushed off a similar warning about a relatively unknown community organizer from Chicago named Barack Obama?**_
---
If you could go back in time and stop Obama before his rise to power, would you?
---
As the most senior elected Republican in New York, I am making a _solemn pledge_ to you right now: I will fight with every fiber of my being to stop Mamdani and FIRE Governor Kathy Hochul who singlehandedly enabled his rise to power.
---
_That’s _my_ pledge. Now I’m entrusting _you_ with a 500% MATCH that I’ve authorized to fight back as the Obama Machine tries to install a communist mayor in the biggest city in America._
---

Hi Peter,

Today, I’m officially launching my campaign to become the next Congressman for Arizona’s 2nd Congressional District because I’m tired of seeing Eli Crane betray our neighbors by voting to raise costs, bury the truth, and take away healthcare from our neighbors.

As a man driven by faith, family, and love, my campaign is about bringing people from all walks of life together to create meaningful change for our district.

In 2024, our campaign delivered one of the strongest overperformances in the nation. We had over 78,000 grassroots online donors, and put AZ-2 on the map to the point that this is now one of the DCCC’s “Districts in Play” – meaning that winning this seat is critical to taking back the House.

Before I say more, I want you to know: the early days of a campaign can make or break it and we need to raise $104,319 to hit the ground running, fully staff up and start getting our message out. Will you help me start strong by becoming a founding donor to my campaign today? https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/ZjmXJ-CSLlibYez1mRtYtg~~/AAPPABA~/YO3K9OYccB3pJn_ZbyyMcO6H18QIc6QFv_8FtD6D0D35oxX3Suz01lid4bjw7IoLmucQjAXZpguDJ7s0P9hn6vNYJPi1tgNA4LGEDOx0Qz7KzrDASkfQV1b0o0fWzz457fvi61NEKGWSKB5Locc4mg~~

Following my graduation from Northern Arizona University, I was elected to the Navajo Nation Council to represent my community, and I’ve been in public service ever since. I subsequently served as a county supervisor and as Vice President of the Navajo Nation before being elected President of the Navajo Nation in 2019. I’m proud of my record of public service, leading the effort to save lives during COVID, and making major investments in clean water in Northern Arizona.

I’m running to deliver generational change, because we owe it to our children and grandchildren to leave them a future better than the one we inherited. Unfortunately, Eli Crane isn’t interested in improving the lives of our neighbors. His votes to cut healthcare and food assistance from our most vulnerable populations might go over well in the fancy suburb where Crane lives, but out here in rural Arizona, that dog won’t hunt.

I’m ready to show up in Congress as a champion for rural Arizona, but I need your support. Can you please chip in anything you can today? https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/tLRU3XUID1w_mm7bLLWXZA~~/AAPPABA~/Eh3M7ewkMc1hwWnEc84YO5uCbLNM4MEaXb_jfaWzL0XRoh74V8UBB4wmkxB8ckNQ3NprdXo10melkKDKvrXQNEXI2wW70y9ZzcifAr_tqsF4Y_ZCtxZnBedk3ii9GL3Islx-x6m-uQ8lA-gj-gfgdGeNK7IyTc2q0I6YODYX43U96iiH0XKN5KgTh6UAcfVPYY8VSZ1n387LKkYBIilIag~~

Our district faces real challenges: from the rising costs of gas, food, childcare, and housing to a lack of accountability in Washington. We need a representative in Congress who’s focused on the issues here in Arizona — not the partisan squabbles of DC. Someone who will put working Arizonans first, create good jobs, lower everyday costs, support our veterans, secure Arizona’s water future, and protect the right to choose.

As the former President of Navajo Nation, I’m ready to deliver on the issues that matter most to our communities, but I can’t get there without your help. Please consider supporting my campaign today: https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/gHuKaFKYzEY9LKNoYlLLcg~~/AAPPABA~/EONPu3BucEvLSndjJaUSHHqApOthELhIvlsVn0sofeHAg_VcsT0L5DbvVJ9YW40XdFl1BpxeNwNTUZaTvp0bsNS4Fzeoj6_LtYSSEe9MahzypwTOsl6XA4h0u8F1Rfy7lQCZVdSiXkONzcKxRvF9Eg~~

name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: Trump is running to SCOTUS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
Trump is begging SCOTUS for permission to let ICE agents run loose in LA. | |
---
Peter, **Trump is begging the Supreme Court to let ICE racially profile again.** A judge in Los Angeles recently told ICE agents they couldn’t stop and question someone unless they had reasonable suspicion that they had violated federal immigration law. Before the order, agents had been targeting people based on their “apparent ethnicity,” accent, location, occupation, and lifestyle—likely violating the Fourth Amendment. **Now, the Trump administration is appealing to the Supreme Court in the hopes they’ll strike down the judge’s order and allow ICE agents to run rampant in LA.** [**We need to send a message to the Supreme Court NOW, before they take up this case. Tell the Supreme Court: I stand with California on immigration! Don’t bow to Trump and let ICE stop people without cause.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39xlBV8K-h1SPh5Rb04hGqQ83I4vZW-bzPjXm6WUxP_AQt0fx7uDkQZtPeOX_SnDq4NDKcuF5ELlKjQvXEzYOWKiXJovRzreU0vLZ71g2b7faKHxV12PAAU2Yxz1m4_UPaUcut1jmeX6T_XxgeeV2jwia9z__bZnlrd3w3dILvJ6kww9VTi9k4VJhFaTtMi58miA1Yu7DvM1vAO4KgTObpADCcuG8vhpoEeU55rxR6XKK_rV3l18E3rVER2tEoX5paLIGmq4mxgcL_DYH6gFQpoivh3fzVzxFjOiMwEWB9SJ8IfWc6s3YpAOr0TGN3-tFE/4j8/sk0sZditSfCbFpyKFi42YQ/h0/h001.y6eh4-WoQaA6Ip3RvvzxaHJBtq0SMGRgv9rH8pqSMcQ) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39xlBV8K-h1SPh5Rb04hGqQ83I4vZW-bzPjXm6WUxP_AQt0fx7uDkQZtPeOX_SnDq4NDKcuF5ELlKjQvXEzYOWKg3QetqHJ4COuxWK9_zS_O434038SXzBg030g3gkxFBB0IN43XwDDpeiUrgAKSOl37uJLRdh1vxmYpXGmmrMYi0O2aIPJZrfMTTZ8J97QCidYRi9BEJi8fpN8DRu1ZUHGA5-jBa_ghPUEX5uLnGbRSL4ENFveHjOfvxmS9UKrTdFsB2nZxV5k6hkhJ6dZFg32ZxNVBf1EfVgLyfbWoD2vifHoHBvfgUEpBQoLkq7oteg/4j8/sk0sZditSfCbFpyKFi42YQ/h1/h001.Yg-qkYjBa71UdELxfLa0LcaSU-i3aMwNPHJTEJGPDOo) Trump has every reason to expect the MAGA justices he placed on the Supreme Court will fall in line. They’ve already stripped our rights, silenced the lower courts, and made Trump a king in America. Trump’s request isn’t just insidious, it’s completely ridiculous. His Department of Justice filed an “emergency” request to allow ICE to racially profile people in Los Angeles. Their reasoning cites a half-century old decision. **California is doing the right thing and protecting the people that live there, as our constitution directs them to.** ICE does not have the right to harass and target people just because they speak Spanish, work in construction, use the bus, or appear to be a certain race. And if ICE’s actions are left unchecked, they will keep spreading beyond California. Already, tactics that began in Los Angeles are being used in DC under ICE’s occupation. And **with the massive funding boost Congress just included in the Big Ugly Bill, it won’t take long until they’re**** _everywhere_****.** **In reality, ICE’s actions in Los Angeles are likely a violation of the Fourth Amendment’s prohibition on “unreasonable searches and seizures.”** Citizens and migrants with legal status alike have alleged violent detentions with zero justification outside of their race, language, or occupation. [**A sensible court that works for the people would recognize these violations for what they are. We need to make sure this captured Court knows we’re watching. Tell the Supreme Court: I stand with California!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39xlBV8K-h1SPh5Rb04hGqQ83I4vZW-bzPjXm6WUxP_AQt0fx7uDkQZtPeOX_SnDq4NDKcuF5ELlKjQvXEzYOWKmgTGtOaxQMIAbi51qu4nU4QPFZ2khjErvaWN6AH7oXY2twWM04iJoU2V7okg2y-A1YaJAPtNw7dQRnP0e6c7XzcYlbUtbZmX1Ab8n9Vl5Lp_PltSskyBNbHuPwVkhYCXnHNIxKPglsc1pihCa0jjVhP1cSStik2MoAiIx98OFKO1mhVNMnv0nZetS2YyTTHI64XEqMSQBEG_l2EFCWJ_FUfAFocdm6tp194p7bUj-eI/4j8/sk0sZditSfCbFpyKFi42YQ/h2/h001.0NchfPr0SKKtWwJfSx_h44eSr9rGo6QKhLSErNEcUcM) **Over 47% of Los Angeles and its surrounding counties identify as Latino or Hispanic.** If the Supreme Court blocks the district judge’s order and allows Trump’s ICE agents to racially profile, nearly half of the city will be at risk of being unjustly terrorized. **We the People won’t stand for a Supreme Court decision that gives Trump the green light to wantonly target people on American soil based on their ethnicity, job, language, or even if they use the bus.** [**Add your name and tell the Supreme Court: I stand with California on immigration. Don’t allow Trump and ICE to target and harass people based on race, language, occupation, and more!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39xlBV8K-h1SPh5Rb04hGqQ83I4vZW-bzPjXm6WUxP_AQt0fx7uDkQZtPeOX_SnDq4NDKcuF5ELlKjQvXEzYOWKK3gSacGRNlhJvzG9ntTpr1OlwJeoRv74PxZ62uRHDyxCiP9naf533PfebbxkKjuwA6XxmfwoHblXV2MumQnF0z3Bj-mMxm52pOiYKiDd1whLWn0XQ6smOBBQqpfyX49j6i8Az1coIuFqfuQJFiSeLSGyZenp3iNAc-tL_U2GRVeZr3FyjH-CUZFdUrdHgeq-1rKBkxPEyFvE1vee0Y7P2SHYnSVDsE3o50-oi66YOt4/4j8/sk0sZditSfCbFpyKFi42YQ/h3/h001.wxigTCjaA6uLEN4VL7JacCp3bg5IHt9O26sZFxb41ZY) Thank you for fighting for our rights, Morgan Stahr
United for Democracy

clean_body: Trump is begging SCOTUS for permission to let ICE agents run loose in LA. | | Peter, Trump is begging the Supreme Court to let ICE racially profile again. A judge in Los Angeles recently told ICE agents they couldn’t stop and question someone unless they had reasonable suspicion that they had violated federal immigration law. Before the order, agents had been targeting people based on their “apparent ethnicity,” accent, location, occupation, and lifestyle—likely violating the Fourth Amendment. Now, the Trump administration is appealing to the Supreme Court in the hopes they’ll strike down the judge’s order and allow ICE agents to run rampant in LA. Trump has every reason to expect the MAGA justices he placed on the Supreme Court will fall in line. They’ve already stripped our rights, silenced the lower courts, and made Trump a king in America. Trump’s request isn’t just insidious, it’s completely ridiculous. His Department of Justice filed an “emergency” request to allow ICE to racially profile people in Los Angeles. Their reasoning cites a half-century old decision. California is doing the right thing and protecting the people that live there, as our constitution directs them to. ICE does not have the right to harass and target people just because they speak Spanish, work in construction, use the bus, or appear to be a certain race. And if ICE’s actions are left unchecked, they will keep spreading beyond California. Already, tactics that began in Los Angeles are being used in DC under ICE’s occupation. And with the massive funding boost Congress just included in the Big Ugly Bill, it won’t take long until they’re everywhere. In reality, ICE’s actions in Los Angeles are likely a violation of the Fourth Amendment’s prohibition on “unreasonable searches and seizures.” Citizens and migrants with legal status alike have alleged violent detentions with zero justification outside of their race, language, or occupation. Over 47% of Los Angeles and its surrounding counties identify as Latino or Hispanic. If the Supreme Court blocks the district judge’s order and allows Trump’s ICE agents to racially profile, nearly half of the city will be at risk of being unjustly terrorized. We the People won’t stand for a Supreme Court decision that gives Trump the green light to wantonly target people on American soil based on their ethnicity, job, language, or even if they use the bus. Thank you for fighting for our rights, Morgan Stahr United for Democracy Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . Dear Friends,
Today is my birthday! We started celebrating last night in Richmond, where I began my life in public service.
I want to sincerely thank everyone who attended my party last night. We had over 100 people show up to celebrate and support my campaign for Governor.
Can you make a birthday donation to my campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tony-thurmond-for-governor-2026-1]
Last night we heard from special guests Oakland Mayor Barbara Lee, State Controller Malia Cohen, and Contra Costa Supervisor John Gioia - they share my deep commitment to uplift California kids and families, create jobs, and make housing affordable for everyone.
We won't win this race for California’s future playing it safe. It's time to fight for what we believe in.
Will you join me? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tony-thurmond-for-governor-2026-1]
I'm asking people to give and give again to help propel our people-powered movement. Can you make a contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tony-thurmond-for-governor-2026-1]
Thank you again for your friendship and birthday wishes.
Sincerely,
Tony

Friend, During this month’s congressional recess, dozens of my colleagues from both sides of the aisle took an AIPAC-funded trip to Israel, just a few miles from genocidal devastation in Gaza. More than 3 out of 4 Congresspeople take money from AIPAC or its affiliates. In exchange for thousands or even millions of dollars, these members of Congress continue funding, arming, and providing impunity for the Israeli government’s atrocities against the Palestinian people. More groups and leaders are recognizing this as a genocide, but millions of lives are at stake if the U.S. government doesn’t act now. We must keep up the pressure. [**Please sign on to demand your members of Congress reject AIPAC money. It’s time they stand with the American people—most of whom want the U.S. to stop sending weapons to Israel—over right-wing billionaire donors.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-EUNPkOTNi3g6T-HIekWATccTbFDAZBDTR8uRtvWQociR3lto8SlQMS6weM3gxCxTlW38197T9QEuAZ2Etnn1UMsb1YB9Q4NAC7FPP6MoS9-jb2fL-1b2fOn_p2XbQLXK5zAEywHmZoqfeSuunrZRCAep1rRSJujmi5bL-meLWfObnJsME366HvRGHMeWCElP_M-RPSODpGpa6FikNoeJwtnHnSH4tsoHy1N5SgQxorbA9itZTaWVkLd_EtzJZA4ljqOk8H0AldJpMi-MjMnizpyspgxrOC81WB-8cYlI9TF4u6IiDH31vkC-Vy5AaBcX1YE-5KJGJveIYluW9x3IPNv-N-hBoCE-XQzaIdn-9Ccm-8slrhB-cRt5utck79nbPzosOSTFIEH8W3QAo6Jut30h-oE6E32to1695k3t9DoHBs-otT05UXCtoXKMJF0BjYocXIcL3laAs1YTgZFwP/4j8/oMTFwBicT5u0LlcWrTaFgw/h1/h001.JYXWGeC5YtIFk9utb9DlfZ94v3Cxe4dOrSllCc10puQ) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-EUNPkOTNi3g6T-HIekWATccTbFDAZBDTR8uRtvWQociR3lto8SlQMS6weM3gxCxTlW38197T9QEuAZ2Etnn1UMsb1YB9Q4NAC7FPP6MoS9-jb2fL-1b2fOn_p2XbQLXK5zAEywHmZoqfeSuunrZRCAep1rRSJujmi5bL-meLWfObnJsME366HvRGHMeWCElP_M-RPSODpGpa6FikNoeJwtnHnSH4tsoHy1N5SgQxorfaVZna-iXbqxxgdJ4s7aIcC6YlJy8N0TlpC50jBLGbdbcZwHruncQuMCe4IN4TjXpmVoCKoHW5__vMS7UOteouD_Oc8vWLvlUMvqAvd6MU5xXVh0PyMPfOJQqomDAZAg9cRa6xyVyaoYOTA_-DKsWlSOkqlA1LAGMHlK1yC3oDSpFrx1usnegCGQqDxHJ_guoCQrylr_8J_HC9z8MeGXc7ueCD8_FxP0YSwxW5tPm9D/4j8/oMTFwBicT5u0LlcWrTaFgw/h2/h001.srLrQPvFTrKQj6MrAgso-nGueLLzUUx-mqTCWxQroDU)

I will keep fighting to demand that our government finally take responsibility and act to stop this genocide and apartheid.
Our movement is pushing lawmakers to change their votes: For the first time in history, a majority of Senate Democrats voted to block weapons to the Israeli government. They listened to their constituents and acted to save lives.
At the same time, the number of U.S. Representatives co-sponsoring Block the Bombs legislation keeps rising—but we’re at 34 Reps out of 435.
Too many of my colleagues are denying reality, even as Israel’s government is putting its war crimes into the legislative record for all to see—including recently passing laws to permanently take over the West Bank and Gaza.
These votes violate last year’s orders from the world’s top court and most UN member countries, which demanded Israel’s government immediately withdraw from Gaza and the West Bank, in accordance with international law.
While forcibly starving and bombing Palestinian children, wanted war criminal Netanyahu is also bringing more troops into Gaza, enacting his publicly announced plan to ethnically cleanse and violently occupy all of Gaza.
**We must keep up the pressure on the U.S. government to stop this as soon as possible.**
With Trump-supporting billionaire donors, AIPAC is the biggest source of Republican money interrupting Democratic primaries. Billionaire influence in politics is corrosive, and we can’t let it silence us, defy the will of voters, or get in the way of liberation.
[**Add your name to demand your representatives reject money from AIPAC.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-EUNPkOTNi3g6T-HIekWATccTbFDAZBDTR8uRtvWQociR3lto8SlQMS6weM3gxCxTlW38197T9QEuAZ2Etnn1UMsb1YB9Q4NAC7FPP6MoS9-jb2fL-1b2fOn_p2XbQLXK5zAEywHmZoqfeSuunrZRCAep1rRSJujmi5bL-meLWfObnJsME366HvRGHMeWCElP_M-RPSODpGpa6FikNoeJwtnHnSH4tsoHy1N5SgQxorYjwKhDwxOP8Ubjf6bqq8KDuuhfnTkC3A9GGldUV7SUiAvezjjDhbM8Q1i7013VImOcJXOTbiOudeWavg_lcC_JN8-DHgjosR6mb92G_6Zv80aOxaBpmWZlqu4SH87D3BN0LuyRfDNHgGB06Uht7baSPuodvDHa20i0WxcXSw-zghR3oZdPk3Bk-oIuYECbMHmY1pWbQL_zHumw2Xi1SNdYOtVm3thhkswYXAwb56Mzi/4j8/oMTFwBicT5u0LlcWrTaFgw/h3/h001.N3W08vGRG8pQ6BC-Wf0YUMMCse-uKwJyIzjRx5q8PGY)

Rashida

** ** **Speaker Johnson: ** It's August, which means Democrats in Congress are spending the month schmoozing with the leftist donors. Meanwhile, I'm sending this to every strong Republican supporter. It's a memo with a plan to deliver a **BIG BLOW** to the Left. Instead of taking time off, I've asked Republicans to roll up their sleeves and hit the ground hard to raise every dollar we can to return to D.C. stronger than **EVER.** Because here's the truth: teachers, nurses, plumbers, electricians, mechanics, and the regular working-class folks who built this country **DON 'T** get a month off. **So why should politicians?** I've never been one to take breaks. Every second I have as Speaker of the House, I'm using it to help Republicans and President Trump win **BIG.** It's the _least_ I can do to thank the people who elected me. And we've already shown what's possible. In just the first 7 months of President Trump's term, we've accomplished more than most presidents do in a **LIFETIME.** So while the Democrats are snoozing, I'm plotting to **DERAIL** their entire movement. We're closer than ever to landing the **KNOCKOUT PUNCH** , but frankly, I can't do it alone. _**I need YOUR help to succeed.**_ Every dollar we raise from grassroots heroes like you fires a **flurry** of bad news at the Democrats and soon enough, they'll be running for the hills. It's never too early to start preparing for the 2026 midterms. We'll need **EVERY **dollar to combat the Radical Left's lunatic agenda that will come at us like a **FREIGHT TRAIN** next year. 2026 is **THE** fork in the road that will determine the future of our country and of President Trump's term. If we take our foot off the gas now, we could be throwing away **EVERYTHING** we've achieved so far. **[That’s why I’m humbly asking for just $5 today. Even $5 could be the difference between victory and defeat because this election is on a KNIFE’S body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113752111/564810558/879334541?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_TexasRedistricting_250821_t1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjBhNjE2OC1jOTdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KvM9tThCkWWb-Km0gPJY0S0BXmsDMQJqRCuoDGggzLQ=) Team,

We wanted to make sure you saw our important message below calling out Texas Republicans trying to redraw the state’s congressional maps — **because we’ve officially joined up with Texas Dems and the National Democratic Redistricting Committee to fight back.**

It’s only a matter of time before this gerrymandering chaos makes its way to Ohio — remember: _we’re legally required to redraw our congressional maps this year._

body:
We’ll keep doing everything possible to fight for fair maps, but we need your support
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113752094/564810541/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhMGExYzQ3LWM5N2UtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GB4YCP1f7IGmwcjqTWaRD8ByVTfKpB4SOHJBEtgnulw=&emci=2f96a44f-ac7e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=7a0a1c47-c97e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8431045)

Peter, _Redistricting_. It’s an issue that connects many other issues together. How much political representation voters have in Congress and in state legislatures. Whether or not communities of color are fairly represented. How much federal funding the government allocates to local municipalities. Let’s be honest, redistricting can feel like a wonky policy issue — one that can get lost in the flurry of crazy news headlines. But right now, the conversation is front and center. **Redistricting will be the engine of the 2026 midterms — the issue that will shape electoral outcomes. Just take a look at some of the recent headlines:** **“Trump tells Texas Republicans to redraw the state congressional map to help keep House majority”**
**— _AP_** **“Trump ignites chain reaction with early redistricting gamble”**
**— _Axios_** **“Texas Republicans release a redistricting plan that could achieve Trump's aims”**
**— _NPR_** But what’s happening in Texas is more than redistricting, Peter, and it’s only the beginning. Lawmakers are manipulating the state’s congressional map as part of a larger, cynical strategy by Republicans to cheat their way into an electoral advantage for the midterms by slicing and dicing communities of color across Texas. The White House has been encouraging other states like Missouri to follow suit. They’re trying to increase unearned power by gerrymandering in several states. Republicans have a slim majority in the House of Representatives, and are showing that they are willing to cut apart communities in pursuit of districts that Trump has demanded. **The good news is that the NDRC was created for moments like these. Republicans have shown us time and time again that they will always try to build artificial power, and we have a proven strategy to deploy both offensive and defensive strategies to protect fair maps and fair representation for the short and long term.** [**Right now, as Republicans expand their assault on fair maps and fair representation, can you donate to help power our work?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113752095/564810543/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_RedistrictingFrontCenter_email_20250821-NDRC-Tier1-RedistrictingFrontCenter-NOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250821-NDRC-Tier1-RedistrictingFrontCenter-NOR_&utm_campaign=RedistrictingFrontCenter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhMGExYzQ3LWM5N2UtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GB4YCP1f7IGmwcjqTWaRD8ByVTfKpB4SOHJBEtgnulw=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: We’ll keep doing everything possible to fight for fair maps, but we need your support | Peter, Redistricting. It’s an issue that connects many other issues together. How much political representation voters have in Congress and in state legislatures. Whether or not communities of color are fairly represented. How much federal funding the government allocates to local municipalities. Let’s be honest, redistricting can feel like a wonky policy issue — one that can get lost in the flurry of crazy news headlines. But right now, the conversation is front and center. Redistricting will be the engine of the 2026 midterms — the issue that will shape electoral outcomes. Just take a look at some of the recent headlines: “Trump tells Texas Republicans to redraw the state congressional map to help keep House majority” — AP “Trump ignites chain reaction with early redistricting gamble” — Axios “Texas Republicans release a redistricting plan that could achieve Trump's aims” — NPR But what’s happening in Texas is more than redistricting, Peter, and it’s only the beginning. Lawmakers are manipulating the state’s congressional map as part of a larger, cynical strategy by Republicans to cheat their way into an electoral advantage for the midterms by slicing and dicing communities of color across Texas. The White House has been encouraging other states like Missouri to follow suit. They’re trying to increase unearned power by gerrymandering in several states. Republicans have a slim majority in the House of Representatives, and are showing that they are willing to cut apart communities in pursuit of districts that Trump has demanded. The good news is that the NDRC was created for moments like these. Republicans have shown us time and time again that they will always try to build artificial power, and we have a proven strategy to deploy both offensive and defensive strategies to protect fair maps and fair representation for the short and long term. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks so much, Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. Our new opponent is the handpicked choice of the same Republican power brokers who backed Michelle Steel. Now, they’re back with a new candidate -- and even more money and outside support -- to try to take this seat back. This race was always going to be close. Now, it’s game on. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = As you know, CA-45 will be one of the most competitive, expensive, and high-stakes House races in the country. We flipped this district by just 653 votes last cycle. With only three seats separating Republicans and Democrats in the House, control of Congress could come down to what happens right here. It’s only a matter of time before the barrage of attacks begins. Dark money groups are already lining up, and they’ll do everything they can to smear our campaign and erase what we’ve built. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for being in this fight, Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: It’s time to stop Trump from taking complete control of our elections
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
If Republicans are going to take their marching orders directly from Trump and gerrymander their congressional districts to wipe Democratic seats off the map, we can’t do this high road stuff anymore.
#

Hey Peter, I’ve been pretty blunt about this.
If Republicans are going to take their marching orders directly from Trump and gerrymander their congressional districts to wipe Democratic seats off the map, we can’t do this high road stuff anymore.
We can’t win elections with both hands tied behind our backs while the GOP does whatever they want — up to and including breaking the law.
We need fair districts. We need to pass a national ban on gerrymandering, and I am 100% behind that.
But until that happens, we need to fight back. That’s what they’re doing in California, and they need our help.
[**I’m asking you to chip in today and split a donation between the Election Rigging Response Act and my campaign to stop Trump from seizing complete control of our elections.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-erra-split.oVvUhx&refcode=em250821-1-160&t=1&akid=3941%2E734936%2Epy5dIV)
[RUSH A DONATION](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-erra-split.oVvUhx&refcode=em250821-1-160&t=2&akid=3941%2E734936%2Epy5dIV)
Trump’s trying to make sure your vote doesn’t matter.
We can’t let that happen.
Hope you’ll chip in.
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

name: Tobias Read
subject: Do you support voting from home?
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250821em-fullob1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250821em-fullob1]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
I believe voting from home gives every Oregonian a fair and secure chance to hold politicians accountable—and it saves money and time, too.
But some Republicans want to block voting from home by imposing unnecessary barriers.
There’s only one explanation for this: Opponents to voting at home want to make it harder for regular people to participate in our democracy.
So I’m standing up to them and I’m fighting to protect the right to vote from home for all Oregon voters.
But I need to know you're with me: If you support my efforts to expand vote-by-mail access, please consider donating to help me continue fighting today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250821em-fullob1]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250821em-fullob1]
Thank you for using your voice – speaking out is the most powerful way to make an impact, and I’m grateful to have your support.
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]

Especially when the news is filled with terrifying headlines about Trump and his extremist allies’ latest threats to our democracy. But I’ve seen the power of grassroots movements. When thousands of Democrats step up together, even with just a few bucks, we can’t be ignored. Your $3 helps Speak Up PAC support candidates who are committed to fighting for democracy, like Seth Moulton. If just 7,500 supporters chipped in $3 before midnight, we’ll hit our $60,000 goal – and keep this important fight going strong. subject: Texas Republicans want to silence one of our strongest voices
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Will you join me in supporting Congressman Greg Casar?

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113753279/564814002/1328794144?ms=ea.3048d6a8-cb7e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwNDhkNmE4LWNiN2UtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=huUSAIV33TWmOCX8mjvq44V6Qc50daL45omybXUgDGA=&emci=1648d6a8-cb7e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3048d6a8-cb7e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)

Representative Greg Casar is exactly the kind of leader fossil fuel interests fear most — a climate champion who refuses to be bought or intimidated. **I’m so proud to share that JanePAC is re-endorsing his campaign for a third term in Texas's 35th Congressional District!** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113753280/564814003/2015472984?refcode=em_JPC_082125&ms=ea.3048d6a8-cb7e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwNDhkNmE4LWNiN2UtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=huUSAIV33TWmOCX8mjvq44V6Qc50daL45omybXUgDGA=) This may be our most consequential endorsement yet. I first met Greg years ago when he was still fighting at the local level in Austin. He wasn't focused on appearances or calculating his next move for higher office. He was simply furious about the injustices he saw around him and determined to do something about them.
While other politicians talk about building a clean energy future “someday,” Greg is fighting to make it real _now._ From co-sponsoring groundbreaking legislation like the **Green New Deal** to blocking fossil fuel projects and advancing **grid modernization** , he has proven himself time and time again as one of the few leaders in Washington we can count on to put people over profit.
And that terrifies bullies like Donald Trump.
Now, Texas Republicans have drawn new, rigged maps that throw Greg and fellow Democratic Rep. Lloyd Doggett into the same district — a deliberate attempt to pit them against each other in a contested primary and silence one of our strongest climate champions in Congress.
**If Trump gets away with this in Austin, it will open the doors to attacks on working-class, Latino districts all across America.**
**[We can’t let that happen, and with your help, we won’t. name: Oregon GOP
subject: URGENT: Show up Monday or get taxed.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
The hearing is set: August 23 at 3:00 PM. Will you speak out?

| | | | [ ](https://secure.winred.com/oregon-republican-party/donate-today)
---
---
| | Friend, We just learned that the legislature has scheduled a **PUBLIC HEARING** on the proposed transportation tax bill on **Monday, August 25, at 3:00 PM at the Capitol.** This is a critical opportunity for Oregonians to speak up before Tina and her Democrat allies try to rush this tax hike through in the August 29th special session. _**The truth is, this tax won’t fix our roads – it will funnel money into projects that don’t reflect the priorities of working families.**_ **_That’s why it’s so important for Oregonians to show up and set the record straight._** Here’s how you can help make a difference: • **Attend the public hearing in person:** Your presence matters. Legislators need to see firsthand that Oregonians are paying attention and won’t be ignored. • **Testify or submit written comments:** Tell lawmakers how this tax will impact your family and your community. Plainspoken stories from everyday Oregonians make the strongest case. • **Contact your legislators AND Democrat leadership:** Don’t just write your own representatives – make sure Democrat leaders know directly how frustrated Oregonians are with their priorities. [**_Find their contact information here. >>> _**](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/v_b2C~6EE~Sb/RFlGVkw4anRQRGhwWGkyTnh6UjNwbWZtb1dXVDltdkZrU2U1TU82d3NjZDB2Zng4a2VTckZ5RVJTUzNKcDdXYmdmNXg4blhCYkI4TlBaazdsdDMyUFFpekVKSWErKzBKeGJHa0s1eFNmQVk9S0/) Every voice counts. If we stay silent, Salem will use it as an excuse to move forward without real accountability. **This hearing is OUR chance to show up, speak out, and stop this tax scheme before it gains momentum.** Oregon deserves better. Let’s make sure our leaders hear us **LOUD** and **CLEAR** on Monday. Thank you, Oregon Republican Party
---
