clean_body: The hearing is set: August 23 at 3:00 PM. Will you speak out? | | | | | | Friend, We just learned that the legislature has scheduled a PUBLIC HEARING on the proposed transportation tax bill on Monday, August 25, at 3:00 PM at the Capitol. This is a critical opportunity for Oregonians to speak up before Tina and her Democrat allies try to rush this tax hike through in the August 29th special session. The truth is, this tax won’t fix our roads – it will funnel money into projects that don’t reflect the priorities of working families. That’s why it’s so important for Oregonians to show up and set the record straight. Here’s how you can help make a difference: • Attend the public hearing in person: Your presence matters. Legislators need to see firsthand that Oregonians are paying attention and won’t be ignored. • Testify or submit written comments: Tell lawmakers how this tax will impact your family and your community. Plainspoken stories from everyday Oregonians make the strongest case. • Contact your legislators AND Democrat leadership: Don’t just write your own representatives – make sure Democrat leaders know directly how frustrated Oregonians are with their priorities. Every voice counts. If we stay silent, Salem will use it as an excuse to move forward without real accountability. This hearing is OUR chance to show up, speak out, and stop this tax scheme before it gains momentum. Oregon deserves better. Let’s make sure our leaders hear us LOUD and CLEAR on Monday. Thank you, Oregon Republican Party | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | We are dedicated to promoting conservative values, protecting individual freedoms, and building a prosperous future for all Oregonians. name: Adam Schiff
subject: This is what Trump is doing to our country:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8926%2E5257348%2EwnhOmO ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

I’m going to be straight with you: We’re up against a movement determined
to tear down our democracy and a president who’ll do anything to hold onto
power.

That’s why I’m reaching out now to ask you to [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q32025_abs_em.w4l6oI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1004&akid=8926%2E5257348%2EwnhOmO ]chip in and help me keep
pushing back against Trump’s attacks on the rule of law.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q32025_abs_em.w4l6oI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8926%2E5257348%2EwnhOmO ]CHIP IN

Recently, on the Senate floor, I laid out ten ways Donald Trump is
destroying this country. I want every American to know that Trump is
failing us by:

1. Undermining American innovation:
Trump is attacking our world-class research institutions and shutting
out international talent, limiting our leadership in science,
technology, and medicine.

2. Slashing food assistance:
He’s gutting the supplemental nutrition programs that keep millions of
American families healthy and ensure our kids don’t go to bed hungry.

3. Abandoning our allies:
Trump is weakening our international partnerships, cozying up with
dictators, and making America less safe.

4. Sabotaging renewable energy:
He’s killing clean energy projects, ceding global renewable energy
leadership to China, raising utility bills, and making us more
dependent on fossil fuels.

5. Damaging public health:
He’s slashing funding for the National Institutes of Health (NIH) and
key research programs, meaning cures will be delayed, clinical trials
will end, and life-saving care will be harder to access.

6. Crippling essential services with DOGE cuts:
From Social Security to wildfire response to public education, Trump
is making major funding cuts without worrying about the impact on
families, seniors, and kids across the country who will be hurt.

7. Tanking the economy with tariffs:
His trade wars are driving up the costs of everyday goods like clothes
and groceries while alienating our allies.

8. Stripping away healthcare:
Under Trump’s new budget, millions of Americans will lose healthcare
coverage. Many rural clinics and hospitals will be forced to close,
and all of our healthcare costs will go up.

9. Undermining the rule of law:
Trump has been treating the Department of Justice (DOJ) as his own
personal political weapon, using it to shield his allies and target
his enemies.

10. Threatening the very idea of America:
He’s eroding the values that built this country: freedom,
self-governance, equality, and the belief that no one is above the law
— not even the president.

I know this is a lot to take in, but I believe that together, we can take
back our government and end this madness.

The GOP wants to overwhelm us and keep us from acting. But when we come
together, we’re not powerless. We can organize, mobilize, and reclaim our
country.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q32025_abs_em.w4l6oI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1006&akid=8926%2E5257348%2EwnhOmO ]If you’re with me, please make a contribution to my campaign.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q32025_abs_em.yMOq2I&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=8926%2E5257348%2EwnhOmO ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=q32025_abs_em.Buknaj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=8926%2E5257348%2EwnhOmO ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=q32025_abs_em.uHcj1U&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=8926%2E5257348%2EwnhOmO ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=q32025_abs_em.JaOjw6&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=8926%2E5257348%2EwnhOmO ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=q32025_abs_em.9BFHaA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=8926%2E5257348%2EwnhOmO ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=8926%2E5257348%2EwnhOmO ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks for stepping up,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=8926%2E5257348%2EwnhOmO ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

Welcome to The Capitalist
Don't recognize this sender? [Unsubscribe with one click](https://substack..e-lQCU5VRiSp4fltlaL40XMWroQzmczhZz-KSOIbaAs?)
Matthew Miller recently imported your email address from another platform to Substack. You'll now receive their posts via email or the [Substack app](https://substack.com/redirect/0cfbcc2c-2aa9-4ee9-be1a-fd45c144c953?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). To set up your profile and discover more on Substack, [click here](https://substack.com/redirect/f7e6c050-f509-4e7e-9809-b3181974eec6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
**Opportunity, Risk, and the Long Game**
President Donald Trump's **[recent executive order](https://substack.com/redirect/347b0eb4-3a9d-4c8d-95d8-c22b63305ad7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , signed on August 7, 2025, marks a seismic shift in U.S. retirement policy, cracking open the $12.5 trillion 401(k) market to alternative assets like cryptocurrencies, private equity, and real estate. This move, directing the Department of Labor and the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to revise fiduciary guidelines under the Employee Retirement Income Security Act (**[ERISA](https://substack.com/redirect/347b0eb4-3a9d-4c8d-95d8-c22b63305ad7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**), promises to democratize access to high-growth, high-risk assets **[previously reserved for the wealthy.](https://substack.com/redirect/28c8b51a-b47c-474d-8fb1-9e980c1b6646?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** For everyday Americans saving for retirement, this could be a game-changer--but it comes with caveats that demand careful consideration.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/845bbcdb-aee0-4d91-b02e-508dde79ed22?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Let 's start with the opportunity.** Over the past 15 years, cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin have posted staggering growth compared to traditional investments. From 2010 to 2025, Bitcoin's price soared from under $1 to over $123,190 at its 2025 peak, delivering annualized returns that dwarf the S&P 500 ETF (SPY). The SPY, a proxy for the broader U.S. stock market, grew at a very respectable annualized rate of about 7.8% from 2010 to 2025, turning a $10,000 investment into roughly $31,000.
By contrast, a $10,000 investment in Bitcoin in 2010 when it was worth less than a penny would be worth $119,864,000,000 today, even after accounting for its wild price swings.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/de45ae0a-149f-44c1-ac3d-53213de39f24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The above example is just a thought exercise. The world in 2010 was a very different place, no one would have suggested that you should put your entire 401k -or indeed any of your 401K- into Bitcoin ("Fake internet money") in 2010. However you only have to look 5 years later to see that the game had changed significantly.
Ethereum, launched in 2015, has similarly outpaced traditional markets, with its price climbing from $0.31 to over $4,400 by mid-2025. On top of that inflows in to Ethereum ETF's just broke an all time record on August 11th[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/299720e2-d9b8-40b0-be2c-4a7d3b1efbbe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[with over $1billion invested in a single day.](https://substack.com/redirect/299720e2-d9b8-40b0-be2c-4a7d3b1efbbe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** These figures highlight why crypto has captured the imagination of investors: its growth potential is unmatched by the traditional assets that a 401K is usually invested in.
Crypto remains in its infancy for sure. The total market capitalization of cryptocurrencies, while significant at over $2 trillion, is still a fraction of the global equity market's $100 trillion, but this nascent stage suggests that over the next 20 to 60 years--the typical horizon for a 401(k)--**[crypto could deliver substantial returns](https://substack.com/redirect/7b97c054-8295-439c-903c-82e49f6b5e12?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as adoption grows and blockchain technology reshapes finance, supply chains, and beyond. Historical parallels, like gold's institutional adoption in the 1970s, support this optimism. When gold ETFs and futures contracts emerged, demand surged, driving multi-decade price increases. Similarly, just Bitcoin's integration into 401(k)s could catalyze a multi-year bull market, fueled by systematic investments from millions of savers.
In just the last 7 years Bitcoin is up a staggering 1,796.81%.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ef29bd8c-e8d5-4cd9-a654-6c28168e80ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If you look at where Bitcoin was 7 years ago
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dc0ab8ec-edb1-4bce-83ae-2c35cb92ee50?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Just a $3,300 investment from your 401K in 2018 would now be worth $120,000. Which would change a lot of people retirement outlook.
This change in the 401k investment rules could be coming at a great time because the next stratospheric wins could come from the new generation of utility based cryptos hitting the market, such as XRP, HBAR, XLM, Curve and Flare many of which can be purchased on any exchange today from anywhere between pennies to a few dollars. Even a small investment (less than $1000) in these could pay off handsomely in the next 10 years just like what happened with Bitcoin first and Ethereum second.
For those who are more cautious there are a raft of Spot ETF's for these new cryptos that are currently being reviewed by the SEC. It may have taken a decade for Bitcoin to get its first accredited ETF, but that timeline now is happening much faster.
**Now for the catch:** Crypto's volatility is not for the faint of heart. Bitcoin's 2025 price swings from $106,179 in January to $76,252 in April back to a new all time high above $124,290 in mid-August to today where it sits at $112,350 underscores the stomach-churning fluctuations that define the asset class. Over the past 15 years, Bitcoin has endured multiple drawdowns exceeding 50%, with some crashes wiping out 80% of its value in months. For comparison, the SPY's worst drawdown during the same period was around 34% during the 2020 COVID-19 crash. Crypto's volatility poses unique risks for 401(k) investors, particularly those nearing retirement who may lack the time to recover from a steep downturn. **[As LendingTree's Matt Schulz warned,](https://substack.com/redirect/32e3593d-4421-4de1-9c31-bb2ca3c8836a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "The potential for great rewards comes with great risk." That is not to say that the risks can't be mitigated by an aware investor but they are very real.
This executive order is not a blank check to go all-in on speculative tokens like "Fartcoin" and expect a cozy retirement. The risks--volatility, regulatory uncertainty, and cybersecurity threats--must be weighed carefully, as with any investment. Diversification remains the cornerstone of prudent investing. Financial experts emphasize that no single asset class, including crypto, should dominate a portfolio. A strategic allocation--say, 5-10% to crypto--can hedge against inflation and capture spectacular growth while mitigating the impact of a crash. Overexposure, especially to leveraged or obscure tokens, could be catastrophic.
For those hesitant to hold cryptocurrencies directly, the rise of spot Bitcoin and Ethereum exchange-traded funds (ETFs) **[offers a safer entry point.](https://substack.com/redirect/4f41d1ff-b62e-430c-a7a2-eba8dad87fc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** These funds, like BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) and VanEck's Ethereum ETF (ETHV), have already attracted $13 billion in inflows in 2025, delivering returns of 20% and 11%, respectively. Spot ETFs provide exposure to crypto's price movements without the complexities of self-custody, much like owning gold ETFs instead of physical bullion. The SEC's recent moves, including approving in-kind creations and redemptions for crypto ETFs, signal growing regulatory acceptance, with more funds likely to gain approval soon.
Self-custody, however, appeals to those who value control. Holding Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, or XRP directly mirrors the logic of storing precious metals in a safe: you own the asset outright, free from counterparty risk. But this comes with responsibilities--secure wallets, private key management, and vigilance against hacks. For most 401(k) investors, professionally managed vehicles like ETFs or target-date funds with crypto allocations (like BlackRock's planned 5-20% private asset funds) may be more practical, balancing access with fiduciary oversight.
This is not financial advice--do your own research. Crypto's complexity and risks demand a level of financial literacy many 401(k) participants lack. As Devin Carroll of Carroll Advisory Group noted, "Most 401(k) investors don't have a strong understanding of the basics," making education critical to avoid poor decisions.
Still, Trump's executive order is a bold step toward integrating a fast-growing industry into America's retirement system. By opening 401(k)s to crypto, it offers savers a chance to participate in a transformative asset class while underscoring the need for caution, diversification, and due diligence. The crypto train is leaving the station, but only those who board wisely will reach their destination.
* * *

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: This is what solidarity looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250821-780&t=1001&akid=789%2E251025%2Epf44F6 ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250821-780&t=1002&akid=789%2E251025%2Epf44F6 ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

Five hundred UAW members at Cleveland Cliffs were just laid off.

These are hard-working people who forge the steel used to make the cars we
drive — told without warning that their livelihoods, their healthcare,
their pensions didn’t matter.

This is what corporate greed looks like. Executives rake in millions while
the people who actually built this country get cast aside like they’re
disposable.

But when working people stand together, we are unstoppable. That’s why I
joined UAW members in the streets to say: Enough.

[ A ]A GIF of Abdul at the UAW protest

We’re not going to let corporations, or the politicians who do their
bidding, off the hook for gutting our union jobs, our towns, and our
communities.

A union job means security. It means dignity. It means knowing you can
raise your family and retire with pride.

That’s why this fight matters — because when one group of workers is
attacked, we all feel that pain.

Establishment politicians who cash corporate PAC checks aren’t just taking
their money. They’re taking payment in exchange for their silence and
complicity.

That’s not who we are, and it’s not how we win. I refuse every dime of
corporate PAC money, because our campaign is powered by people, for the
people.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250821-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250821-780&refcode2=789_251025_pf44F6&akid=789%2E251025%2Epf44F6 ]Peter, can
we count on your support? Every contribution is a step toward an economy
where workers come first — not corporate PACs, and not the would-be
oligarchs trying to buy our democracy.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250821-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250821-780&refcode2=789_251025_pf44F6&akid=789%2E251025%2Epf44F6 ]Donate $10 ››

In solidarity,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1003&akid=789%2E251025%2Epf44F6

clean_body: [ ]Abdul for US Senate [ ]Abdul for US Senate Peter, Five hundred UAW members at Cleveland Cliffs were just laid off. These are hard-working people who forge the steel used to make the cars we drive — told without warning that their livelihoods, their healthcare, their pensions didn’t matter. This is what corporate greed looks like. Executives rake in millions while the people who actually built this country get cast aside like they’re disposable. But when working people stand together, we are unstoppable. That’s why I joined UAW members in the streets to say: Enough. [ A ]A GIF of Abdul at the UAW protest We’re not going to let corporations, or the politicians who do their bidding, off the hook for gutting our union jobs, our towns, and our communities. A union job means security. It means dignity. It means knowing you can raise your family and retire with pride. That’s why this fight matters — because when one group of workers is attacked, we all feel that pain. Establishment politicians who cash corporate PAC checks aren’t just taking their money. They’re taking payment in exchange for their silence and complicity. That’s not who we are, and it’s not how we win. I refuse every dime of corporate PAC money, because our campaign is powered by people, for the people. [ ]Peter, can we count on your support? Every contribution is a step toward an economy where workers come first — not corporate PACs, and not the would-be oligarchs trying to buy our democracy. [ ]Donate $10 ›› In solidarity, Abdul

NPR dove into the urgency of our work, the generational shift we’re pushing, and why it matters that we’re challenging Democrats who’ve grown too comfortable in safe seats.
> **_“David Hogg is the perfect example of a Gen Z progressive shaped by crisis.”**
> “His group [Leaders We Deserve] is putting the spotlight on Democrats who’ve maybe gotten a little too comfortable.”_
> – NPR Politics Podcast
We are a generation raised in crisis — gun violence, climate collapse, democratic backsliding. And we’re done waiting for politicians to treat this moment with the urgency it requires. **We know it’s up to us to stand up and fight back.**
We’re building a political movement that can fight the far right and hold our party accountable at the same time. That means primarying out-of-touch Democrats and backing bold, young candidates ready to lead.

Folks — From daily news and kids’ shows to emergency alerts, public broadcasting is a lifeline for our communities. For decades, programs like NPR and PBS have provided trusted information and vital services to families across New Mexico. But to Republicans in Washington, these crucial programs are just another line item to slash in their budget. Their reckless cuts will mean less reliable emergency alerts when communities need them most. Martin recently met with leaders from New Mexico’s public broadcasting stations to discuss how we can fight back against these harmful cuts and protect this essential resource. For decades, programs like NPR and PBS have provided trusted information and vital services to families across New Mexico. But to Republicans in Washington, these crucial programs are just another line item to slash in their budget. Their reckless cuts will mean less reliable emergency alerts when communities need them most. Martin recently met with leaders from New Mexico’s public broadcasting stations to discuss how we can fight back against these harmful cuts and protect this essential resource. = But we need your help in this fight. body:
GOP rigged our maps to silence your vote. Help us fight back and restore fair elections in Tennessee.
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K375KJJ44F107ZP2JM2C3FX5_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K375KJJ44F107ZP2JM2C3FX5_1)

| | | | Peter, Republicans have rigged our electoral maps through partisan gerrymandering—diluting YOUR voice and weakening the power of your vote.
Last year a federal court ruled that Tennessee Republicans gerrymandered Nashville to "split it into three districts," deliberately eliminating Democratic representation and handing Republicans control of an extra congressional seat. This isn't just politics—this is voter suppression by another name.
Power-hungry politicians should not choose their voters. Voters should choose their representatives. We're fighting back—and we need YOU. Your donations help us recruit, fund and mobilize strong Democratic candidates across Tennessee, making these rigged red districts competitive for the first time. Every dollar you donate helps us find and empower fellow Tennesseans, reclaiming democracy one seat at a time.
We refuse to stand down while democracy is under attack. Stand with us today to restore your voice and rebuild our democracy.

---
| | [ DONATE NOW ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K375KJJ44F107ZP2JM2C3FX5_2)

| And help end gerrymandering in Tennessee.
Together,
The Tennessee House Democratic Caucus

body:
Breaking News: There was no case! It was unlawful and disgraceful that I was being forced to pay over $500 million.
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
## **_TOTAL VICTORY!_**

Friend
**TOTAL VICTORY in the FAKE New York State Attorney General Letitia James Case!** I greatly respect the fact that the Court had the Courage to throw out this unlawful and disgraceful Decision that was hurting Business all throughout New York State. Others were afraid to do business there. The amount, including Interest and Penalties, was over $550 Million Dollars. It was a Political Witch Hunt, in a business sense, the likes of which no one has ever seen before.
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[I WILL ALWAYS STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
This was a Case of Election Interference by the City and State trying to show, illegally, that I did things that were wrong when, in fact, everything I did was absolutely CORRECT and, even, PERFECT. **Every single Dollar was thrown out** , even the penalties imposed on us by the Corrupt Judge, one of the most overturned in History, Arthur Engoron.
I wasn’t given a Jury and, during the course of the Trial, which lasted a long time, was not given one Ruling in my favor by this Political Hack, but worse than him, if that’s possible, was Letitia James, a Corrupt and Incompetent Attorney General who only brought this Case in order to hurt me politically. She is a Trump Deranged Lunatic!
**Importantly, the Vote was 5 to 0.**
Sadly, there are other Cases against me! These were all Political Trials in an effort to destroy my viability as a Presidential Candidate before, during, and after the Election.
They were strongly coordinated with the Biden/Harris Campaign, and will go down in History as among the most Corrupt Cases ever brought. This was an attack by the Biden/Harris Administration on their Political Opponent, ME.
It is such an Honor to have withstood it, thrived, and even become President of the United States despite the horrible things that were done to me.
**BUT THEY’RE STILL COMING AFTER ME!**
**_[Right now more than ever, I need you to act. Please make a small sacrifice by chipping in and saying: I WILL ALWAYS STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP!>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
[I WILL ALWAYS STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
From the Desk of Donald J. Trump

It was a Political Witch Hunt, in a business sense, the likes of which no one has ever seen before. This was a Case of Election Interference by the City and State trying to show, illegally, that I did things that were wrong when, in fact, everything I did was absolutely CORRECT and, even, PERFECT. Every single Dollar was thrown out , even the penalties imposed on us by the Corrupt Judge, one of the most overturned in History, Arthur Engoron. I wasn’t given a Jury and, during the course of the Trial, which lasted a long time, was not given one Ruling in my favor by this Political Hack, but worse than him, if that’s possible, was Letitia James, a Corrupt and Incompetent Attorney General who only brought this Case in order to hurt me politically. She is a Trump Deranged Lunatic! Importantly, the Vote was 5 to 0. Sadly, there are other Cases against me! These were all Political Trials in an effort to destroy my viability as a Presidential Candidate before, during, and after the Election. They were strongly coordinated with the Biden/Harris Campaign, and will go down in History as among the most Corrupt Cases ever brought. This was an attack by the Biden/Harris Administration on their Political Opponent, ME. It is such an Honor to have withstood it, thrived, and even become President of the United States despite the horrible things that were done to me. BUT THEY’RE STILL COMING AFTER ME! name: Becca DeFelice, Emerge Texas
subject: Texas is a warning sign for us all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
The attacks on our rights are escalating. We need to be prepared to respond, and with your support, we’ll train the women who will lead the charge.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113754574/564818398/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-08-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzMmQxMWQyLWQwN2UtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Hoj-KFHxUnfMd6LZORq6ZsW6zVaDP66AlfdJErFNT1c=)

| Peter,

What’s happening in Texas right now is a warning sign for the rest of the country.

Republicans in the Texas House just passed their rigged redistricting maps, a move that will silence Black and Brown voters for years to come.

Emerge alums like Texas State Sen. Molly Cook and State Rep. Rhetta Bowers are showing us what standing up looks like in this moment. Their fight is part of a broader movement of Emerge women across the country who are standing firm against attempts to undermine democracy.

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: It’s about that time...
body:
Club America is the movement that will end the Left’s youth monopoly

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/5a5a476a-66d7-4759-991b-b8bd6ab5ba1b?source_code=MAWCO68347&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=club_america&utm_content=ab_test_a&utm_term=MAWCO68347]

Patriot,

The Left thought they had it locked up.

The Left believed America’s high schools were a fortress they could
count on — the one place where their lies would go unchallenged...

Where “America is evil,” “freedom is selfish,” and “boys can
become girls” were taken as fact.

And for a while, they were right...

They owned the school boards. Decided what was in the textbooks.
Occupied the teacher’s lounge. And silenced dissent wherever it was
found.

THE LEFT SPENT DECADES BUILDING THIS PIPELINE, POURING BILLIONS INTO
“EDUCATION” AND “EQUITY” PROGRAMS THAT DO ONE THING: _CREATE
LOYAL FOOT SOLDIERS FOR THEIR WORLDVIEW._

But friend, they never saw us coming.

They never thought we’d compete with them. And they certainly never
thought we’d be winning.

YET, BECAUSE OF PATRIOTS LIKE YOU, TURNING POINT USA BREACHED THIS
LEFTIST STRONGHOLD.

[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/5a5a476a-66d7-4759-991b-b8bd6ab5ba1b?source_code=MAWCO68347&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=club_america&utm_content=ab_test_a&utm_term=MAWCO68347]

Because just a few years ago, this movement in high schools didn’t
exist.

There were ZERO Turning Point USA high school chapters. No field
staff. No student leaders. No such thing as “Club America.”

To be sure, we were building a massive machine on college campuses
across the country...

But I realized this one thing: _It wasn’t enough._

I’m sure you remember the crazy school board meetings. The wildly
inappropriate books in school libraries. Curriculums designed to
indoctrinate, isolate, and divide.

We couldn’t just let the Left have free rein over our kids, teaching
them to hate America for years before they ever set foot on a college
campus.

IF YOU AND I WERE GOING TO WIN BACK OUR CULTURE AND SAVE OUR COUNTRY,
WE COULDN’T JUST STOP AT UNIVERSITIES... _WE NEEDED TO WIN BACK HIGH
SCHOOL STUDENTS, TOO._

It was that simple. And in 2022, we started from ZERO.

But now? Thanks to patriots like you?

🔥 1,250+ Club America chapters
🧭 250,000+ student activists trained
🎤 400+ high school events and rallies
🏫 Hundreds of campuses with students leading the charge for
freedom

PATRIOTS LIKE YOU MADE THAT HAPPEN...

Launched a movement the Left didn’t see coming...

Gave students something they were told they’d never have: A choice.
Another voice. A place where they could say _“I love my
country.__..__”_

And together, we’re helping these students wage a frontline assault
on the Left’s cultural monopoly — inside the school walls.

Because the most dangerous thing to the Left’s entire agenda?_
Students who aren’t afraid to speak up._

[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/5a5a476a-66d7-4759-991b-b8bd6ab5ba1b?source_code=MAWCO68347&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=club_america&utm_content=ab_test_a&utm_term=MAWCO68347]

Pictured Above: High school students across the country heard from
conservative voices like Riley Gaines, Brandon Tatum, Dr. Ben Carson,
and more during our Spring 2025 “Stand for the Flag” Tour

And this year, we’re on the edge of something even bigger...

A COMPLETE GENERATIONAL REALIGNMENT— ONE THAT MAKES IT IMPOSSIBLE
FOR THE LEFT TO EVER TAKE THIS GROUND AGAIN.

But here’s what the Left is counting on...

They’re counting on us to stop. To slow down. To say “this is
enough.” To lose our urgency.

Because they know the truth...

If we reach every high school? If we scale this to 20,000+ Club
America chapters?

THEN IT’S OVER. THE LEFT WILL BE OUT OF BUSINESS FOR AN ENTIRE
GENERATION. AND THEY’LL HAVE TO FIGHT ON OUR TURF.

But friend, a new school year is already starting.

Some districts are back. Millions of students return in a matter of
days.

This moment — right now — is our shot. We can make this the school
year that breaks their pipeline for good.

We’ve shown we can break into the system...

Now, it’s time to conquer it and replace the Left’s agenda with
truth, patriotism, and freedom.

AND THANKS TO TURNING POINT USA’S GENEROUS SUPPORTERS, CONSERVATIVE
STUDENTS ACROSS THE COUNTRY ARE WALKING INTO THEIR SCHOOLS WITH TRUTH
IN THEIR HAND — AND A FIRE IN THEIR CHEST.

That’s what patriots like you made possible.

Let's scale the mission — _until the Left has nothing left to stand
on._

For America,

Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/5a5a476a-66d7-4759-991b-b8bd6ab5ba1b?source_code=MAWCO68347&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=club_america&utm_content=ab_test_a&utm_term=MAWCO68347]

P.S. Every Club America chapter we launch starts with one thing: A
high school activism kit.

Each one costs just $25 — and includes everything a student needs to
launch, lead, and win:

✅ Leadership and training materials

✅ Chapter organizing tools

✅ Pocket Constitutions, American flags, and patriotic
gear

These students are ready. The school year is starting now. Let’s
strike while we have the opening.

WILL YOU HELP US EQUIP THE NEXT STUDENT LEADER TODAY?
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/5a5a476a-66d7-4759-991b-b8bd6ab5ba1b?source_code=MAWCO68347&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=club_america&utm_content=ab_test_a&utm_term=MAWCO68347]

SPONSOR A CLUB AMERICA KIT
MAKE YOUR GIFT HERE

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Unsubscribe: https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=312714&trkid=860959761&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

We need to act fast if we’re going to retake the lead. Our strength in this fight is in our unity and our numbers - not elite Leftist megadonors. For America, Steve Daines P.S. We don't have the luxury of time. If we're going to retake the lead we need to act now. Your donation is indispensible to our fight. Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Jason Crow
subject: We need to win these seats to win the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
I’m endorsing Maura Sullivan and Jo Mendoza for Congress. |
#
---
Friend, Our country needs a new generation of leadership. Leaders who seek to _unite_ us, not divide us. The number one way to fight back against Donald Trump and hold his extreme allies in Congress accountable is to flip the House blue next year. I’m working to recruit and support a new generation of Democratic leaders who embody service and community — values we need more of in Congress. **That's why I'm excited to endorse two veterans to help us take back the House: Maura Sullivan in NH-01 and Jo Mendoza in AZ-06.** Maura and Jo are servant leaders who will work to fight corruption, lower costs, and deliver for their communities in Washington. **[Will you split a donation of $3 or more between my campaign, Maura Sullivan, and Jo Mendoza to help us deliver true servant leadership in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113755677/564822335/-1533331723?amount=3&refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20250821_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTlmNTM2Ny1kMjdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BCLJw-_SzW_M4XqrzFq7GuZSF491OM5xg72JKpTwwuU=)** | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113755678/564822336/-1533331723?refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20250821_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTlmNTM2Ny1kMjdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BCLJw-_SzW_M4XqrzFq7GuZSF491OM5xg72JKpTwwuU=)
---
As I walk through the halls of Congress, I never forget what it was like to be an Army Ranger. Serving in Iraq and Afghanistan taught me about servant leadership, working under pressure, and the value of selfless service to others.
We need leaders who live according to those values right now in Washington, more than ever before. We have to get this next election right — for our communities and our country.
Jo Mendoza and Maura Sullivan are the service-oriented leaders we need in Congress to solve our toughest problems. Electing them to serve in Washington is essential to win back the House and get things done for working people.
**[If you’re ready to see a new generation of servant leaders in Congress, please make a split contribution between Jo, Maura, and me today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113755679/564822337/-1533331723?refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20250821_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTlmNTM2Ny1kMjdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BCLJw-_SzW_M4XqrzFq7GuZSF491OM5xg72JKpTwwuU=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Maura Sullivan, Jo Mendoza, and Jason Crow will go through immediately:_

clean_body: I’m endorsing Maura Sullivan and Jo Mendoza for Congress. | Friend, Our country needs a new generation of leadership. Leaders who seek to unite us, not divide us. The number one way to fight back against Donald Trump and hold his extreme allies in Congress accountable is to flip the House blue next year. I’m working to recruit and support a new generation of Democratic leaders who embody service and community — values we need more of in Congress. That's why I'm excited to endorse two veterans to help us take back the House: Maura Sullivan in NH-01 and Jo Mendoza in AZ-06. Maura and Jo are servant leaders who will work to fight corruption, lower costs, and deliver for their communities in Washington. = | = As I walk through the halls of Congress, I never forget what it was like to be an Army Ranger. Serving in Iraq and Afghanistan taught me about servant leadership, working under pressure, and the value of selfless service to others. We need leaders who live according to those values right now in Washington, more than ever before. We have to get this next election right — for our communities and our country. Jo Mendoza and Maura Sullivan are the service-oriented leaders we need in Congress to solve our toughest problems. Electing them to serve in Washington is essential to win back the House and get things done for working people. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Maura Sullivan, Jo Mendoza, and Jason Crow will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Jason Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

Responding to Texas’ fight to correct partisan maps forced on them by the Biden DOJ, California Governor Gavin Newsom is leading a blatant power grab to manipulate congressional maps to favor Democrats. His so-called scheme aims to redraw district lines to secure an unprecedented partisan advantage, ensuring Democrat cronies stay in power at the expense of fair representation. _**This isn’t just a California problem—it’s a direct threat to the integrity of our elections nationwide.**_

Democrats are desperate after their crushing losses in 2024. They’re using underhanded tactics to tilt the playing field, and Newsom’s plan is a prime example. If they succeed, Republicans could lose critical seats in Congress, undermining our ability to defend President Trump’s America First vision.

**We need to stand united against these manipulative tactics and ensure our elections remain fair and free.**

[**Your support is critical to countering Democrat schemes. | | **About Tom**
_Tom Cole, a fifth-generation Oklahoman and enrolled Chickasaw Nation member, has served Oklahoma as a U.S. Congressman, championing strong national defense, taxpayer protection, and Native American issues while chairing the House Appropriations Committee to secure borders and cut wasteful spending. A former Oklahoma State Senator, Secretary of State, and small business owner, he played a key role in Oklahoma’s economic growth and recovery after the 1995 Murrah Building bombing. He lives in Moore with his wife, Ellen, and son, Mason, continuing a family legacy of service._

clean_body: I’m reaching out with an urgent warning: Democrats are working to rig the 2026 midterm elections, and we need your help to stop them. | Fellow Conservative, I’m reaching out with an urgent warning: Responding to Texas’ fight to correct partisan maps forced on them by the Biden DOJ, California Governor Gavin Newsom is leading a blatant power grab to manipulate congressional maps to favor Democrats. His so-called scheme aims to redraw district lines to secure an unprecedented partisan advantage, ensuring Democrat cronies stay in power at the expense of fair representation. This isn’t just a California problem—it’s a direct threat to the integrity of our elections nationwide. Democrats are desperate after their crushing losses in 2024. They’re using underhanded tactics to tilt the playing field, and Newsom’s plan is a prime example. If they succeed, Republicans could lose critical seats in Congress, undermining our ability to defend President Trump’s America First vision. We need to stand united against these manipulative tactics and ensure our elections remain fair and free. Together, we can stop Gavin Newsom and the Democrats from rigging the 2026 elections. For freedom, Tom Cole P.S. Every dollar you contribute helps us defend fair elections and keep our conservative majority strong. | | About Tom Tom Cole, a fifth-generation Oklahoman and enrolled Chickasaw Nation member, has served Oklahoma as a U.S. Congressman, championing strong national defense, taxpayer protection, and Native American issues while chairing the House Appropriations Committee to secure borders and cut wasteful spending. A former Oklahoma State Senator, Secretary of State, and small business owner, he played a key role in Oklahoma’s economic growth and recovery after the 1995 Murrah Building bombing. He lives in Moore with his wife, Ellen, and son, Mason, continuing a family legacy of service. | Paid for by Cole for Congress

name: Nellie Pou
subject: Everything costs more.
body:
| |
---
Hi friend, The latest data is out, and it’s not good news. Inflation just saw one of its biggest spikes in years. MAGA Republicans promised to lower costs for hard-working families. But once they took power, they did the opposite and lined the pockets of billionaires instead. That is this administration’s economic agenda:
* Tariffs to make everyday goods more expensive.
* Chaos-fueled supply shortages.
* Tax cuts written for the ultra-wealthy, not the rest of us.

And let me be clear: I will never support an agenda that hurts New Jersey working families. **[I’m in this fight to make sure our economy works for everyone, not just those at the top. If you share that vision, I’m asking you to join me. name: Wesley Bell
subject: Trump wants to turn Missouri into his pawn.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
_Donald Trump and his MAGA allies think Missouri is their playground, Peter._

Right now, Republican leaders in Jefferson City are plotting a special session to redraw our Congressional maps, not to represent Missourians fairly, **but to rig the game in Trump’s favor.**

Their goal is simple: Follow Texas’s lead, slice up our communities, and gerrymander Missouri so Democrats don't have a fighting chance in one of eight districts. That’s how desperate they are to cling to power.

_This has never been about just Missouri._ **It’s about Trump trying to use us as pawns to keep his extremists in charge and expand on their razor-thin majority in Congress in 2026.** And instead of respecting voters, Republican politicians keep overturning our decisions and bending the knee to Trump.

Now they’re trying to silence us altogether by flipping the maps in their favor all across the country, and we simply can't allow them to go unchecked. But, look, I can’t win this fight alone. If we’re going to stop this gerrymandering scheme, we need to show Trump and Missouri Republicans that people-power still beats corruption and backroom deals. That starts with all of us.

[**Chip in $5, or anything you can, to help me show extremists that Missouri doesn't take orders from Donald Trump, and we refuse to sit idly by while they continue to cheat their way into power. clean_body: Donald Trump and his MAGA allies think Missouri is their playground, Peter. Right now, Republican leaders in Jefferson City are plotting a special session to redraw our Congressional maps, not to represent Missourians fairly, but to rig the game in Trump’s favor. Their goal is simple: Follow Texas’s lead, slice up our communities, and gerrymander Missouri so Democrats don't have a fighting chance in one of eight districts. That’s how desperate they are to cling to power. This has never been about just Missouri. It’s about Trump trying to use us as pawns to keep his extremists in charge and expand on their razor-thin majority in Congress in 2026. And instead of respecting voters, Republican politicians keep overturning our decisions and bending the knee to Trump. Now they’re trying to silence us altogether by flipping the maps in their favor all across the country, and we simply can't allow them to go unchecked. But, look, I can’t win this fight alone. If we’re going to stop this gerrymandering scheme, we need to show Trump and Missouri Republicans that people-power still beats corruption and backroom deals. That starts with all of us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Wesley Bell = = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI PO Box 190669, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

**It is clear — Donald Trump is ramping up his authoritarian attacks on Americans across the country.**

From partisan gerrymandering in Texas or suppressing his political opponents, he and his MAGA cronies are targeting outspoken leaders in Democratic seats like mine.

It’s only the beginning – the attacks on IL-01 and across our nation will keep coming unless we act right now. We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines for even one day. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 8/21/2025
body:
Same week, same county, different response: Inside the Elk and Lee fires
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Frustration is rising as residents warn that[ government dysfunction and soaring costs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) are making life unsustainable. Lawmakers [punted the budget deficit to Gov. Polis](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), while proposed insurance fee hikes threaten to deepen the affordability crisis. A new bill would [pause wolf releases](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to redirect funds toward health insurance, and Denver Mayor Mike Johnston faces backlash after City Hall layoffs critics [call a political purge](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Meanwhile, the state is battling crises from devastating wildfires that exposed [stark response gaps](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to a [surge in bike thefts](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) giving Colorado the nation’s third-highest rate. On the media front, Nexstar’s [purchase of 9News parent Tegna](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) further consolidates local news.
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** President Trump continues to dominate headlines, endorsing Tulsi Gabbard in a [broad strike against the intelligence community](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and boosting his populist appeal. At the same time, his [approval rating surged to 54%](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) after his Alaska summit with Vladimir Putin, with polls showing stronger support among independents and minority voters.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** This week’s commentary highlights distrust in politics and policy. One piece urges parents to use the [new remote testimony option](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) before the Colorado State Board of Education to reclaim influence over their children’s schools. Another argues that Colorado’s latest infrastructure report reveals more about [political gamesmanship than potholes](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—proof, critics say, that dysfunction, not decay, is the state’s real crisis.
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, August 21, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Same week, same county, different response: Inside the Elk and Lee fires](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Flames boiled the pond on Mike Clark’s ranch, scorched irrigated fields and melted fiberglass fence posts in minutes. On August 6, the Lee Fire came so fast friends were calling with warnings as his family scrambled to clear trees and pump water toward the house.
Just miles away on the Elk Fire side, air tankers and ground crews had been dropping water since early morning.
Mike Clark is no stranger to high stakes. A fourth-generation Coloradan and CEO of Petrox Resources, he built his life and business in the same place he raised his children. For decades, Clark has run Petrox while also working the family’s ranch, a property he moved to more than 30 years ago for its open spaces, agricultural roots and the chance to raise his kids in a rural community.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Colorado’s infrastructure report reveals more about politics than potholes](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY CORY GAINES, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado’s latest infrastructure report card reveals deep political maneuvering behind funding decisions, showing how priorities are shaped less by need and more by politics.

* Critics argue the focus on potholes and maintenance distracts from the real issue: politicians using infrastructure as a tool to reward allies and punish opponents.

* The report highlights a broader pattern of dysfunction in Colorado governance, where residents feel political gamesmanship—not infrastructure decay—is the state’s true crisis.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|

The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Lawmakers Pass The Buck On Budget Deficit Leaving Decisions To Governor Polis](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado lawmakers ended the legislative session without addressing the state’s mounting budget deficit, instead handing the responsibility to Governor Jared Polis.
* Critics say this move allows legislators to dodge tough political choices while Polis must now decide where to cut or reallocate funds.
* The decision highlights ongoing dysfunction at the Capitol, leaving uncertainty about how the state will handle growing fiscal challenges.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[When watchdogs reached out, only two clerks answered: Colorado’s election crisis exposed](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY BILL LEHMAN & HEIDI GANAHL****| COMMENTARY | AUGUST 20** _Colorado’s election system is facing a crisis of confidence, with voters increasingly skeptical due to incidents like Arapahoe County’s mishandled 2020 Cast Vote Record and the Secretary of State’s office leaking 600 BIOS passwords during the 2024 election. Leaking 600 BIOS passwords is the civic version of leaving the house key under the doormat and then posting a photo of the doormat._
__

**[From gospel to grievance: How seminaries traded truth for ideology](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY MICHAEL HANCOCK | COMMENTARY | AUGUST 18** _There was a time when seminaries existed to train ministers of the gospel — men and women who would handle the Scriptures carefully, shepherd congregations faithfully, and proclaim salvation through Christ alone. But over the past century, many of America’s most prominent seminaries have undergone a quiet yet radical transformation._
__

**[The math doesn’t lie: America’s election system is broken—and the regime desperately wants it that way](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**BY C. J. GARBO | COMMENTARY | AUGUST 10** _America is being held hostage – not by a foreign power, not by a virus, not by some spontaneous national confusion. We are being held hostage by a corrupt, coordinated regime that seized the machinery of government, media, and elections in order to protect its own power and suppress anyone who threatens it._

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor+Interest+%28via+Mountain+Minute%29)) or send us a message on social media to chat

**🍿 DID YOU KNOW?** **Movie trailers got their name because they came last.** The very first trailer ran in 1913—not for a film, but for a Broadway show—and early versions always appeared after the feature, “trailing” the movie.
|

**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|

**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "No power on earth has a right to take our property from us without our consent." – John Jay

A fourth-generation Coloradan and CEO of Petrox Resources, he built his life and business in the same place he raised his children. name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: On the trail across WI-03
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113756074/564823573/1706257898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDUwNTIwYS1kNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_HF6Amy3ps8zeUa2PaCkj3YPpA5BA1CxwfAhZLRbRmc=&emci=feb6b4f7-cd7e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=cd50520a-d47e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=5944223)
Peter, We’re deep in the heart of campaign season, and there’s nothing more energizing than hitting the trail across western Wisconsin, talking with voters about what matters most. In just the past month, I’ve been in Eau Claire, Holmen, Portage County, and Pierce County — at parades, party meetings, fairs, and roundtables — connecting with people about the real-life impacts of failed leadership in Congress. Below are a few recent highlights from the trail that I wanted to share with you. But first, I just want to say thank you, Peter. Your support is what keeps this campaign going, and I’m more confident than ever that we can win. Thank you, Rebecca | ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113756075/564823574/-2083379535?refcode=em-8.21.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDUwNTIwYS1kNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_HF6Amy3ps8zeUa2PaCkj3YPpA5BA1CxwfAhZLRbRmc=)****
---

* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113756076/564823575/-2083379535?refcode=em-8.21.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDUwNTIwYS1kNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_HF6Amy3ps8zeUa2PaCkj3YPpA5BA1CxwfAhZLRbRmc=)
Since HSHS closed its doors, families across Eau Claire and western Wisconsin have been left without healthcare they can rely on. **I joined local leaders in Eau Claire to speak out about how Republican-led Medicaid cuts are driving up costs and making care harder to access.** Van Orden hasn’t lifted a finger to fix it — and that’s unacceptable.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113756077/564823576/-2083379535?refcode=em-8.21.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDUwNTIwYS1kNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_HF6Amy3ps8zeUa2PaCkj3YPpA5BA1CxwfAhZLRbRmc=)
**I was proud to have earned the support of IUPAT District Councils 7 and 82.** These workers know firsthand what working families are going through, and we’re ready to fight together to protect registered apprenticeship program, pass the PRO Act, and lower costs.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113756080/564823579/-2083379535?refcode=em-8.21.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDUwNTIwYS1kNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_HF6Amy3ps8zeUa2PaCkj3YPpA5BA1CxwfAhZLRbRmc=)
**I stopped by the Pierce County Fair** to celebrate our district’s rich farming and 4-H traditions. It was great to talk with exhibitors and families from across the region.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113756082/564823581/-2083379535?refcode=em-8.21.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDUwNTIwYS1kNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_HF6Amy3ps8zeUa2PaCkj3YPpA5BA1CxwfAhZLRbRmc=)
**I was back in Portage County for a county party meeting with local Democrats.** We talked about the road ahead and the opportunity we have to flip the State Assembly, State Senate, and U.S. House right here in Wisconsin. These are the kinds of conversations that fuel our momentum.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113756084/564823583/-2083379535?refcode=em-8.21.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDUwNTIwYS1kNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_HF6Amy3ps8zeUa2PaCkj3YPpA5BA1CxwfAhZLRbRmc=)
Last week marked the 90th anniversary of the Social Security Act — and **I’m honored to be endorsed by the National Committee to Preserve Social Security & Medicare. **These are earned benefits, and every senior deserves the opportunity to retire with dignity. In Congress, I’ll never vote to cut them.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113756086/564823585/-2083379535?refcode=em-8.21.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDUwNTIwYS1kNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_HF6Amy3ps8zeUa2PaCkj3YPpA5BA1CxwfAhZLRbRmc=)
**Last Saturday my team marched in the Holmen Kornfest Parade!** Huge thanks to the American Legion Post 284 for sponsoring such a great event.
**People are ready for a change in WI-03** , and they’re ready to send a working-class voice to Congress who fights for them, not the elites.
Your support fuels this campaign, and it’s what’s going to send Derrick Van Orden packing.
[**We need your help to keep up the pace. Will you chip in $3 today to help power our campaign down the stretch?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113756092/564823588/-2083379535?refcode=em-8.21.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDUwNTIwYS1kNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_HF6Amy3ps8zeUa2PaCkj3YPpA5BA1CxwfAhZLRbRmc=)

clean_body: | Peter, We’re deep in the heart of campaign season, and there’s nothing more energizing than hitting the trail across western Wisconsin, talking with voters about what matters most. In just the past month, I’ve been in Eau Claire, Holmen, Portage County, and Pierce County — at parades, party meetings, fairs, and roundtables — connecting with people about the real-life impacts of failed leadership in Congress. Below are a few recent highlights from the trail that I wanted to share with you. But first, I just want to say thank you, Peter. Your support is what keeps this campaign going, and I’m more confident than ever that we can win. Thank you, Rebecca | **= = Since HSHS closed its doors, families across Eau Claire and western Wisconsin have been left without healthcare they can rely on. I joined local leaders in Eau Claire to speak out about how Republican-led Medicaid cuts are driving up costs and making care harder to access. Van Orden hasn’t lifted a finger to fix it — and that’s unacceptable. = I was proud to have earned the support of IUPAT District Councils 7 and 82. These workers know firsthand what working families are going through, and we’re ready to fight together to protect registered apprenticeship program, pass the PRO Act, and lower costs. = I stopped by the Pierce County Fair to celebrate our district’s rich farming and 4-H traditions. It was great to talk with exhibitors and families from across the region. = I was back in Portage County for a county party meeting with local Democrats. We talked about the road ahead and the opportunity we have to flip the State Assembly, State Senate, and U.S. House right here in Wisconsin. These are the kinds of conversations that fuel our momentum. = Last week marked the 90th anniversary of the Social Security Act — and I’m honored to be endorsed by the National Committee to Preserve Social Security & Medicare. These are earned benefits, and every senior deserves the opportunity to retire with dignity. In Congress, I’ll never vote to cut them. = Last Saturday my team marched in the Holmen Kornfest Parade! Huge thanks to the American Legion Post 284 for sponsoring such a great event. People are ready for a change in WI-03 , and they’re ready to send a working-class voice to Congress who fights for them, not the elites. Your support fuels this campaign, and it’s what’s going to send Derrick Van Orden packing. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ****=** | ****=** ****** | | ****=** | ****=** ****** | | ****=** | ****=** Thank you for being a part of this. Rebecca | = = Rebecca Cooke is a small business and nonprofit leader who has focused her career on building community and serving others. She was born and raised on an Eau Claire dairy farm and was appointed by Governor Tony Evers to the Wisconsin Economic Development Corporation. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Cooke for Congress PO Box 1846 Eau Claire, WI 54702 United States

name: Ty Pinkins
subject: VICTORY FOR MISSISSIPPIANS!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ty Pinkins for Congress
body:
The ruling is in! Read it here: https://mississippitoday.org/2025/08/19/mississippi-supreme-court-redistricting-federal-judge-redraw-maps/

Fresh out of law school, I joined a lawsuit as one of four plaintiffs suing Governor Tate Reeves, Attorney General Lynn Fitch, and Secretary of State Michael Watson over Mississippi’s Supreme Court election map—that violates the Voting Rights Act by diluting the voices of Black voters here in the Delta.

Earlier this week, U.S. District Judge Sharon Aycock ruled in our favor.
Now, the Mississippi legislature must redraw three State Supreme Court districts — giving voters a fairer chance to elect justices who truly represent them.

This is a major step forward in the fight for equal representation and a more accountable judicial system.

I'm fired up! Let's build on this historic ruling and take the fight all the way to the U.S. Senate. Mississippians deserve a leader in Washington who will fight for them 24/7 — and with your support, we can make that happen.

Donate: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tpforussenate0620253?refcode=0821

Positive Energy Wins the Day—Every, Single, Time.

Thank you for your support!

-Ty Pinkins
Independent. Mississippi Strong.
www.TyPinkins.com

Paid for by Ty Pinkins for Congress
Ty Pinkins for Congress
PO Box 4525
Jackson, MS 39296
United States

body:
Lie, distract, repeat.

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=jg1sBjxuPKYBRLD0bDiiW0yfaiFvwxS6Ip9%2B9suQbBFfVjcd8jgkPU5r7vRJjRmOaByrausLXHPL8VHqyO4DXkKesj9RRCS0Bm3hI5YaMaVsKYxOXFHDTsnFI8WnJckSIME4kePC3vCXDY6iiLsmaPUw1y9%2F2S4s6XmXfxE%2BPZm8YRtSo3h0N5BZKO%2FIFhHZx%2F96pA3BbecISqUL%2BpxFvu01%2F5cx0W06L13PnJDCnssSX5APC9A%2BUsiAz%2BbTL9P8%2FOmkIoOWNBEYLfIlxd7E8qObZq%2FhY3LN9KMcBPgoYrMIp4rghH92scWEIWrEsFZoslxxFUl5RdPk4UOQwmRrq7%2Fz%2BVj9bozl8HEwT%2B3ATLlFjeF6p1e0OD%2FhxvzpBwtaLCK3B6ACwTVX9hp766tQ3d6cCwy4ttfEs129X4YlbEOyqswQEE%2FxKK2NWCEXtP3t)

Republicans aren’t just redrawing maps — **they’re rewriting reality.** Their extreme gerrymandering has triggered a nationwide scramble, and now they’re doing everything they can to cover their tracks — deflecting blame, distorting facts, and propping up an extreme MAGA agenda. Instead of working to lower prices or protect access to healthcare, Republicans are laser-focused on one goal: **clinging to power and giving Donald Trump a free hand to do whatever he wants.** The NRCC is flooding CA-25 with dark money attacks — because they know this seat is one of the keys to flipping the House in 2026. And they’re betting that deception and division will beat truth and leadership. We can’t stay quiet and let them buy this seat. [That’s why we need you. While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. That’s progress, but it’s not enough to fuel the organizing, outreach, and advocacy our district needs. We have just a few hundred dollars left to raise before midnight TONIGHT. And every dollar will go toward keeping our movement strong in the face of cruel attacks on health care, voting rights, and economic justice. We don’t take these requests lightly. I know how hard people are working to make ends meet. But I also know that when our community comes together, we make change possible — in Washington and at home. clean_body: Just $1,500 to go before we hit our goal. | = = | | Hi Friend, We set an ambitious $5,000 midmonth goal — because the fights we’re in right now demand real resources. Today, we’re just under 70% of the way there. That’s progress, but it’s not enough to fuel the organizing, outreach, and advocacy our district needs. We have just a few hundred dollars left to raise before midnight TONIGHT. And every dollar will go toward keeping our movement strong in the face of cruel attacks on health care, voting rights, and economic justice. We don’t take these requests lightly. I know how hard people are working to make ends meet. But I also know that when our community comes together, we make change possible — in Washington and at home. = | = Grassroots campaigns like ours don’t survive on big checks from special interests. We survive — and win — because people like you choose to invest in a vision for justice, equity, and progress. Let’s finish what we started. name: Travis Grantham
subject: President Trump is cleaning up Washington, D.C.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GRANTHAM FOR CONGRESS]()
body:
I’m a staunch supporter of the rule of law - In Congress, I’ll make sure law enforcement has what they need!

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4f12d50bb65b/welcome-to-team-grantham-10140997?e=0b767f7f9d)
---
[|
---](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=e843c6444c&e=0b767f7f9d)
| | | | | | Friend,Crime in our nation’s capital has gotten out of control. Washington, DC, is supposed to be a shining city on the hill, and a favorite destination for tourists, families, businesses, and our nation’s leaders. Unfortunately, it is a city overrun by crime, and now President Trump is getting involved.
Democrats have controlled Washington DC for decades and we see the results of their soft-on-crime policies. Washington, DC’s homicide rate is higher than any state in the country. It is well past time to clean up our nation’s capital.
Every Republican running today promises to be “tough on crime” or to “Back the Blue,” but in Arizona, I have a record of doing precisely that. In my home state, I have faced resistance from radical left politicians who supported defunding the police or denying resources to police, making it harder to do their jobs. Well, I fought them AND WON! In Congress, I will work alongside President Trump and other Republicans to clean up our nation’s capital and ensure that law enforcement has the resources needed to keep our communities safe.
That’s just one of the reasons I was endorsed by police organizations when I ran for the Legislature, and why my campaign for Congress has been endorsed by Maricopa County Sheriff Jerry Sheridan.

---
[|
---](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=56f23d1cc3&e=0b767f7f9d)

name: Heidi Hall for Congress
subject: RECAP: An important month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250821_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250821_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
Friend, it's Heidi Hall.
Before we get into a busy end of the month, I wanted to give you a recap on what our campaign has been up to in August.
FIRST: The proposed map redistricting California that Newsom recently announced put our campaign in the national spotlight as one of the districts that will be most affected.
We could be the TOP pickup opportunity for Democrats in Congress. But we're not taking anything for granted—I've won tough races before, and we're preparing for a fight no matter what.
THEN: To add to the list of amazing endorsements that we've received, former Senator Bill Dodd endorsed me in this race, saying, "I am proud to support Heidi because she is a fighter who stands up for people, and she can win this seat no matter what happens with redistricting.”
NOW: August is almost over, and we need a BIG push to meet our End of Month Fundraising Goal.
Remember, meeting End of Month Goals like these is what allows our campaign to communicate with the people of our district and get our message out there—which according to the poll that had us tied in a head-to-head with our opponent Kevin Kiley— we have to do to win.
Friend, will you support our campaign for Congress and help us raise the $18,662 more we need online to meet our End of Month Fundraising Goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250821_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250821_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
Thank you so much,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250821_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250821_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250821_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

name: Mark Kelly
subject: They're coming for your right to vote by mail
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113757024/564826675/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_VIP_AC_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODVlYmQwZWUtZDg3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=plG1qDqcMIs7gP-zhW07RqE0NnJUiDiEVLMIS6wSYf8=)
---
Hi, it's Arizona Senator Mark Kelly. We've got a real situation on our hands. **Trump says he intends to end mail-in voting. They want to eliminate the way over 85% of Arizonans choose to vote.** This isn't about election security. This is about making it harder for Arizonans to vote. When MAGA Republicans like Trump and Rep. Eli Crane push to ban mail-in ballots nationwide, they're making it harder for seniors, people with disabilities, and tribal communities to participate in our democracy. That's not an accident. That's the point. Mail-in voting works in Arizona. Seniors who can't easily get to polling places. Americans with disabilities who face transportation barriers. Tribal communities in remote areas where the nearest polling location might be hours away. **Trump wants to silence these voices.** I know a thing or two about winning tough elections in Arizona. When over 85% of voters in our state use mail-in ballots, any attempt to eliminate that option is a direct attack on Arizona's elections and our democracy. MAGA Republicans want to take this strategy nationwide. That's exactly what Trump allies like Eli Crane are planning. **We have to fight back, and we have to do it now.** **[Help the Arizona Democratic Party fight back against this blatant GOP power grab in Arizona: Support their work by donating now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113757026/564826677/1948356670?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_VIP_AC_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODVlYmQwZWUtZDg3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=plG1qDqcMIs7gP-zhW07RqE0NnJUiDiEVLMIS6wSYf8=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113757028/564826679/1948356670?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_VIP_AC_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODVlYmQwZWUtZDg3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=plG1qDqcMIs7gP-zhW07RqE0NnJUiDiEVLMIS6wSYf8=)

U.S. Senator, Arizona
