name: Team Deb
subject: The power of $5
disclaimer_text: paid for by the ultra-wealthy, **Deb’s campaign is powered by the people
body:
When thousands of us step up and chip in together, even small amounts add up to something extraordinary.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3943%2E400544%2EJt-gGW)
The people backing Donald Trump and the Millionaire Republican running for governor in New Mexico are largely billionaires who write enormous checks in the hopes that it will get them policies that make them even richer.
**By contrast, Deb’s campaign is supported by thousands of New Mexicans** — teachers, veterans, nurses, parents, and students, each giving what they can because they believe in Deb’s vision for a future where every family has a fair shot.
The difference couldn’t be more clear. While Trump and MAGA Republicans like him are bought and paid for by the ultra-wealthy, **Deb’s campaign is powered by the people.**
And when thousands of us step up and chip in together, even small amounts add up to something extraordinary, helping us knock doors, run ads, and organize in every corner of the state.
**If everyone reading this email were to pitch in just $5 today, we’d raise what we need to keep pace with Republicans’ billionaire-funded machine.[So, can we count on you to donate $5 to support Deb’s campaign right now? ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250821_1_fivedollars?amount=5&refcode=em20250821-3943&refcode2=3943_400544_Jt-gGW&akid=3943%2E400544%2EJt-gGW)**

Together, we can make sure that average families — not billionaires — decide the future of our state.
Be fierce,
Team Deb

name: Mikie Sherrill HQ
subject: not the headline we wanted to see
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Peter, did you see this headline?
#
Peter, did you see this headline?
**One poll after another shows our MAGA opponent catching up to us in this election.**
**[This race is closer than ever, Peter — and if we continue to let Jack Ciattarelli’s attacks go unanswered, he has a real chance of pulling ahead. Can you split a donation between Mikie’s campaign and Katie Porter today to help us fight back?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250821_1_ak?refcode=em20250821-40046&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40046_3422442_iiI9jR&akid=40046%2E3422442%2EiiI9jR)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250821_1_ak?refcode=em20250821-40046&refcode2=40046_3422442_iiI9jR&akid=40046%2E3422442%2EiiI9jR)
Peter, New Jersey is not the safe Democratic state we once thought it was — in fact, it’s far from it. The last governor’s election here? It was decided by 3%. New Jersey’s margin in the 2024 presidential election? 6%. And some of the early polling in this race? _**A statistical tie.**_
Right now, my opponent is flooding the zone all over New Jersey with false attacks on my record and our vision for New Jersey. **And the scary reality is that these attacks work if they go unanswered.**
But we also know this: when undecided voters learn who Mikie is, what she stands for, and how her policy priorities differ from her MAGA opponent’s, _**she earns their support.**_
**[Peter, can you help us gather the resources we need and split a donation between Mikie’s campaign and Katie Porter to fight back against our opponent’s attacks and spread our message to undecided voters? This race is one of the most competitive in the country, and we need all the help we can get.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250821_1_ak?refcode=em20250821-40046&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40046_3422442_iiI9jR&akid=40046%2E3422442%2EiiI9jR)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250821_1_ak?refcode=em20250821-40046&refcode2=40046_3422442_iiI9jR&akid=40046%2E3422442%2EiiI9jR)
Thank you,
Mikie Sherrill HQ

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250821-40046&amounts=&t=1&refcode2=40046_3422442_iiI9jR&akid=40046%2E3422442%2EiiI9jR)**

body:
Can you help us make our BBQ a success? | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113758700/564832525/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg5ZDE5YTYtZTE3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1kZ9bWn2lP6y48GKemkLgX0l-MNc3V_WzSzEuLT6vpw=) | Hi Peter, I can’t wait for our annual Harder Friends & Family BBQ this weekend! It’s our biggest event of the year, and I’m so excited to see everyone. Last year, more than 500 attendees joined us — alongside Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries — to get our volunteers energized. This year, we’re expecting an even bigger crowd, with a special guest: Governor Andy Beshear! **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113758701/564832526/-1623235363?&refcode=E14831-20250821-BBQFund-Image-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg5ZDE5YTYtZTE3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1kZ9bWn2lP6y48GKemkLgX0l-MNc3V_WzSzEuLT6vpw=)****But here’s the truth: a bigger BBQ also means a lot more to cover — more food, more drinks, more signs, more of everything. And I could really use your help to make sure this event is a success.** [_**Can you pitch in $5, $25, or whatever you can today to help us pull it off?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113758702/564832528/-1623235363?&refcode=E14831-20250821-BBQFund-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg5ZDE5YTYtZTE3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1kZ9bWn2lP6y48GKemkLgX0l-MNc3V_WzSzEuLT6vpw=) [Donate to the BBQ Fund »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113758703/564832529/-1623235363?&refcode=E14831-20250821-BBQFund-SB-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg5ZDE5YTYtZTE3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1kZ9bWn2lP6y48GKemkLgX0l-MNc3V_WzSzEuLT6vpw=) Thanks for helping us bring our community together! – Josh

clean_body: Can you help us make our BBQ a success? | = | Hi Peter, I can’t wait for our annual Harder Friends & Family BBQ this weekend! It’s our biggest event of the year, and I’m so excited to see everyone. Last year, more than 500 attendees joined us — alongside Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries — to get our volunteers energized. This year, we’re expecting an even bigger crowd, with a special guest: Governor Andy Beshear! here’s the truth: a bigger BBQ also means a lot more to cover — more food, more drinks, more signs, more of everything. And I could really use your help to make sure this event is a success. = = Thanks for helping us bring our community together! – Josh *

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Trump is coming for the courts

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email07132025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email07132025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Donald Trump is signaling his next move: taking over the local courts.
The man who tried to overturn the 2020 election is openly plotting to seize control of the courts in our nation’s capital after deploying national guard troops, and if he gets away with it in Washington, what’s to stop MAGA Republicans from running the same playbook in states across the country?
That’s why our fight for the Pennsylvania Supreme Court this fall couldn’t be more critical. Trump and his allies already stacked the U.S. Supreme Court. They’re undermining state constitutions, stripping away voting rights, and threatening reproductive freedom. If they win control of courts like Pennsylvania’s, it’s game over for fair elections and the rule of law.
So, Peter, GOTV PAC is all-in to protect the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, but we need grassroots supporters like you with us to compete against the flood of Republican dark money.
Can you rush $20, $35, or whatever you can today to help us defend democracy and stop Trump from seizing the courts? The more funds we have to work with the greater the impact we can make. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08212025]

Every court seat matters, every election matters, and this fight in Pennsylvania will set the tone for 2026 and beyond. Let’s prove once again that grassroots power can beat MAGA corruption.
– GOTV PAC

body:
He stated that items in the memo were “absolutely ridiculous and abysmal.”

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113758975/564833876/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250820Project_SB_90DO_6_NG_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGE5OWY5MS1lMjdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-F6X26MvTaHB1eZXppo3tr0PTgB4T9dU7S2vaI3Ey5k=) Peter,

During the 2024 elections, Trump claimed to have “no idea” about Project 2025 – a disastrous 900-page MAGA wish list, written by the infamous Heritage Foundation, aimed at dismantling our democracy and stripping away our rights. In fact, he stated that items in the memo were “absolutely ridiculous and abysmal.”

Now, just months into his term, **Trump’s Project 2025 is already 47% complete.**

Beyond completing their efforts to eliminate the US Agency for International Development, ban transgender individuals from serving in the military, and fund 100,000 ICE detention beds, sixty-four other proposals are underway. This includes their work to eliminate the Department of Education, end the “woke agenda” within government contracts, attack agencies that work on climate responsiveness, and more.

Additionally, as reported by _The Hill_ , **the other 53% of Project 2025 remains on the Trump Regime’s wish list.**

Trump aims to take full control of the government, the courts, and your life. We must fight back.

body:

_—Original Message—
Sent: Tues., Aug. 19, 2024
From: Jessica Mackler, EMILYs List_

Peter, Americans deserve leaders who will fight for them — but right now, Republicans in power are failing their constituents, and voters know it.

EMILYs List Action just ran a national poll with Impact Research, and the results are crystal clear: **Americans are feeling the painful fallout of the reckless Trump-GOP economic agenda, with women struggling most acutely. **

Most Americans, and especially women, reported facing financial hardship in their daily lives and feeling bleak about their futures. Among voters who are struggling,**82% want candidates who will fight for them** and work to make their lives better.

**Women make up the majority of the electorate in midterm elections, and if Democrats want to be successful in 2026, we need to respond to the hardships women voters are facing — _and_ the issues they care about.**

The Democratic pro-choice women EMILYs List recruits and supports are uniquely positioned to connect with voters, and we are committed to electing leaders in the tough races **critical to taking back power** — because our candidates will deliver _real results_ for women and families.

We've endorsed candidates who embody the leadership voters are demanding, but now we need the resources to carry this momentum through to the midterms.

**That's why we're launching a three-day Poll to Power Fund to raise $100,000 for Democratic pro-choice women who will fight — and win — for the American people.**

clean_body: Here's what I've been emphasizing about EMILYs List Action's new polling: | = Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw my earlier note about the Poll to Power Fund — because tonight's deadline is the very last chance to help us reach our $100,000 goal. | = Over the past two weeks, I've been on TV sharing EMILYs List Action's new polling results and what they mean:Americans — especially women — are struggling financially and are desperate for leaders who will fight for them. And guess what: Democratic pro-choice women are uniquely positioned to do just that. I've been working with our team to turn this data into action by identifying the key races where Democratic women can win, shaping the messaging that will connect with voters, and making sure our candidates have the resources to fight back. Here's what I've been emphasizing to everyone: The women EMILYs List recruits and supports are positioned to take back power, provide bold new leadership, and deliver on voters' top priorities: lowering costs, protecting access to quality affordable health care, including abortion, and building an economy that works for all of us. But without the resources to fuel their campaigns, the numbers from this poll won't translate into change. That's why the Poll to Power Fund matters — and why I'm asking, one last time, for your support before the clock runs out at midnight tonight. **= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = With gratitude, Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers) President, EMILYs List —Original Message— Sent: Tues., Aug. 19, 2024 From: Jessica Mackler, EMILYs List Peter, Americans deserve leaders who will fight for them — but right now, Republicans in power are failing their constituents, and voters know it. EMILYs List Action just ran a national poll with Impact Research, and the results are crystal clear: Americans are feeling the painful fallout of the reckless Trump-GOP economic agenda, with women struggling most acutely. Most Americans, and especially women, reported facing financial hardship in their daily lives and feeling bleak about their futures. Among voters who are struggling,82% want candidates who will fight for them and work to make their lives better. Women make up the majority of the electorate in midterm elections, and if Democrats want to be successful in 2026, we need to respond to the hardships women voters are facing — and the issues they care about. The Democratic pro-choice women EMILYs List recruits and supports are uniquely positioned to connect with voters, and we are committed to electing leaders in the tough races critical to taking back power — because our candidates will deliver real results for women and families. We've endorsed candidates who embody the leadership voters are demanding, but now we need the resources to carry this momentum through to the midterms. That's why we're launching a three-day Poll to Power Fund to raise $100,000 for Democratic pro-choice women who will fight — and win — for the American people. = =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for your support, Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers) President, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: My opponent has launched over $1 million in ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Hi, my name is Abigail Spanberger. I'm a three-term congresswoman from Virginia, a former CIA officer, and the only Democrat in America who can flip a Governor's seat in 2025.
My opponent has launched over $1 million in ads.
Soon the floodgates will open. The same billionaires who got Trump elected will come after me and everything we've built together.
But I'm not intimidated by far-right extremists.
In 2018, I won a seat in Congress held by Republicans for fifty years, and I'm gearing up to make history again — with donors like you by my side.
Will you split a donation between Tim Kaine's Common Ground PAC and my campaign to help us run our own ads and win tough elections all over the country? Our election in Virginia this November will set the tone for Democrats in 2026 and beyond, so it's critical that we raise enough money to win decisively. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?amount=25]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $30 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?express_lane=true&amount=30]

DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?amount=25]
Thanks for doing your part,
Abigail Spanberger

**_Friend, Marc Elias isn’t holding back:_** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113759507/564835072/957523928?refcode=em-8.21.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmE5OWY5MS1lMjdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oMn26ttvgxY_CHa3h5_6UAhl7JbkLJrkWN7zEzeBtW8=)** Trump just pledged to end mail-in voting and claimed he’ll sign an executive order to ban it nationwide. And he says he got the idea straight from Vladimir Putin, who told him that: _**“your election was rigged because you have mail-in voting.”**_ It’s as outrageous as it is dangerous. Trump is already rewriting election rules, intimidating officials, and pardoning those who tried to overturn the 2020 election. And unlike last time, the safeguards that stopped him at the federal level – career civil servants, the Justice Department – are gone. Make no mistake: the fight for democracy will come down to the Secretaries of State, along with state and local leaders, who run our elections and certify every vote. And like 2020, it will come down to what happens in the courtroom, too. **That’s why we created the DASS Legal Fund – to give Democratic Secretaries of State and their teams the resources they need to defend voters, fight back against bogus GOP lawsuits, and protect every ballot.** [**But we can’t do it without you. Make no mistake: the fight for democracy will come down to the Secretaries of State, along with state and local leaders, who run our elections and certify every vote. And like 2020, it will come down to what happens in the courtroom, too. That’s why we created the DASS Legal Fund – to give Democratic Secretaries of State and their teams the resources they need to defend voters, fight back against bogus GOP lawsuits, and protect every ballot. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | =** Thank you, DASS Legal Fund | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only_ organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Contributions to DASS’s legal fund will be used at DASS’s sole discretion to support its programs and activities related to vote protecting programs. DASS may use all or part of a contributor’s funds, and disclose them as necessary, in states of its choosing. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill Democratic Association of Secretaries of State 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

subject: If Trump gave a damn

| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/-EVsfTCYzQwvgHdzRvuQxw~~/AAPPABA~/DgpV2jUJtlq4Kdeb2ACIwsVDqS1fcfrKl4rYlNVKcBc-ZeYp9CySoD_x1G1uhbFjDohXw4S69fSzizH2OYuosD8YQ1LJBZepI041L2XzVVB2v1eoE7osSXMjVKUodlZRiJvEql4aFM4BNSMLAqAiCYpf0Flmr1LwtigO8RR_YqUMDm4Xdu4q_mdGG6fBKjzVqnMxOtdLFq18dRfRU7g6N68KBSYi1cKcUmdMFnE3XZ6MV7ELihvTIxoEDdXgUk06nfkRI2mRjAR-QxpC4V5-UivxtDSaYWsMRdLU1ca7416Zs6RM0Uho7_4r8ISABhiPAy3awoFN-aO7I21ZoEox0A~~)

| | Peter, when it comes to Donald Trump militarizing our nation’s capitol, I’ll tell you exactly what I told CNN: **If Donald Trump actually gave a damn about keeping DC safe, then he wouldn't be gutting gun violence prevention efforts.

** [](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/-EVsfTCYzQwvgHdzRvuQxw~~/AAPPABA~/DgpV2jUJtlq4Kdeb2ACIwsVDqS1fcfrKl4rYlNVKcBc-ZeYp9CySoD_x1G1uhbFjDohXw4S69fSzizH2OYuosD8YQ1LJBZepI041L2XzVVB2v1eoE7osSXMjVKUodlZRiJvEql4aFM4BNSMLAqAiCYpf0Flmr1LwtigO8RR_YqUMDm4Xdu4q_mdGG6fBKjzVqnMxOtdLFq18dRfRU7g6N68KBSYi1cKcUmdMFnE3XZ6MV7ELihvTIxoEDdXgUk06nfkRI2mRjAR-QxpC4V5-UivxtDSaYWsMRdLU1ca7416Zs6RM0Uho7_4r8ISABhiPAy3awoFN-aO7I21ZoEox0A~~)
| [DONATE TO POWER THE CHANGE WE ACTUALLY NEED >>](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/4GJaPmnZT6zPOzbRkc4LDg~~/AAPPABA~/DgpV2jUJtlq4Kdeb2ACIwsVDqS1fcfrKl4rYlNVKcBc-ZeYp9CySoD_x1G1uhbFj3uDGlPWS2rwUtkIxzs7eyyyuVMHWvrNqmP9e9JgEnWYL6-5ehDf7DrdsNRi1pNsWBIKj_zBp7rrFznErRGGZGvZGj_l0wBl084PnxjSbZoVXJqv0FG8SaX5kv0YScinVTrZUo17ZRLRI6my7muHsow4ickP9EnAw9G28IkOIDXak9D1knn6JCvEv9KnIXzUY_-RBDG4BBHZOql5TUn_dCJL2FfBH8PWJlSBTX7apKfgABUNKUJIyodgoiugSo3teQv_ym1TbxZ1BcoEXswDmFg~~)
---
Peter, let’s look at the actual facts.

Crime in DC is going down. Gun violence in this country is going down. But people still say they don’t feel safe.

**What no one’s ever told Trump is that two things can be true: We can be improving _and_ still have work to do. But what we _can’t_ do is say that our choice is to either ignore people’s fear or turn DC into a police state.**

We know what actually makes people safer. But Trump is _gutting_ laws like the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. He _shuttered_ the White House Office of Gun Violence Prevention. And he’s _firing_ anyone who speaks the truth.

**I’m telling you this because facts matter, and it’s going to take all of us to fight for solutions that are actually based in truth.**

No matter how many unnecessary tanks block my path, I’ll keep walking into my office every day and insisting on _real solutions_. But I need you with me to prove that the power of the people is greater than these liars in power.
[**_Right now, can I count on you to donate $27 (or whatever you can) to help me keep working to actually keep our communities safe, and stop the fascist BS? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/-EVsfTCYzQwvgHdzRvuQxw~~/AAPPABA~/DgpV2jUJtlq4Kdeb2ACIwsVDqS1fcfrKl4rYlNVKcBc-ZeYp9CySoD_x1G1uhbFjDohXw4S69fSzizH2OYuosD8YQ1LJBZepI041L2XzVVB2v1eoE7osSXMjVKUodlZRiJvEql4aFM4BNSMLAqAiCYpf0Flmr1LwtigO8RR_YqUMDm4Xdu4q_mdGG6fBKjzVqnMxOtdLFq18dRfRU7g6N68KBSYi1cKcUmdMFnE3XZ6MV7ELihvTIxoEDdXgUk06nfkRI2mRjAR-QxpC4V5-UivxtDSaYWsMRdLU1ca7416Zs6RM0Uho7_4r8ISABhiPAy3awoFN-aO7I21ZoEox0A~~)

body:
I'm running for governor to rebuild our middle class and to build an economy that works for everyone, not just the people at the top.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113759758/564835847/-2054079050?code=jtk890-su-nd&refcode=jtk890-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTA2ZDMzZS1lMzdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tK9ynXurXjZ5QSo5mEyY_lvSTxSkwgMHZbIGsIR8Qn8=)

Can I be honest, friend?
One of my least favorite parts about running for office is asking folks like you for your hard-earned money. I'm sure you dislike getting those emails just as much.
Well, we're both in luck, because I'm not reaching out for donations – _[I just need your personal endorsement to become Colorado's next governor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113759759/564835848/172444050?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk890-su-nd&refcode=jtk890-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTA2ZDMzZS1lMzdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tK9ynXurXjZ5QSo5mEyY_lvSTxSkwgMHZbIGsIR8Qn8=&emci=017aac4c-037e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=5906d33e-e37e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1295540)_

And here's why:
From unaffordable housing to inaccessible health care and struggling schools, Colorado faces real problems. But I know solutions are within our reach.
I've spent years working to deliver change for Colorado from the U.S. Senate. And after traveling to every corner of our state, building relationships and convening Coloradans of all stripes to take on our greatest challenges, together, we've succeeded – by passing the Affordable Care Act, expanding the Child Tax Credit, investing in high-speed internet, upgrading our roads and bridges, and capping prescription drug costs for seniors.
But given Trump's thirst for power and the cowardly partisanship that's infected his party, it's clear that the best solutions to our problems _will not_ come from the broken politics or Trump’s chaos in D.C. They have to start here in Colorado. **And that's why I'm running.**
I'm running for governor to rebuild our middle class and to build an economy that works for everyone, not just the people at the top.
I'm running to ensure we set the nationwide example of how to really protect working families from Trump's costly tariffs and cruel agenda.
**I'm running because I know that together, we can create lasting solutions to our shared challenges, and make Colorado the best place to live and raise a family – but to make that happen, I need you with me.**
**_[If that sounds like the kind of leadership Colorado state needs, then please, friend, will you sign now to give my campaign one of the 20,000 grassroots endorsements I need by 11:59 p.m. tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113759761/564835850/172444050?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk890-su-nd&refcode=jtk890-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTA2ZDMzZS1lMzdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tK9ynXurXjZ5QSo5mEyY_lvSTxSkwgMHZbIGsIR8Qn8=&emci=017aac4c-037e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=5906d33e-e37e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1295540)_**

clean_body: Your voice matters | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. Friend, On Tuesday night, I had the great honor of hosting a town hall in Melville, NY, a key race in flipping the House and kicking Rep. Nick LaLota to the curb. I don’t know who is going to tell Republicans this—but if you actually listen to constituents, you can host a town hall without having people forcibly removed. If you weren’t able to join us in person, check out from our town hall. Speaking to people across this country always leaves me energized and eager to fight. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113759834/564836097/-746039140?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGRiYjczZS1lNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5gX6i1bSvi83ySykEth9tYkOxBQJW9JKHkrQikkwo1I=)
**Sherrod Brown was born and raised in Ohio. He’s dedicated his life to fighting for Ohioans and the Dignity of Work.** He believes that hard work should pay off for everyone — no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do.
Years ago, a union steelworker gave him a pin of a yellow canary in a birdcage. It’s a reminder of a time when miners would bring canaries into the mines to check for dangerous levels of gas.
If the canary died, the miners knew to get out. At that time, workers didn’t have strong unions or a government that would fight for them.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113759837/564836099/-746039140?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGRiYjczZS1lNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5gX6i1bSvi83ySykEth9tYkOxBQJW9JKHkrQikkwo1I=)
Sherrod has worn this canary pin ever since to remember the workers he’s fighting so hard for every single day. It’s a reminder that the fight is still going — to support our country and the people who make it work.
Sherrod has taken on the tough fights in the U.S. Senate — working to stand up for working men and women against big corporations.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113759839/564836102/-746039140?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGRiYjczZS1lNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5gX6i1bSvi83ySykEth9tYkOxBQJW9JKHkrQikkwo1I=)
**But now, Republicans are preparing to pour MILLIONS into attacking Sherrod and keeping his seat red.**
**[Pitch in $10 to help us support Democrats running in key swing races like Sherrod Brown and Flip the Senate. We’ve set an emergency goal of raising $50,000 before midnight, and we need your help>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113759840/564836103/-746039140?amount=10&refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250821_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGRiYjczZS1lNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5gX6i1bSvi83ySykEth9tYkOxBQJW9JKHkrQikkwo1I=) **

name: Chris Ahuja
subject: Trump & Brad Sherman’s Tariffs are a Raw Deal for Working Families
body:
Americans rights will not be trampled by poor policy

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=380a48b3b4&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | [Donate](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=febcd8ff6a&e=5a6ee82cdb)
---
| | Dear Peter,**Donald Trump’s economic record is a disaster, driving up costs for everyday goods and creating hardship for working families.** His reckless tariff policies are hurting small businesses while too many people are already unemployed or underemployed. Instead of standing up to Trump,**Brad Sherman said he “often agrees” with Trump on tariffs.** That’s not just clueless, it’s tone deaf for working families who are struggling in this economy. **While the wealthy 1% and big corporations find ways to profit, working people are stuck with higher bills, lost jobs, and a dwindling safety net.** Unemployment for young people, and people of all ages, has put families in a tailspin trying to survive. On top of these economic struggles, the recently passed “Big Ugly Bill” eliminates healthcare coverage for 259,016 individuals in our district who rely on Medi-Cal or Covered California subsidies. **Affordable care isn’t a privilege, it’s a right.****We deserve a representative who fights for working families and small businesses – who doesn’t cozy up to Trump and his economic failures, leaving our community behind.** I’m committed to supporting an economy where families have a fair shot, small businesses thrive, and leaders prioritize people over corporate interests. **Sherman Stands with Trump.****I Stand with You.****In solidarity,
**[****](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=5d41825b22&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Chris Ahuja****Democrat for Congress, CD-32**

---
| | | | | | | | | [ View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/chrisahuja/ahuja-vra-anniversary-11041689?e=5a6ee82cdb)
Christopher Ahuja for Congress * 21255 Burbank Blvd Ste 120 * Woodland Hills, CA 91367-6669 * USA

[](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=934f00be3f534f9989f9b34c73c40fd6&_e=IwBoR5lqWwjNuhhSDCskowO3V7b9ZXmRBElHd6OzZIdkhW1CNS2KVxPfdpeoBRpx6OR6jIyy_KlfH8XSq-pvP4Sdi4Bp7kD9i5_ncEoDDvIMzdIma9A9q797IFZM2u6_-TP-fHiv2dfzA1xVk4_cwMkaznqqmjwwWDUbZonO2MQ0c3kT2d1ZnVQW2ZDyVuW_lQip9wObsyMiTY5V7QCKyRO0KqyrsU57HgnBG6OdjHEO_I1zADbs0f0-YzxnH7K93dlp5Fo1_Zybcmu_VcPpxRJXvWwqkfCryvMlG1j5UxHvl-UOI2Gdjqqkx8FO3vROFusbct_WIfZA7XkSEd7dJScR3vJ8eyxPAiKJ4DHNdCCqFM2AG4D7AdcAj0wIETShNJjdfudT5CWW-UpsiqaE-doq_b4K8x8ONNG4GyLktFzW1ZoHtubVcnQdiiL0ksZM2mAkF-KsEXWWDZsAR0o8nSHe7RAcssiRrEdRkH5KYJkyRZBgWIzOw4HbzW6SohlU5ltcgxw04Vi2VRmrxM7TR97RDXr8m97mxN5hLFzX4d-tX05orJMUazM5HqvG_UCDjq90bbxj6-FREpDXOiMTZrivAwj2X4AcjCCuqGXWgeAKzAxXLg5CVuPycsbkAmq78Reobj_GKq1ErNl4KHwWFnBwuaQ87zkrMoE-1eT9Dc_eclWG_PgZvcuSzHHD3uGhtFZJUkKn9sk6S_g1H4oBsQZmneHaxqtew0Iv7HTCZRiuB3bAoiPfEwDZUqx1sARmDifmXuOmBMYmQcHpJyPFhw%3D%3D) Friend --

I couldn't believe it came down to this.

It was one of the more humbling experiences of my life.

**I'm Claudia Tenney. I'm a single mom and America First conservative running to defeat the radical left machine. **

**In 2018, the Democrats threw everything they had at me, and narrowly defeated me by a few thousand votes and I had to concede the election & congratulate my opponent. **

**I was heartbroken. **

Everyone expected me to just walk away - _but I’m a conservative who doesn't believe in giving up when the going gets tough._

In fact - I was more motivated than ever to run again - and I did.

It was election night in 2020, and the polls had already closed, but ballots kept coming in - and they kept on counting.

And as a fierce defender of election integrity, I wasn't about to let the Democrat machine pull a fast one on us. I took on Biden, the Democrats, and Hillary Clinton's personal attorney in court & was declared the winner two months later _**by just 109 votes.**_

I won't sugar coat this - the Democrats are still livid that a single mom from upstate New York was able to humiliate them after they spent millions to destroy me.

The House Majority & the fate of our nation hinges on this very race at this very moment.

**So here is how I'm asking you to help:** **[](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=934f00be3f534f9989f9b34c73c40fd6&_e=IwBoR5lqWwjNuhhSDCsko4perDa-D8Mn6GiYUBVCe7aJaHdmBfLddkxArPw-1fvKIZY7d2C8JrGtDLHrosl2E8kfc1Dp-Yxv2hcPJrHTDN0sgfIv2occi8Pjk3aOGcGXf2LMWnaBkDzaTFk_e9ImedhtHG5R_Cx03xv01enpKGc30Uepf_80rujUDmDL-vFsFLCtK6CaqEg4eLHg0e9wNjMKF5vCBK1YvI_DVGQtnUpfF6AoZeK7LUkhRNlGtecsAq50BHF1QsSHye7G9WtbIEA19N2fERLtVq4t1asuZNfchsiFF25VzJaCRdhACBcKda-uoBu1ayVb5YifaXcF3IcJ6mqOMNHqCHafvK1lm7JhTco1jksVi_-S4x2wJ8iWPmdEfGR4ouzQbXQzopzMeW6l5KkSVuzlB_d2eLbc9XEEsTXHmHF7t8t3IRLSlYuyWvdqxsm_upE4rqtgTdftasRxDf5DoLuLIsHT6E1dK1v-MJq0O0sD0NtYcF2ch8XdCd457bJSUolw295wgUUH_HzFi1Mezy4yNzy-5ajIx8BF8zQ_q0CT8rwFW6ihItKcYANnnDGiyq8vABAOiHzAd4sjzKXkSdq3jF7j4LZcNX_4UyQi_PFwe7HLdorFEJ49S--H0uqe5W6C9D_kObjNB0jFA0tZb6q-rfOZZyLWDdw5AxDatMKFCExrKTZUpKT5IllNw6uwsdsapZZxBgmEby13OxS87C_wWtRhMMYvh79TYerdjFy8FbHH9QpVrqK6fiXMS140lcWXIQvWlk66AMwsMyDEyeEEd2jQZ8WT9SkiwXE0E4xJrvr48X2QxnMkE6RjFvxS5M1NLXDxr9tCHO3uIpVJLtliyE-8uteGB2NVWNss2PpTP4iTIw-yrLk7WWAoDbkyya0xZep4K5LsaOMQWRuBTCjrrymYJpF9OWCNS8oLDLtzi0hBmWfrNCGjMXuJytbBVkmgDzWjjV74hQqRcKg9eOO47W9MwxakdcMEY3qogMcJ7OaTxyb0J6I7fKQ2_fCLkBZZcYE9XFZT5vkbWTiuJZf_5mU9p0PCuOc%3D "Will you contribute just $10 to my campaign in the next few minutes to defend this seat and deliver Joe Biden and the Democrats another humiliating upset? clean_body: Congratulating my opponent was really tough Friend -- I couldn't believe it came down to this. It was one of the more humbling experiences of my life. I'm Claudia Tenney. I'm a single mom and America First conservative running to defeat the radical left machine. In 2018, the Democrats threw everything they had at me, and narrowly defeated me by a few thousand votes and I had to concede the election & congratulate my opponent. I was heartbroken. Everyone expected me to just walk away - but I’m a conservative who doesn't believe in giving up when the going gets tough. In fact - I was more motivated than ever to run again - and I did. It was election night in 2020, and the polls had already closed, but ballots kept coming in - and they kept on counting. And as a fierce defender of election integrity, I wasn't about to let the Democrat machine pull a fast one on us. I took on Biden, the Democrats, and Hillary Clinton's personal attorney in court & was declared the winner two months later by just 109 votes. I won't sugar coat this - the Democrats are still livid that a single mom from upstate New York was able to humiliate them after they spent millions to destroy me. The House Majority & the fate of our nation hinges on this very race at this very moment. So here is how I'm asking you to help: "Will you contribute just $10 to my campaign in the next few minutes to defend this seat and deliver Joe Biden and the Democrats another humiliating upset? " I'll just tell you: this is going to be the biggest Congressional race in America & grassroots support will decide who wins it. We flipped the three major offices in in virginia - that's no small feat! Each of us owes a debt of gratitude to phenomenal patriots like YOU , Fellow American! I can't thank you enough for all your help and support so far. I'm not exaggerating one bit when I tell you that we COULD NOT have won without you. Without support from folks like you, we wouldn't have been able to turn Virginia into a strong and conservative Commonwealth. I'm writing to you today because I need your help and support once again. I'm running for Governor to keep up the great work we've been doing for the past few years. My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has a serious cash advantage. Liberal groups are cutting her checks for half a MILLION dollars and Hollywood Leftists are injecting her campaign coffers with unheard-of sums of money. Listen Fellow American, I don 't have liberal groups and Hollywood Democrats propping up my campaign. I 'm 100% relying on support from grassroots patriots like YOU! We can't let a far-Left Democrat like Abigail Spanberger turn our country into a socialist dystopia - we must defend everything we've worked so hard to build! I can't tell you how much I appreciate having you on my team. Together, we will defend our home and ensure our country remains a bastion of conservatism and a land of opportunity! name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The State Department just banned ALL Gaza visas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

This is intentionally cruel,
Peter.

The U.S. Department of State just halted all visitor visas for people from
Gaza, which have been overwhelmingly medical-humanitarian visas used by
child amputees and other sick or injured Palestinians seeking care in the
United States.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250821-signup-endgazavisaban?source=em20250821-36950&akid=36950%2E1203867%2EehVhIx ]Screenshot of an NBC News headline that reads: 'U.S. State Department
stops medical-humanitarian visas for people from Gaza.' The subheadline
states: 'The move comes after far-right activist Laura Loomer said Friday
that Palestinian 'refugees' had entered the U.S. this month.'

This is just the latest move Donald Trump and his Secretary of State Marco
Rubio have taken to continue enabling Israel’s genocide of Palestinians
while silencing and persecuting anyone trying to help stop it and save
lives.

After attacking humanitarian organizations, student activists, and human
rights advocates, they’re now denying sick and wounded children access to
life-saving medical treatment.

And it comes after MAGA influencer Laura Loomer spread the racist,
Islamophobic lie that Palestinian refugees are coming into the United
States and threatening national security.

Why are our immigration and humanitarian policies being dictated by a
right-wing activist who has self-described herself as a "pro-white
nationalist" and a "proud Islamophobe"?

The Palestine Children’s Relief Fund says this policy will “have a
devastating and irreversible impact.” We must speak out and demand that
the State Department reverse it.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250821-signup-endgazavisaban?source=em20250821-36950&akid=36950%2E1203867%2EehVhIx ]Add your name to our petition calling on the Trump administration to
end this inhumane ban on visas for Palestinians in Gaza NOW!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250821-signup-endgazavisaban?source=em20250821-36950&akid=36950%2E1203867%2EehVhIx ]Add Your Name

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250821-36950-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36950_1203867_ehVhIx&akid=36950%2E1203867%2EehVhIx

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36950%2E1203867%2EehVhIx

subject: Yeah, you're receiving an email from a dog right now, and what about it…?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Ruff!...Wait, I meant to say hi!
Peter, Winnie Beshear here. I'm the First Pup of Kentucky; full-time professional Goodest Girl and part-time assistant to everyone’s favorite governor, Andy Beshear (no seriously, have you seen his approval ratings?!). [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113760311/564837531/841405539?refcode=em25_250821_winnie_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250821_winnie_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=1d0431df-e77e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQwNDMxZGYtZTc3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ceF-XaX4TEcPD25YV73YoVyBf2FuevFa6pJTp0c040I=) This month it’s all about me! That’s right, it’s National Dog Month. **But instead of strutting around my dad’s office, begging for treats and attention, I’m using my paws to write you this note on all the incredible things my dad is doing for the people, and pups, of Kentucky** _(don’t tell him I said this, but he’s actually really good at his job)._

I always love to keep my dad’s chair warm when I’m in his office, so I have a firsthand look at how hard he works for the people who elected him, and those who didn’t, too. He fights so hard to create new jobs and opportunities for everyone, he keeps bringing tons of investments back to our state, and does it all while staying true to himself and his values. He even works super duper hard to slip me a treat when my mom isn’t looking. Isn’t he just the best?

Now, my dad is taking everything he’s learned about being a good leader on the road. He wants to help the goodest candidates in Kentucky and elsewhere win tough races and lead with the compassion and integrity that he does every day.

Look, I know my dad is supporting the right people, because he has the best character, and trust me, dogs know these things. But he needs your help to make sure all these other candidates have the resources they need to win their elections and be incredible leaders for their people, too. If I could send them enough dog treats to help them win, I would, but unfortunately, they need something called money. That’s where you come in, Peter.

[**Pretty, pretty please, if you can, will you help my dad fetch a better future for all by chipping in to his In This Together PAC today? Just think of how much love he’ll give me if I can help him support all these great candidates across the country!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113760312/564837532/841405539?refcode=em25_250821_winnie_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250821_winnie_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=1d0431df-e77e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQwNDMxZGYtZTc3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ceF-XaX4TEcPD25YV73YoVyBf2FuevFa6pJTp0c040I=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113760313/564837533/841405539?refcode=em25_250821_winnie_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250821_winnie_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=1d0431df-e77e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQwNDMxZGYtZTc3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ceF-XaX4TEcPD25YV73YoVyBf2FuevFa6pJTp0c040I=) I know you’re going to make my dad so proud!

Winnie Beshear 🐾
First Dog of Kentucky
| | **Andy and In This Together PAC are working to support leaders who will lead with compassion and decency, reject anger politics, and always do what's right. Will you donate today to support In This Together's mission?** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113760314/564837534/841405539?refcode=em25_250821_winnie_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250821_winnie_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=1d0431df-e77e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQwNDMxZGYtZTc3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ceF-XaX4TEcPD25YV73YoVyBf2FuevFa6pJTp0c040I=)

subject: Democrats running in must-win races are already getting pummeled

body:
Billionaire-backed groups are pouring millions of dollars into these races
#
We’ve got some bad news, Peter: **Democrats running in must-win races across the country are already getting pummeled with well-funded GOP attacks.**
Billionaire-backed groups are pouring millions of dollars into these races — and we’re still more than a year away from the 2026 election! **[Will you help us fight back now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93950?refcode=em20250821-9308&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9308%2E614464%2EQeOLMW)**
**[SUPPORT DEMOCRATS: CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93950?refcode=em20250821-9308&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9308%2E614464%2EQeOLMW)**
We can’t afford to fall behind this early. The simple truth is that if we don’t start organizing and building our war chest now, we could risk letting MAGA Republicans define the narrative and keep their control over the Senate AND the House.
Over the coming weeks + months, we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us prepare for the fight ahead. **We need the resources to help Democrats in must-win races introduce themselves to voters while also standing up to the inevitable onslaught of GOP attacks.[Will you rush a donation of any amount today to help us do it?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93950?refcode=em20250821-9308&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9308%2E614464%2EQeOLMW)**

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: BREAKING: Federal Court Just DESTROYED New Mexico's Gun Waiting Period
body:
Plus: The Fatal Mistake That Cost an Entire Family Their Lives | New episode of No Doubt About It out now for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a0a81b4d72&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | |
This week’s episode of the [No Doubt About It Podcast](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=4a19e971e1&e=567664f14c) is packed with stories you won’t hear broken down anywhere else.
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=13c88f1727&e=567664f14c)
| | **🔥 Second Amendment Victory
** The Tenth Circuit Court of Appeals just struck down New Mexico’s 7-day waiting period to buy a firearm—even if you’ve already passed a background check. The court ruled it unconstitutional. Mark explains why far-left lawmakers in Santa Fe keep pushing laws they know won’t stand—and why a media that never holds them accountable fuels even more bad laws. You’ll even hear a state senator caught on tape admitting their gun laws are unconstitutional.

**🏙️ Albuquerque Mayor’s Race**
The fundraising numbers are in, and Krysty shows why it’s now officially a three-horse race. Who’s got the momentum? We break it down.
**🚛 Trucking Tragedy**
We dive into the heartbreaking story of a Florida family killed by a big-rig driver who never should have been on the road. Shockingly, he was pulled over in New Mexico before the accident—but wasn’t stopped. Mark and Krysty reveal the alarming gaps that put innocent lives at risk.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=3f2e38c3af&e=567664f14c)
---
| | **🌍 Trump & the Ukraine War **
Trump is working to end the Russia-Ukraine conflict, but his opponents refuse to give him credit—even as lives hang in the balance. We’ll explain why.
**🏛️ The Smithsonian Goes Woke**
Trump wants to stop the politicization of America’s museums. Are exhibits really slanted? We’ve got the receipts, and the answer is yes.

👉 Don’t miss this episode—it’s one of our most important yet.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2783cb1958&e=567664f14c)

clean_body: Plus: The Fatal Mistake That Cost an Entire Family Their Lives | New episode of No Doubt About It out now for dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | | | | | | | | | | This week’s episode of the is packed with stories you won’t hear broken down anywhere else. | | 🔥 Second Amendment Victory The Tenth Circuit Court of Appeals just struck down New Mexico’s 7-day waiting period to buy a firearm—even if you’ve already passed a background check. The court ruled it unconstitutional. Mark explains why far-left lawmakers in Santa Fe keep pushing laws they know won’t stand—and why a media that never holds them accountable fuels even more bad laws. You’ll even hear a state senator caught on tape admitting their gun laws are unconstitutional. 🏙️ Albuquerque Mayor’s Race The fundraising numbers are in, and Krysty shows why it’s now officially a three-horse race. Who’s got the momentum? We break it down. 🚛 Trucking Tragedy We dive into the heartbreaking story of a Florida family killed by a big-rig driver who never should have been on the road. Shockingly, he was pulled over in New Mexico before the accident—but wasn’t stopped. Mark and Krysty reveal the alarming gaps that put innocent lives at risk. | | | 🌍 Trump & the Ukraine War Trump is working to end the Russia-Ukraine conflict, but his opponents refuse to give him credit—even as lives hang in the balance. We’ll explain why. 🏛️ The Smithsonian Goes Woke Trump wants to stop the politicization of America’s museums. Are exhibits really slanted? We’ve got the receipts, and the answer is yes. 👉 Don’t miss this episode—it’s one of our most important yet. | | | | If you believe New Mexicans deserve better healthcare—and want to keep up with the biggest cultural and political shifts happening right now—help us spread the word: | | ✅ LIKE the episode on ✅ SUBSCRIBE to and hit the 🔔 for updates ✅ RATE & REVIEW us on ✅ DONATE to support independent, fearless commentary at: 🌐 Thanks for standing with us, Mark & Krysty Ronchetti No Doubt About It Podcast 🎙️ | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | © 2025 Choose Adventure Media.
